name: Dr. Kristin Hook
subject: I Just Filed To Run For Office!
body:
| | | | | [|

# I just filed to run!!!
---
| | I am beyond thrilled to share the news with you - **I’m running for Congress****in TX-21 again!!!**
---
|
---
| | Last year I ran to Flip Chip out of this district, and now he’s running for Attorney General - making this an open seat.
Unlike last year, I’ll have a contested primary ahead of me. But I’m the only candidate in this race with the federal experience, campaign expertise, and name recognition needed to finally flip this seat blue!
It’s been a hell of a past year, and I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and build on all of the hard work we started last year to give our community the voice it deserves.
**If you’re with me, please pitch in to****my campaign to support my efforts.** This is just the beginning, and I would love nothing more than for you to be a part of it.
All My Gratitude,
---
|
---

name: John Padora
subject: If we don’t fight now, we may lose the country our kids deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Colorado’s rural and urban communities are uniting – but we cannot defeat Trump and Boebert’s extremism without your help today.

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/b9XXWpxxgcs5MI6JQVv0qQ~~/AAUS1hA~/vpdhLveoVILoZkONiqYVoRizYtSy-tFlTh7g99U3SbF0LkPihTi82eCvLyFT6Fd8GBCO1WEJe-ILmXK4mME8R-tidnnSGwk6LhOpLKXE8a_WGYtWqiE5R8JGZSMuPF3I)
| | ******Friend,** I’m writing this because we are running out of time - as a campaign, as a district, and as a country. **America** **cannot survive three more years of Donald Trump’s unchecked recklessness.**
We are already living in the consequences: authoritarian abuses of power, economic instability, attacks on democracy, and a political culture that rewards chaos over responsibility. And here in Colorado’s 4th District, **Lauren Boebert** is helping him every step of the way. Colorado’s 4th isn’t just another district - it is **the largest agricultural economic engine in the entire state.** Our farms, our ranches, our water systems, our infrastructure, and our rural towns are the backbone of Colorado’s economy. We deserve a representative who understands that.
Someone who knows what agricultural work _actually feels like._
**Someone who has lived a working-class life, not just talked about one.** I grew up working on farms in Southeastern Pennsylvania and I've spent nearly two decades working in high-tech manufacturing industries, navigating factory floors and helping keep America running.
I know what it means to wake up before sunrise, to work long days because the job demands it and your family depends on you. This lifestyle teaches you grit, responsibility, and humility - everything Washington lacks. But here’s the truth: this campaign isn’t just about agriculture.
It’s about the broad issues crushing families across America:
* an affordability crisis that is steamrolling an entire generation out of the American dream
* corporate consolidation that’s gutting small towns, farms, and local businesses
* a housing market designed for investors, not families
* a healthcare system that bankrupts people who did nothing wrong
* stagnant wages and soaring costs that make it harder and harder to raise a family
* a political class completely insulated from the struggles of the people they claim to represent

And that’s exactly why I am running. Because I am the **ONLY working-class candidate in this race** raising children in this brutal economy.
I’m living the reality that millions of people are living every single day.
I’m paying the same bills, dealing with the same medical costs, watching grocery prices climb, watching housing become unattainable, and worrying about the same future for my kids that every working parent worries about. We need leaders who understand that this moment is more than a career opportunity in Washington.
It is a chance to **reshape our future** , to protect the next generation, and to leave behind a legacy that says:
_When America slipped toward fascism and extremism, we fought like hell to save it._ That’s what this movement is about.
That’s why I’ve spent months traveling across every corner of this district - Windsor, Parker, Loveland, Fort Morgan, Larkspur, Sterling, Strasburg and beyond - meeting with families, farmers, veterans, teachers, and young people desperate for real representation. They aren’t asking for perfection.
They’re asking for leadership grounded in real life, not political theater. But I need to be honest with you: **We are falling behind financially.**
Not because the support isn’t there.
Not because the energy isn’t real.
But because **I refuse corporate PAC cash, wealthy donor networks, and corporate-employed mega donors.** This campaign is powered by **an average donation of $21** from working people who want change.
People who don’t have extra money to throw around but give because they believe the stakes are that high. And they’re right - the stakes _are_ that high. So I am asking you, as directly and urgently as I can: [**Will you chip in $21, or anything you can, to keep this grassroots movement alive and competitive?**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/12m7uctaEP5KlUQzXXuerA~~/AAUS1hA~/nOf0yVNb6fkFFCUZDC1NMYWQqxBiK-piboFP6fwUoTSF7ueT_VrTJd37iPq2JO9Ykt3vb8SP5wcq8KDzqOzQuJ74iVJhrvSdq5VqZs3hk6kATdosn2s1OjNk6fNrkmnkERh3BvgBzUrdJS6gZODQlgub32fLPBRcBHDbftk1CB0~) Every dollar helps us fight Boebert’s machine.
Every dollar pushes back against Trump’s authoritarian agenda.
Every dollar says the working class will not sit silently while our future is decided for us. We are fighting for our future, our children’s future, and the legacy our grandchildren will inherit.
Let them look back and say:
**They fought. They stood up. They refused to let this country fall.** Thank you for being in this movement with me.
We rise together - or not at all. **[Chip in now so we can fuel this working-class movement, defend our democracy from rising fascism, and give Colorado’s 4th District the fighter it deserves.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/12m7uctaEP5KlUQzXXuerA~~/AAUS1hA~/nOf0yVNb6fkFFCUZDC1NMYWQqxBiK-piboFP6fwUoTSF7ueT_VrTJd37iPq2JO9Ykt3vb8SP5wcq8KDzqOzQuJ74iVJhrvSdq5VqZs3hk6kATdosn2s1OjNk6fNrkmnkERh3BvgBzUrdJS6gZODQlgub32fLPBRcBHDbftk1CB0~)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [Chip in $10 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-esB11nl3CCPkbhFNZ18Sw~~/AAUS1hA~/mG98Ac9ZYUtzTGSpvCKXfWyxi41alkTzTQiXr_lLWdix2ooKYZfaJskmZuUWaUPsXdyDam4wbmIB8mYuwy-UdWIpC4xC_6z3DlzQMbKnoqnjgrFLRZiFAjrwo_xxn12eYPftzTmcPYlS9EsBNXNI5wxBUgJ02Wbx6e7YRVo8XRh-1yrYz29IZ-rB51GvGZqB) | [Chip in $25 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/gLK9xVEcu1uNbIrrNOJF8Q~~/AAUS1hA~/mG98Ac9ZYUtzTGSpvCKXfWyxi41alkTzTQiXr_lLWdix2ooKYZfaJskmZuUWaUPsXdyDam4wbmIB8mYuwy-UdWIpC4xC_6z3DlzQMbKnoqk-kFX7e6tTxbE76cTIfnLqxA7O3sivWmlhir7V-ikOa4-HEvQjk7CcsIZqw_xa1q7d-45nw4jh3hsd0KiAi1-K)
---|---
[Chip in $50 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/8bgq3k0R003bRtYkQpMUEw~~/AAUS1hA~/mG98Ac9ZYUtzTGSpvCKXfWyxi41alkTzTQiXr_lLWdix2ooKYZfaJskmZuUWaUPsXdyDam4wbmIB8mYuwy-UdWIpC4xC_6z3DlzQMbKnoql86fEflVwhYJFCj9U5qoO5PTlbEKBqZeeH-JwgcVQxYhvKRqAFXgAiN5Z1zje8l-QOAQ8t2fZwbpFVwv7hp6H1) | [Chip in $100 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/sQA9BG0NxgCkMnHpP4zuYw~~/AAUS1hA~/vRCgzTRohz0tmEsThurOE06BOkkQZ4nof9IihLBbgPAs5gaOUEwdixtLcV-imnL10Dco4_BwPLxbe0ro_fNx2QTkoF5y9QDMVMpVlZmue-zXWKsFXuXcHoKmC3hx9God-PxD860tu0SIxh_5UotD1xQvt69lng9GExbJdDnzLyz_47e_717YhHEyLCzYJ2bi)
---|---
[Chip in $250 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zJ5I0KXbF_TfRtNq10XbxQ~~/AAUS1hA~/vRCgzTRohz0tmEsThurOE06BOkkQZ4nof9IihLBbgPAs5gaOUEwdixtLcV-imnL10Dco4_BwPLxbe0ro_fNx2QTkoF5y9QDMVMpVlZmue-wRijvqLE2uHqyxX58gzIrouMN1BdBNi1A1dMRucQchQn5ho8dpUR6oFzON-cJxs66Bc-CLSUKB-KsVsTTI9xai) | [Chip in another amount](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/uEuyy6r4J8j0djEplrqYtg~~/AAUS1hA~/Ii_vXaf1vuVLD_b7sLNxXjiPtp8YoJ-Rr3SjzFofXYXeXJ2pymN4xtBXfPCk85dEz2s0TIRhtZO1PfwqiYKKoH6o3ZfSV0TbgRSQkU60VWhan2zJpj5FZUCpyV8pon3VUPb2JNkMFH2K1gng5blISc7eEr-EFY4zDcWmnjCGQXHb9fArHYrP0gzle9gr9535Giq4qZM_Krrpg2joZeflHQ~~)
---|---
Let us prove that when the farms of the Eastern Plains and the neighborhoods of our cities unite, we can overcome the leaders who weaponize division and threaten our democracy.
**John Padora**
Working Dad • Fighter • Engineer
Candidate for Congress in CO 04
| Paid for by Padora for Colorado
---

subject: Commonsense Corner: It’s time to dismantle Obamacare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/Vg-S00-GSVkMi9oLqoOw-Alh0zBi4kGA7gj_gglcMWZaRo3OxrjoulJiMjVnRxtyLFHu6RksjTy1-SRUnSL2NyIVqhvcK-fY3Ppn4Vc3nvO8NSr-1786AZ60hedUlDEtfOCg0oxGD4dzytujF_xbLL5c3Zrl4tNylJ18kiU_bny5rlNqp9l845mTulIVrXR5d1QJ50yHh0UHgyWi-vSXh9evB6yYIPyl-jmqqzezUxRACte_FBe6vryHXntfR8qJ0O2Bf818MzWvgzBfcPgu8Lnq_SUtQKT83UjbpWl-bfaCTbd3XRb6_6vs7Xi-oTpQVftMY_zulRVFWB_I8srty-Xcr5C1rPkjalk6aHqC0S1Yz-Ue2mbW3iZeWVGOZCTTlI-kxAOFkwKiS59J2wtdVnh7NF7Nv_8sOWj_z6i8Pc0bXvul2Xi33MgOcv7P-6DdcHjwDAIh7HPfdg2YFJMyoKPb9tVIMnuj17135Yywq3Xc5OIKYl9zI3a10MnSaO9YuUUEn_HDmesiJLnPRSYMOp0SsZr3CwIQsz9wjScUk_lwHKaDl-I9cgLNMN72n4AE4nJjBAwhWfolQisNhyddHVT5aiZyCAAEIrKDZD6cZIe_djo46cuhEnjg_tOZdnoszPce2fmK7COSFMjPoEulqcujTFexIAPi6my0MR-WZVstJlELj_YvdSrf8BRS0l-PZdZQ/FBZESYVLR07rywDNGUWHPSYLCmCOFuM1/15)
---
|
---
| |
## Commonsense Corner:
---
Obamacare is on the table again, folks. Democrats are begging for another round of extensions, but if we go that route, what incentive does Congress have to fix it? This thing is a mess—and it has been since day one. Way back when, [Nancy Pelosi](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/6X9x1bYU6GKWpl_NORuYhDAkORJsdF9fyrDcgcSjY3LNEQl-hDmWcOSoZ1LPl3nUsDTufExXZ5PdKJ9wKBXqxau2Tb8qjlIQzpTuiutAci3Lq53e6NrCvfgKMGau8YZEJy0EXoN7YW9fM0KYzAUoP6RBvFuzgO_ADn4rSLMqnDLpkLMVlfyhC4znN-r6LVKnqbzk0XlhN9YiikUqX7KOnnAE67xMkKUtjuYdUozs-To9BtBpEUSvQd7ybhDfmhlMVfVVLZ4DvlhP8omOWREN8MUkL8K9g76qfCZfIrRVHtVVgh6SJERSoNaHw8o-ftEaVPHnEKPTrHcel1v93Ly1Qmd6xX5UMjSj_DaMeSnCBtZf12zEJXet6BECpLlHObA-1Mo1e3Um7yP8uc7bifsEHL4QSI_L-7MHCY88shY/XcEvkvsaqB6GZ6vMkL4oiezwIMa1C_W_/15) had the audacity to say, _“We have to pass the bill so that you can find out what is in it.”_ Well, we found out, we don’t like it, and the amount of money we’re pumping into it isn’t helping Americans. All it’s doing is making insurance companies filthy rich. So, what happens next? Rumor has it [Speaker Mike Johnson](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/Cccmk7OY5KqI5uXdSvDv57j9Uy0G0EzONjsRF1zoS8o6aUMrYdacxVd1vDYBnZAh863D8IlbXAsjM2q4VViOwfN_EM0XP4jO9irjTQSuupaX3spaMBSwVmg4AJHriMPQDFplBkoQIo8i2kdEA5kvRAdNPJYRKDySVk94hWFd65_4nNq3ENm_5Rdh_zawqjBj0_OBYhsG0e83zbmy3Kwme-FtO413eOJ6bcaYG1eiGkIt9sYmJZxe3zCSXZ4KgGGlItqsS_99F9hEGXCxZLCVmKgH4NDMRtZ0qFYuB3hEUPAJBee2bJ5D-nPSILCt0l26OP27htirscay_ED3SV7xCQGtpCuW7LSV-4sDckrpPdUUv3RRyJYNjppgCSjzzDZK5uyYkW75sgTCFpNfUYRN2VWmwEsU9oChj6HNQvc89UAIbt-AQ_lK/8MHp5zhxEf_7EuyqsL_Xux9eDvH3b8LG/15) may finalize a healthcare bill this week to get it on the House floor before we turn the page on 2025. Sure, it’s a lofty goal—but never say never. All we know is we trust Republicans to tackle this a lot more than we’d ever trust Democrats. As [Tim said](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/UlVMb_OQPvNntA2gARfoMtgB3dNlkgXKym9ndzhIdHKhYwWKwzKfQ1b0lvJDivG19io68UFi03ld4e6HywkFSFF4gIRO-MXbRBYfgWFlxddSsLJzVmdkMPcE7CKNFY0iUojc2p8ZgwUUufOi-bHfHtvJ9J-f_kxyn7ethzTu0iSHGW03lXGrZVrfKuRQErRfX-pwIHjoA1ujxVl9JP_D5mNqNppfBpKADXeZa9attLyQVkynGFre22ZqkQMCZVuegTcCV9gTs7UjwnzuZC_175zhxE1JFQgpX7eJYU6ZaTqzWb2zuZ_xsXuxe4tOEW5qhmphVlKt3xMlWobZPooxjYWEyuFMOa_f2kpVoV0W2cXSYEHvRvbucjibiGGkW4lduYtZ3kzwQKAhDlfh4SJPKqCJb4y3QonY5yV3S8xonkZlhzB4KKuabzDazdXv5V4/daTRejscCWAJ5_cpFSe-76_cYjc3AjBf/15) last week, outside of Christianity, Capitalism has taken more people out of despair than anything else in history. This is another good opportunity to bring that philosophy back to healthcare: more freedom, more choices, more competition, and less government. Now, let’s all keep our fingers crossed and hope for a Christmas miracle.
---
|

## Boots on the Ground Poll:
---

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: Obamacare is on the table again, folks. Democrats are begging for another round of extensions, but if we go that route, what incentive does Congress have to fix it? This thing is a mess—and it has been since day one. Way back when, had the audacity to say, “We have to pass the bill so that you can find out what is in it.” Well, we found out, we don’t like it, and the amount of money we’re pumping into it isn’t helping Americans. All it’s doing is making insurance companies filthy rich. So, what happens next? Rumor has it may finalize a healthcare bill this week to get it on the House floor before we turn the page on 2025. Sure, it’s a lofty goal—but never say never. All we know is we trust Republicans to tackle this a lot more than we’d ever trust Democrats. As last week, outside of Christianity, Capitalism has taken more people out of despair than anything else in history. This is another good opportunity to bring that philosophy back to healthcare: more freedom, more choices, more competition, and less government. Now, let’s all keep our fingers crossed and hope for a Christmas miracle. | Boots on the Ground Poll: What’s your opinion on Obamacare as it exists today? I’m reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: **I’m officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas.** Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I’m not launching this campaign to play nice. **I’m doing it to fight — because Texas deserves someone who doesn’t back down when the bullies come for her._It deserves someone who fights back._** But to win this race, we’ll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. _And to be blunt, that won’t come cheap._ [**_That’s why I’m asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I’m counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue. Will you answer the call by splitting a donation between my campaign and Raja Krishnamoorthi's?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120882973/587674151/-652557664?amount=25&amounts=250,100,50,25,10,5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_Crockett-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWFjMTkxOS05NGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esyU4onrQ3yJuq0LtJsL05x-jGhZ2-infeONKOnFRmE=) | | [ DONATE NOW → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120882974/587674152/-652557664?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_Crockett-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWFjMTkxOS05NGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esyU4onrQ3yJuq0LtJsL05x-jGhZ2-infeONKOnFRmE=)

Let me be clear: **When there’s a fight worth having, I don’t flinch. I don’t shrink._I don’t back down._**
Just ask the communities I’ve fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I’ve represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. **I’m a lifelong fighter for justice.**
So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he’s terrified of what I represent — and what I’m bringing to the Senate when we win this race:**truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people.**

[**_If you believe that insults won’t silence us — if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation — I need you. We’re launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That’s why I’d be so grateful if you could pitch in $10, $25, or more to help us hit the ground running. clean_body: Together, we’re going to flip Texas blue These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can . = Y’all, it’s Jasmine. I’m reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas. Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I’m not launching this campaign to play nice. I’m doing it to fight — because Texas deserves someone who doesn’t back down when the bullies come for her.It deserves someone who fights back. But to win this race, we’ll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. And to be blunt, that won’t come cheap. = | | = Let me be clear: When there’s a fight worth having, I don’t flinch. I don’t shrink.I don’t back down. Just ask the communities I’ve fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I’ve represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. I’m a lifelong fighter for justice. So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he’s terrified of what I represent — and what I’m bringing to the Senate when we win this race:truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people. = | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Jasmine | These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, click here. If you'd prefer, you can . If you'd like to donate, =. Raja for IL PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States | mailto:info@rajaforil.com | PAID FOR BY RAJA FOR ILLINOIS

body:
What we’re seeing right now
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3922%2E582294%2EuSBSBs)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Together, we're going to flip Texas blue
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120883436/587684399/185592584?refcode=251208em-launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGJmNmE1Yi05NmQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0FU8EwhzDHrwoYES9GvuXfLFOuN8EWV9ZDIDsqvjco=)
Y'all, it's Jasmine.
I’m reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: **I’m officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas.**
Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I’m not launching this campaign to play nice. **I’m doing it to fight — because Texas deserves someone who doesn’t back down when the bullies come for her._It deserves someone who fights back._**
But to win this race, we’ll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. _And to be blunt, that won’t come cheap._
**[That’s why I’m asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I’m counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue. Will you answer the call by splitting a donation between my campaign and Robert Garcia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120883437/587684432/185592584?refcode=251208em-launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGJmNmE1Yi05NmQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0FU8EwhzDHrwoYES9GvuXfLFOuN8EWV9ZDIDsqvjco=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120883438/587684433/185592584?refcode=251208em-launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGJmNmE1Yi05NmQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0FU8EwhzDHrwoYES9GvuXfLFOuN8EWV9ZDIDsqvjco=)
Let me be clear: **When there’s a fight worth having, I don’t flinch. I don’t shrink. I don’t back down.**
Just ask the communities I’ve fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I’ve represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. **I’m a lifelong fighter for justice.**
So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he’s terrified of what I represent — and what I’m bringing to the Senate when we win this race: **truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people.**
**[If you believe that insults won’t silence us — if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation — I need you. We’re launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That’s why I’d be so grateful if you could pitch in $10, $25, or more to help us hit the ground running. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Robert Garcia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120883439/587684434/185592584?refcode=251208em-launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGJmNmE1Yi05NmQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0FU8EwhzDHrwoYES9GvuXfLFOuN8EWV9ZDIDsqvjco=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120883440/587684435/185592584?refcode=251208em-launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGJmNmE1Yi05NmQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0FU8EwhzDHrwoYES9GvuXfLFOuN8EWV9ZDIDsqvjco=)
Thank you,
Jasmine Crockett

Friend, In 2026, **26 Secretary of State races will shape the future of our elections,** redistricting in 2030, and the outcome of the 2028 presidential race. Republicans know it. That’s why they’re _already_ pouring money into these states – and we have to fight back now, while it still makes a difference. **That's why the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State is going on offense, early.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120883442/587685168/-248329304?refcode=em-12.8.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjYxMTQzNi05NmQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g0Eb3reInabdlytBHc3lSDP808jT9K3xaUIldFTdiYA=) We’re launching our most aggressive early campaign yet – building the infrastructure to defend seats in Arizona, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Nevada, and flip key battlegrounds like Georgia, Ohio, and Iowa. But none of it happens without your support. name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: It’s official: I’m running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
Together, we’re going to flip Texas blue | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70819?t=3&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9) Y’all, it’s Jasmine.

I’m reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: [**I’m officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70819?t=4&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)

Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I’m not launching this campaign to play nice. [**I’m doing it to fight — because Texas deserves someone who doesn’t back down when the bullies come for her._It deserves someone who fights back._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70819?t=5&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)

But to win this race, we’ll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. _And to be blunt, that won’t come cheap._

[**That’s why I’m asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I’m counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue. Will you answer the call by splitting a donation between my campaign and Fight For Reform?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70819?t=6&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9) | | [DONATE $5 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70820?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=7&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)
---
| [DONATE $25 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70820?amount=25&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=8&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)
---
| [DONATE $50 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70820?amount=50&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=9&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)

| [DONATE $100 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70820?amount=100&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=10&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)

---
Let me be clear: [**When there’s a fight worth having, I don’t flinch. I don’t shrink._I don’t back down._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70819?t=13&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)

Just ask the communities I’ve fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I’ve represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. [**I’m a lifelong fighter for justice.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70819?t=14&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)

So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he’s terrified of what I represent — and what I’m bringing to the Senate when we win this race: [**truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70819?t=15&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)

[**If you believe that insults won’t silence us — if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation — I need you. We’re launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That’s why I’d be so grateful if you could pitch in $10, $25, or more to help us hit the ground running. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Fight For Reform?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70819?t=16&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)
| [DONATE $5 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70820?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=17&akid=23706%2E4449941%2Eg5oKn9)

clean_body: Together, we’re going to flip Texas blue | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending Citizens United state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, Y’all, it’s Jasmine. I’m reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I’m not launching this campaign to play nice. But to win this race, we’ll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. And to be blunt, that won’t come cheap. | | | | | | | Let me be clear: Just ask the communities I’ve fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I’ve represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he’s terrified of what I represent — and what I’m bringing to the Senate when we win this race: | | | | | | Thank you, Jasmine | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035. Authorized by Jasmine for Texas. Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-federal will be used in End Citizens United Non-federal’s sole discretion and are not being earmarked for use in any particular state or election.

subject: 30 GOP retirements with another 20 on the way…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Another week, another round of Republican retirement announcements in Congress!
Members who once proudly branded themselves as Trump’s top allies are suddenly announcing they’re done, and these aren’t random departures – this kind of churn is a sign of a party in deep trouble.
Trump’s chaos, his unpopular “One Big Beautiful Bill,” and his new round of devastating tariffs have left Republicans staring down a brutal midterm map. They know their majority is hanging by a thread, and Democrats are energized and organized in every corner of the country.
Every open seat creates a new opportunity, and 2026 is shaping up to have a lot of them.
That’s why GOTV PAC is already investing early: identifying pickup districts and building the turnout infrastructure we’ll need to win back the House.
But Peter, we can’t scale this work without you. We need grassroots power NOW , not six months from now.
Will you chip in today to help GOTV PAC seize every new opportunity created by this wave of Republican retirements? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10082025]

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A few thoughts for you, if you have a minute
body:
In 1990, during Desert Storm, I was stationed on the USS Midway. I flew 39 combat missions over Iraq and Kuwait. I had a missile blow up next to my airplane, I was shot at dozens of times by anti-aircraft fire.
---
Derek, it’s been a weird couple of weeks. In 1990, during Desert Storm, I was stationed on the USS Midway. I flew 39 combat missions over Iraq and Kuwait. I had a missile blow up next to my airplane. I was shot at dozens of times by anti-aircraft fire. If you had told me before one of those missions that 35 years later, the president of the United States would call for me to be hanged, I would have said you were crazy. But that’s exactly what happened last month. Sadly, this is the kind of thing we’ve come to expect from this president. He’s a person who can live through the same year we have — rising political violence, escalating tensions, assassinations — and go on to wish death upon sitting members of Congress. Yes, it was concerning, but more than anything, it’s incredibly sad. I served 25 years in the Navy, launched into orbit four times, and ran for Senate because I love this country. To me, there is nothing more American than standing up for our Constitution. Donald Trump will never understand that. He’ll never understand putting service to this country before yourself. Trump and his allies are profiting off his presidency, while millions of people are wondering how they’ll afford their health care or how to feed their kids. He just doesn’t get it, and he never will. But that makes it even more important that people who do get it — people like you — stick together. That’s how we’ll get through this. There’s no telling what’s ahead of us. This is uncharted territory for me, for my family, for my team, and we have to be ready for anything. I wish I didn’t need to ask you to do any more than you already have, but today, that’s what I need to do. [**Can you split a donation between me and the DNC to help raise the resources we’ll need to stand against Trump and anything he throws at us?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-kelly-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20251208_5473_fr&refcode2=5473_22930333_RM4_oC&akid=5473%2E22930333%2ERM4_oC) **[MAKE A DONATION](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-kelly-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20251208_5473_fr&refcode2=5473_22930333_RM4_oC&akid=5473%2E22930333%2ERM4_oC)** Again, I can’t thank you enough. It really means the world to me. Mark

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

clean_body: Don’t miss your opportunity to rock WFP pride all winter long! | | | Last chance, Peter — Our new Eat the Rich and MTV Retro Tees are flying off the shelves. So don’t miss your chance to get yours — before they're gone! — Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team WFP Date: Fri. December 5, 2025 Subject: Update your winter wardrobe with new WFP merch Peter, ‘Tis the season to show off your values — in style. We’ve just added new versions of our Eat the Rich and MTV-inspired T-shirts to the Working Families Party store. Will you be rocking them this holiday season? Whether a WFP sweatshirt will be keeping you warm through the coldest months of the year — or you’ll be spreading holiday cheer with stickers, totes, and hats galore — there’s something in our store for you. And with massive victories nationwide this year and big plans for 2026, there’s never been a better time to show your loved ones that you’re a member of the party that works for working people. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: 🚨 We got the leaked polling data on the mayor's race
body:
Plus: Dem congressman says to feel sympathy for cartel runners | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e5de7b46eb&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |

It's the final hours before Albuquerque decides — and we just got our hands on leaked polling data that explains [why Mayor Keller reportedly can't rest easy](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=13672372c8&e=567664f14c).
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=80aaef7dc9&e=567664f14c)
| |
**🔥 $84,000 IN PANIC POLLING — EXPOSED**
Someone close to the Keller campaign has been spending big on polls since the first election. We dug into the public records and found the receipts.
What we uncovered tells you everything about where this race really stands — and why the mayor has reason to worry.
We break down the exact numbers, what they mean, and the one stat that should terrify Keller's team heading into Tuesday.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b40c385cff&e=567664f14c)
---
| | **🚨 DEMOCRATIC CONGRESSMAN WANTS SYMPATHY FOR DRUG RUNNERS**

While the military interdicts Venezuelan cartel boats, one congressman took to the airwaves to say Americans need to see "what it looks like when the full force of the United States military is turned on two guys clinging to a piece of wood."
Then we found old footage of Joe Biden saying the exact opposite. The hypocrisy is breathtaking. We show you both clips side by side.

**💰 GAS PRICES HIT LOWEST POINT SINCE 2022**

Finally, some good economic news — but the Trump team is fighting internally over how to message it. We reveal what the Wall Street Journal is reporting about closed-door meetings, and Scott Jennings offers the messaging frame Republicans should be using.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=77a3f3fa2c&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
**🦁 THE BIGGEST MOUNTAIN LION WE'VE EVER SEEN**
Mark checked the game cam at night and woke Krysty up to show her what walked past. This thing is an absolute unit — and it's closer to the cabin than we'd like.
You have to see this footage.
---
|

clean_body: Plus: Dem congressman says to feel sympathy for cartel runners | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | | | | | | | | It's the final hours before Albuquerque decides — and we just got our hands on leaked polling data that explains . | | 🔥 $84,000 IN PANIC POLLING — EXPOSED Someone close to the Keller campaign has been spending big on polls since the first election. We dug into the public records and found the receipts. What we uncovered tells you everything about where this race really stands — and why the mayor has reason to worry. We break down the exact numbers, what they mean, and the one stat that should terrify Keller's team heading into Tuesday. | | | 🚨 DEMOCRATIC CONGRESSMAN WANTS SYMPATHY FOR DRUG RUNNERS While the military interdicts Venezuelan cartel boats, one congressman took to the airwaves to say Americans need to see "what it looks like when the full force of the United States military is turned on two guys clinging to a piece of wood." Then we found old footage of Joe Biden saying the exact opposite. The hypocrisy is breathtaking. We show you both clips side by side. 💰 GAS PRICES HIT LOWEST POINT SINCE 2022 Finally, some good economic news — but the Trump team is fighting internally over how to message it. We reveal what the Wall Street Journal is reporting about closed-door meetings, and Scott Jennings offers the messaging frame Republicans should be using. | | | 🦁 THE BIGGEST MOUNTAIN LION WE'VE EVER SEEN Mark checked the game cam at night and woke Krysty up to show her what walked past. This thing is an absolute unit — and it's closer to the cabin than we'd like. You have to see this footage. | | | ✅ LIKE the episode on ✅ SUBSCRIBE to and hit the 🔔 for updates ✅ RATE & REVIEW us on ✅ DONATE to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 Thank you for being part of this community — real talk, real issues, and no spin. name: Voter Action Project
subject: This fight is about every elligible voter and their fundamental rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Donald Trump can't help himself, Team. He keeps openly talking about how every election-related move he makes is to benefit his party and to silence any dissent. That's why we have to fight for our fundamental right to vote.
If you're with us, we need you to RUSH $25 or more right now to defend ballot access and increase voter participation across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120825_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
This is the whole ball game, Team:
@JeffMerkley: Why does Trump want to ban Vote by Mail? Because it blocks Election Day interference: closing polling places, long lines, voter suppression. Vote by Mail is the best tool we have to put power where it belongs—in the hands of the people. I'll fight like hell to protect it. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120825_3&amount=25]
This is the whole reason behind President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order. After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day.
It's worth noting that Trump himself has used mail-in ballots to vote , most recently in an election in his now-home state of Florida.
This isn't about safety or security. It's a blatantly partisan exercise to suppress the vote and make it harder for you to have your voice heard in our elections. It's about their anti-democratic authoritarian desires and need for total control.
Team, we're fighting every day to protect vote-by-mail and increase participation in our elections. Help us protect our fundamental right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120825_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120825_3&amount=35]
We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections . Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.
Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. Mail-in voting has been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic. There's no good faith reason to get rid of it.
Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to fight their unending desire for control and protect mail-in voting? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120825_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmZjE4NDhhLTlhZDQtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RfuiEGlRHzQzNhAfLvIPlutzrJbA62oFEFBmNF5PSjM=] >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120825_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120825_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120825_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail. Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. Mail-in voting has been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic. There's no good faith reason to get rid of it. Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to fight their unending desire for control and protect mail-in voting? [=] >> [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: MAGA wants Jon defeated and gone. It’s up to us to stop them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
From day 1 Jon has fought relentlessly to root out corruption from our government.
#

Peter, when Jon talks about how the Trump administration is the _most corrupt administration in the entire history of our Republic,_ he’s talking about stories like this one:
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251208-1-full-b-nb&t=1&akid=1231%2E5691347%2E6v7y7a)
Or maybe this one:
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251208-1-full-b-nb&t=2&akid=1231%2E5691347%2E6v7y7a)
Or wait, was it this one?
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251208-1-full-b-nb&t=3&akid=1231%2E5691347%2E6v7y7a)
Honestly, the breadth and scale of corruption and self-dealing is so large that it’s hard to keep track. At some level, _that’s the point._ They want to flood the zone and make you feel so overwhelmed and demoralized that you give up.
But we can’t stop paying attention. Because the corruption we’re seeing out of this administration has _real consequences for Georgia, and for people all over the country._
_Corruption_ is why Republicans are defunding nursing homes and hospitals to cut taxes for the rich.
_Corruption_ is why you pay a fortune for prescriptions, and why your insurance claim keeps getting denied.
_Corruption_ is why hedge funds get to buy up all the houses in your neighborhood, driving you out of the market, and then your corporate landlord ignores your calls during a gas leak.
**It’s also why we need to ask for your help to power Jon’s campaign.**
Peter, Jon is MAGA’s #1 target not only because his race has been ranked a “TOSS-UP” by _Inside Elections_ or because the GOP knows that if they can flip this seat, they can lock in Senate control for the long-term.
Jon is MAGA’s #1 target because from day 1 he has fought relentlessly to root out corruption in our government and our politics.
**[MAGA wants Jon defeated and gone. It’s up to us to stop them. Please, use this link to donate $5 to Jon’s campaign.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251208-1-full-b-nb&t=4&akid=1231%2E5691347%2E6v7y7a)**
We are going up against a system that allows a single billionaire to spend unlimited amounts of money to influence our elections. That is a real challenge for our campaign.
And trust us, we are going to see a truly obscene amount of outside spending against Jon in this race. It will be the biggest and most important race in the country, full stop.
Peter, we know that $5 or even $10 can seem inconsequential in a race as big as this one. _But that couldn’t be further from the truth._
Not only do your donations help us begin the organizing and outreach that will win this race... every donation is a way to stand up and say “I see what is happening to our country, and I am ready to fight back.”
So here’s the part where we ask:
**[Can you please make a contribution to Jon’s reelection campaign today? Especially now, we need voices like Jon’s in Congress calling out and _fighting back_ against corruption, not another rubber-stamp for Trump and MAGA. ](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251208-1-full-b-nb&t=5&akid=1231%2E5691347%2E6v7y7a)**
Thank you!
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=6&akid=1231%2E5691347%2E6v7y7a) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1231%2E5691347%2E6v7y7a) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

Colorado shouldn’t be blue
A state built on faith, family, freedom, and the Second Amendment is being tested -- and its future will shape the country.

| | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bfa8def8fce84e0086028de457b17446&_e=wGW1zEBiJHdsM1ppChRsguleAg3kWb6GIhKHo8SmIqgtkAorFIeF8tvLwboF4cIbCC-qK3Ukmoj8J0BeDMcnzdhLisPiMFCoRXYREJNZY7cV8w8jX1P2l43Vhe3C_5aE2klix0617zHikijrFf2RH5gJBlNz-t64aXNvmBbZECE9DKCfEU1Rf_ZrK2wLFoBwYlG_9EHUr-v4Warnhty5rAD2ib6ig12OkQH8wz2HenVOmnmiP31A5USM2lPcI_1e-TvzrEK4uE_TMdMeKd9JJZ4ib-34d-4KjSmpMv1LEuYQL284_UiC9ppjnU1sI2LCFXh1OtmShl65Uc4mjK62B9NqaPzMZrhhTbQpLHXBqq1MAaPJM8Gv-QCDT5ZEdDvyeZvgPMPQhcrbSWTK466T_5Ee7inzoCTm3wIsMzs0oBhLHAlf09002ontgce_2b2iuts-g_VypN0IMtmTUb9RT6L0K4bxNpKgUGwAeT0gkqvU-74H4_S3Q2qpuIUwZNErEqXZiHkFfm81mMZC_NDdQ3-kuHasPG3ViydT6IhtFimReUQjdWsakrEP3qTVk7GVlI97sfdepOtDBk0I16ERkUuFyumvyTm24aykY1izAKI%3D)

| | Friend,
---
| | If this is the first time you're hearing from me, let me introduce myself. My name is **Victor Marx** -- a husband, father, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and founder of an international humanitarian organization that has carried out more than 150 high-risk rescue missions around the world.I've spent my life stepping into the chaos most people run from, fighting for those who can't fight for themselves.
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bfa8def8fce84e0086028de457b17446&_e=wGW1zEBiJHdsM1ppChRsguleAg3kWb6GIhKHo8SmIqgtkAorFIeF8tvLwboF4cIbCC-qK3Ukmoj8J0BeDMcnzdhLisPiMFCoRXYREJNZY7cV8w8jX1P2l43Vhe3C_5aE2klix0617zHikijrFf2RH5gJBlNz-t64aXNvmBbZECE9DKCfEU1Rf_ZrK2wLFoBw8Lst8f_UqSOOGyKdMOKxCmEcg2VUYdlEHofqvkRz1DXHr_mQjeRqgEDn3uEiLvACRYkznOJdS5BOqobMSW84DJHHcqkZmDpa0ofu0zyUd8M9tnoSSDoprXgoZ7EcX2IGPC3rGTZkfCHxhpNU6qjL2YHwngMNRinGJwTVi8-FvQ5K5uGfdISDPykEeQ8bD-WQTU7jm3Rw_VGLEaGP8yQ8BKTWzoyJkFhvE72El_XYCXQpp72Z54ldMOZz2aD2Sf3Yhy8zDYrCRY-jNHt16KnTWu4kgwVXVouYHddCb0g2W_ZdN2tP5pQ0JByQXe4JTZn8Z9HTwX9M1SC8jIshEwGhaHf0PSXsgA3_MXeaovn93wJoRS859JYWhlOV9i98t8dgoQJRgWTYRvAV_yQnmQUZvXR9pNRwTcRnuPsE38Lo2m4%3D)
---
**_I never expected to run for Governor of Colorado..._** But people I respected deeply -- _including Charlie and Erika Kirk_ -- believed in me and urged me to step forward because they saw what was happening here in our state.After Charlie was killed, Erika reminded me that he believed this was a fight I was meant to take on.**They were right, and I am now fully committed to winning this fight.**[_**Today, I am asking you to join me...**_](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bfa8def8fce84e0086028de457b17446&_e=wGW1zEBiJHdsM1ppChRsguleAg3kWb6GIhKHo8SmIqgtkAorFIeF8tvLwboF4cIbCC-qK3Ukmoj8J0BeDMcnzdhLisPiMFCoRXYREJNZY7cV8w8jX1P2l43Vhe3C_5aE2klix0617zHikijrFf2RH5gJBlNz-t64aXNvmBbZECE9DKCfEU1Rf_ZrK2wLFoBwrD1BcFLR3H-7mQUopuy0zN_W-EHERB9COstbQ6cfVB8vH9iSvtmKs_7p3AUJWzq6lP1IgGFVq74ZgOu-SiNoWoqXpJYR6NPEg0c3kxvgEyDG6CUr0oHe-1ITyolGUaAhUlUF41PlyjzXMwoyC9YWkTE29UEBmt4lL9uqRnFbOnt8wi9MinRpKjp2hpB_VN1EU_pF5Ev7L_4f6MnTA2x10nwyoMRhggvp3WMMwoPCTFCtoCoNT4FRp_rSWvl7G3y9Difttn5lxlRr6AD48A9VpTYv9FNoxztYei6dySceE1zu_FZINaxaAmuIpe1EsvMnBdINorcWuCEBS9YWAhcLhth2VzLugNgCPdlQtX8GSlZEV5c3H28MYuCV3icWGk6Kde_x1bByiysEEJZeZBnvVSOVruq5xunuzSSsUXGiQx8%3D)
---
[ **ARE YOU IN? JOIN VICTOR!**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bfa8def8fce84e0086028de457b17446&_e=wGW1zEBiJHdsM1ppChRsguleAg3kWb6GIhKHo8SmIqgtkAorFIeF8tvLwboF4cIbCC-qK3Ukmoj8J0BeDMcnzdhLisPiMFCoRXYREJNZY7cV8w8jX1P2l43Vhe3C_5aE2klix0617zHikijrFf2RH5gJBlNz-t64aXNvmBbZECE9DKCfEU1Rf_ZrK2wLFoBwzDot9K4RczsA-cFPmY-5l9B1jliJAYzskfQhdMt-_QXidIkEgmSDBjY46qClRs4SypIXJDWlCQ2vDTyQDUJKgcu_8IlVKSxSJYKn47cj9uPXKuseskbymv2AbJ3xVtdLaTuoPDMwVDCDuAtNv1ioizcC-wpdFsRbR6QPnxqHhLDqOpGPp_4Ih9INPxFNgc52P8VAFc9aRTdZ7-W9eKtTBH7AYNQqhJvNTWCZ7juujN98IIgy6MOgcSWd2QCdizw7j2IEfyWcBHI9WHdEf9me_4t2lewBsfJmsDCasNsD4hXLlaC1TWZrHfe4mF4Ve7ie46n6uePZhYRFGJPosdcdfWQoo-G0XAz-ZbsVYGIccN70NmUSEjyaPBcj8PoBUb0yW3_UcLvpG2_ZVn-j2ikBxHKEh3rMHQ8ZoIUxPcRhlUQ%3D)
---
Because here's the truth most people outside our state don't realize: **_Colorado SHOULD still be a_**** _red_**** _state._** Colorado was built on independence, limited government, faith, family, and the unshakeable belief in the Second Amendment. Those values run deep in our history and in our people.But over time, the political establishment and a flood of left-wing ideas have overpowered the very values that made Colorado strong. We've watched our state shift from red, to purple, to blue -- not because the people changed, **but because leadership failed them.**_And that failure matters far beyond our borders._ Colorado has become a testing ground for policies that spread nationwide -- soft-on-crime agendas, government overreach, attacks on faith, restrictions on constitutional freedoms. **If we stop that tide**** _here_****, we stop it from sweeping across America.**
---
[ **JOIN VICTOR!**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=bfa8def8fce84e0086028de457b17446&_e=wGW1zEBiJHdsM1ppChRsguleAg3kWb6GIhKHo8SmIqgtkAorFIeF8tvLwboF4cIbCC-qK3Ukmoj8J0BeDMcnzdhLisPiMFCoRXYREJNZY7cV8w8jX1P2l43Vhe3C_5aE2klix0617zHikijrFf2RH5gJBlNz-t64aXNvmBbZECE9DKCfEU1Rf_ZrK2wLFoBwi_O7kEj4UrLr_fOHiWS7nGXo4s61J-bkU9hH5BFFmOsIBq-OYuzeIdFz_mwjfgOzanKqSli-EwDegNvYFXs6DL2JHx4y94id2krWA-LGVUuoUiBwIKpBPq0poOVIfLbU4jXm40BmvlpRoTQ9IJ3dypOdvMbmOhL5lTVhRUznhmY68P_RfBhMWbs1n8wMfSbGUZmB9yXGmRD0FBcqzPLpL632PW47xCqoeguyjvaW3t7-H4s8SW7q5iD5ZELNLcV2OhFUx_uD0lPWxDtsNFk50IqWxyjXvX4Vc-3L5O9D95yBrxiYiBZXou5L1oQa1mSu29GmCMWehJe3RpPQ3KazWeHi7FlBw4ig0PATO73TQY8FkKSmELEmHr2u0LRsZ_EV1nPsyE6O9MOTQBVFPfWgf0RckCdqXK8Oks8zPgumYo0%3D)
---
That's why this race is so important. **If Colorado flips back, the entire country will feel it.** It will prove that conservative, constitutional values aren't fading -- _they 're rising again!_ **Our state and country has too many politicians** , so instead, I'm asking you to stand with ME - a Marine, pastor, humanitarian, and Patriot - to ensure we have leaders who will fight to uphold and protect our values and freedoms. clean_body: Colorado shouldn’t be blue A state built on faith, family, freedom, and the Second Amendment is being tested -- and its future will shape the country. | | | | | Friend, | | If this is the first time you're hearing from me, let me introduce myself. My name is Victor Marx -- a husband, father, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and founder of an international humanitarian organization that has carried out more than 150 high-risk rescue missions around the world.I've spent my life stepping into the chaos most people run from, fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. I never expected to run for Governor of Colorado... But people I respected deeply -- including Charlie and Erika Kirk -- believed in me and urged me to step forward because they saw what was happening here in our state.After Charlie was killed, Erika reminded me that he believed this was a fight I was meant to take on.They were right, and I am now fully committed to winning this fight. Because here's the truth most people outside our state don't realize: Colorado SHOULD still be a red state. Colorado was built on independence, limited government, faith, family, and the unshakeable belief in the Second Amendment. Those values run deep in our history and in our people.But over time, the political establishment and a flood of left-wing ideas have overpowered the very values that made Colorado strong. We've watched our state shift from red, to purple, to blue -- not because the people changed, but because leadership failed them.And that failure matters far beyond our borders. Colorado has become a testing ground for policies that spread nationwide -- soft-on-crime agendas, government overreach, attacks on faith, restrictions on constitutional freedoms. If we stop that tide here, we stop it from sweeping across America. That's why this race is so important. If Colorado flips back, the entire country will feel it. It will prove that conservative, constitutional values aren't fading -- they 're rising again! Our state and country has too many politicians , so instead, I'm asking you to stand with ME - a Marine, pastor, humanitarian, and Patriot - to ensure we have leaders who will fight to uphold and protect our values and freedoms. This is our chance to send that message. This is our chance to restore a state that should never have been lost.And this is the moment every patriot -- in Colorado and across America -- should care about. If you're just learning about me today, I hope it's the beginning of something bigger. Because this movement isn't powered by mega-donors or coastal elites -- Thank you for standing with me! For Colorado. For America. Victor Marx Conservative for Governor of Colorado | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY VICTOR MARX FOR GOVERNOR Registered Agent: Gregory Carlson | | P.O. Box 156 Florence, CO 81226

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Justice Department for Special Counsel Jack Smith Emails on His Targeting of Donald Trump
body:
(Washington, DC) – Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for the emails of former Special Counsel Jack Smith with officials in Georgia and New York and with the White House, congressional and law enforcement offices regarding his investigation into President-elect Donald Trump (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:25-cv-03849)).

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 8, 2025
---|---|---

name: Team Kelly
subject: The Secretary of the Navy will deliver a report to Pete Hegseth by Wednesday.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Team —
We know you probably didn’t wake up this morning and think to yourself, “I am going to donate to Mark Kelly today,” but that is exactly what he needs you to do.
If you have a minute, let us explain why.
Hegseth directed the Secretary of the Navy to deliver him a report by Wednesday on what they will do to Mark — whether they will recall him to active duty and court-martial him.
It’s completely unprecedented, it’s absolutely ridiculous, but that’s what is going to happen.
All we can do in response is be ready when that report hits.
Mark launched an emergency fundraising drive earlier this week, and we’re humbly asking you to make a donation to help us hit some pretty steep goals before December 10th.
[**Please, chip in $5 or whatever feels right for you. It goes directly towards defending Mark at a time when he really needs us.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251208-2-1mil&t=1&akid=6283%2E6688874%2EskdFPN)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CHIP IN $5](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.9Ua3bC&amount=5&refcode=em251208-2-1mil&t=2&akid=6283%2E6688874%2EskdFPN)**
---
****
| **[CHIP IN MORE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.9Ua3bC&refcode=em251208-2-1mil&t=3&akid=6283%2E6688874%2EskdFPN)**
---
****
Thank you so much,
Team Kelly

clean_body: Team — We know you probably didn’t wake up this morning and think to yourself, “I am going to donate to Mark Kelly today,” but that is exactly what he needs you to do. If you have a minute, let us explain why. Hegseth directed the Secretary of the Navy to deliver him a report by Wednesday on what they will do to Mark — whether they will recall him to active duty and court-martial him. It’s completely unprecedented, it’s absolutely ridiculous, but that’s what is going to happen. All we can do in response is be ready when that report hits. Mark launched an emergency fundraising drive earlier this week, and we’re humbly asking you to make a donation to help us hit some pretty steep goals before December 10th. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | ** Thank you so much, Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Deb Haaland
subject: It shouldn’t be this hard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Every family deserves to have a fair shot.| |
---
| | Hey Peter — it's Deb Haaland. When I think about the holiday season, I think about the parents who are putting on a brave face for their children while they try to make ends meet. I know that feeling well. About fifteen years ago, my child and I were struggling. The only food in our cupboard was pinto beans and flour, and I wanted to give them a real holiday meal. I applied for emergency food stamps, but I was denied. I broke down in tears because I didn’t know how to tell my child: It’s expensive to be poor. That night, we ate what we had, and I tried to keep their spirits up. **This year, many families are doing the same thing, trying to stay strong for their kids even when things feel uncertain. It shouldn’t be this hard.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120884734/587712481/1213828012?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-12-08_DEH_HL_ES-37096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQ5NWY0YS05ZmQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0taJFS4S0mBzdjWv8ZqMKaPrfEiaXlmU5e-wRfdZxI=)

Peter, these moments shaped who I am. It’s why I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks and affordable, healthy food to eat. [**This campaign is about giving every family in New Mexico the fair shot they deserve. If you’re able, will you split a donation of $25, or anything you can, between Zoe Lofgren****and our campaign to help us keep New Mexico moving forward?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120884735/587712482/1213828012?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-12-08_DEH_HL_ES-37096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQ5NWY0YS05ZmQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0taJFS4S0mBzdjWv8ZqMKaPrfEiaXlmU5e-wRfdZxI=)

I know the fights we face today are bigger than ever – and I’m prepared to get to work immediately. On Day One, I will begin tackling the rising affordability crisis and healthcare costs, so we can build a state where every single person is safe, healthy, and can thrive. But I can’t do this work alone. Our grassroots-powered campaign was built for the people, by the people – and that includes you, Peter. [**So please, can I count on you to split $5, $25, or whatever you can comfortably spare between my campaign and****Zoe Lofgren****to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in New Mexico, and build a better future for working families?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120884737/587712484/1213828012?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-12-08_DEH_HL_ES-37096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQ5NWY0YS05ZmQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0taJFS4S0mBzdjWv8ZqMKaPrfEiaXlmU5e-wRfdZxI=)

#### _**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/683bfdaf-8c18-483b-950f-c559be4273e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/683bfdaf-8c18-483b-950f-c559be4273e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
Sarah Matthews from _Home of the Brave_ jumped in with me to unpack Trump's $12B farmer bailout, the affordability "hoax" nonsense, and the terrifying escalation of ICE violence against Congresswoman Grijalva. We kept it honest, sharp, and personal.
Here's where we go:
* [**00:01:44**] How Trump caused the farm crisis he's now "fixing," and why rural communities are exhausted by the whiplash.
* [**00:08:40**] Sarah on Republicans panicking over the affordability hoax line -- and how it sets up brutal 2026 ads.
* [**00:21:35**] A quick update on building our new studio before diving into ICE pepper-spraying Rep. Adelita Grijalva.
* [**00:28:55**] Sarah calls out the cruelty of ICE's tactics and why they betray both Christian and American values.
* [**00:37:15**] What real public servants look like -- and why more candidates need to answer the basic "why you?" question.

If you care about the gap between what politicians say on TV and what people feel at the grocery store, if you're angry about ICE acting like a kidnapping force, and if you still believe we can build a better coalition on both sides that actually solves problems, this conversation is for you. If you value honest, unvarnished conversations like this, help me keep them going.
**[Become a paid subscriber to Endless Urgency today»](https://substack.com/redirect/683bfdaf-8c18-483b-950f-c559be4273e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Parler Sponsor
subject: Could Your RMD Strategy Be Costing You?
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://view.parlermailer.com/?qs=95c90865e153e53670c910d726b970ab8d7156150570d101fd49aee5e5f391a9ecfb7028e30e9ab09d2c8b4a50974c1aa04a8dcafe85cb65adfc4007ed350813cc12a1c4c6ce560fb7f4d84858115404 "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Allegiance Gold
* * *
| **[It's RMD Time Again.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=9227ac6e5c54c42557d82de9a74fdf1fdb3b8f2a2ee8b847cdd4451783840dbe8f2f4bec57126bcbbba497acd26cf8d3fc0206640fe91a8f02cf4d6075e3d0f7)** **Imagine opening your retirement statement this year...** And realizing that a simple decision - one most retirees never even think about - could reshape your taxes, your diversification, and even your long-term financial stability. Every year, Americans over age 73 are forced to withdraw **tens of billions of dollars** from their retirement accounts. And year after year, most people follow the same path: **Take the RMD in cash and move on.** Not because it's the best choice. But because no one ever tells them there's another way. **[The "Default" RMD Isn't Your Only Option.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=9227ac6e5c54c42557d82de9a74fdf1fdb3b8f2a2ee8b847cdd4451783840dbe8f2f4bec57126bcbbba497acd26cf8d3fc0206640fe91a8f02cf4d6075e3d0f7)** Financial institutions make it easy to withdraw cash. Too easy. But simple isn't always strategic. Taking your RMD in cash may:
* Increase taxable income
* Force you to sell assets at moments that may not
align with your plan
* Reduce the overall portion of your wealth that remains invested

And yet... **[There's an IRS-Approved Alternative Most Retirees Never Hear About.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=9227ac6e5c54c42557d82de9a74fdf1fdb3b8f2a2ee8b847cdd4451783840dbe8f2f4bec57126bcbbba497acd26cf8d3fc0206640fe91a8f02cf4d6075e3d0f7)** Few realize that **RMDs can also be taken "in-kind."** Meaning: instead of withdrawing cash, you can receive _certain assets directly_ without liquidating them first. No, it doesn't eliminate taxes. But for many savers, it may help them:
* Preserve their long-term allocation
* Avoid being forced to sell during volatile markets
* Strengthen diversification, depending on their strategy

It's fully IRS-allowed... but rarely mentioned in traditional planning conversations. **Before You Take Your Next RMD, Ask Yourself:**
* Do I know _most_ IRS-approved ways to satisfy my distribution?
* Am I selling assets when I don't want to - or at prices I don't like?
* Could an in-kind distribution align better with my long-term goals and risk tolerance?

For something you're required by law to take each year, understanding your options isn't optional - it's essential. **[To help you make sense of it all...](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=9227ac6e5c54c42557d82de9a74fdf1fdb3b8f2a2ee8b847cdd4451783840dbe8f2f4bec57126bcbbba497acd26cf8d3fc0206640fe91a8f02cf4d6075e3d0f7)** We've created a clear, simple breakdown of:
* Cash vs. in-kind RMDs
* How each method works
* Questions to ask before choosing
* What to discuss with your advisor

So before you take your next withdrawal, **[take a moment to get informed.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=9227ac6e5c54c42557d82de9a74fdf1fdb3b8f2a2ee8b847cdd4451783840dbe8f2f4bec57126bcbbba497acd26cf8d3fc0206640fe91a8f02cf4d6075e3d0f7)** Your decision today could influence your strategy for years to come. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=9227ac6e5c54c42557d82de9a74fdf1fdb3b8f2a2ee8b847cdd4451783840dbe8f2f4bec57126bcbbba497acd26cf8d3fc0206640fe91a8f02cf4d6075e3d0f7)

name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: She came looking for help You gave her hope
body:
Every day, women across America search online for answers.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm87cc7ctosv3djc08aqed0k3c3fdqu05pp44o9g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c9ge8o31cdh2bs)
---
Hi Advocate for Life, Every day, women across America search online for answers. They are scared, uncertain, and convinced abortion is their only option. That’s where **PreBorn!** steps in. Our Network Clinics across the nation provide **free ultrasounds** , **holistic** **compassionate care** , and the **gospel of Jesus Christ** to women in crisis. Because when a mother sees her baby for the first time, when she hears that heartbeat, everything changes. In fact, 81% of women who receive an ultrasound, can see their baby and hear the heartbeat, will choose life for their babies. And your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and gives her the chance to meet her baby and hear of God’s love for her. As our thank-you, we’ll send you PreBorn!’s [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures_ 2026**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z39et6huk21ao328nh54k93phvsm8ua9p28sq1g0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c9ge8o31cdh2bs) Calendar — a celebration of the lives your gift helps save and the futures your faith helps build. Inside, you’ll also find a **monthly prayer guide** to keep you connected to this mission all year long.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5bed1gdg9qvn9r6lk8rhfelo2td2tcgk170lt4g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c9ge8o31cdh2bs)
---
Supplies are limited so give today to help reach the next mother before she’s too late to hear her baby’s heartbeat.

# **[Trump gives American farmers $12 billion boost to overcome inflation, trade wars](http://trk.libertyledger.-Eev5lXnZoM9HeIrWA)**
---
President Donald Trump will unveil a significant investment in America’s agricultural industry, the White House confirmed on Monday.Trump will be joined by Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins, and members of Congress at a roundtable event on Monday to announce $12 billion in economic assistance to United States farmers.'Our farmers ... will have the support they need to bridge the gap between Biden’s failures and the president’s successful policies taking effect.'The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s new Farmer Bridge Assistance program will receive up to $11 billion of the funds to provide one-time bridge payments to farmers of row crops, which include corn, soybeans, wheat, rice, and cotton.

name: Unite4Freedom
subject: Help Us Bring Light to Washington, D.C. this Holiday Season
body:
Unite4Freedom is shining a light on election truth this season.
|
---
Dear Peter, Unite4Freedom is shining a light on election truth this season! As we enter the heart of the holiday season, most people are slowing down. But at Unite4Freedom, things are accelerating—fast. We are fully engaged with officials in Washington, D.C. Harry and members of our leadership team have been asked to return to Washington, D.C., where they’ll again brief key members of the administration, executive branch agencies, and critical congressional offices. These conversations matter. They’re where our data, our research, and your concerns are placed directly in front of people with the power to act. If you’ve ever wondered how your voice finally reaches Washington...this is it. This is how we shine a light into places that desperately need it, and it’s already happening! But these trips aren’t funded by grants or government programs. They’re funded by generous people who believe in fixing our elections—people like you. Please help us keep that voice strong. Your holiday gift ensures we can continue representing Unite4Freedom’s work at the highest levels.
---
| [ **Contribute to Our Efforts** ](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVQxNw7KQdMxN5pbbmKdKLxPW2x7JLQ5GS_fPN1CRsZR3m2nnW7lCdLW6lZ3nnW5vqDyt2sDnt8W2n_0HN8-J0VcW4yGJBr304pJ-W1_6TMG7XWx33VP6rsS5DwfgCW60slbW3rvsk3W7K3S947hLvpHW1ydh0T4T3T6TW1t95cS2_f5prN8df1QkRSzL4N1F9QJf-_GcpV_MC154qb9KcW93pr0f33nVrKW6mZ-Jv2F218mW2ZfKVN1jjySjN5X2LNzPWsVtW4ts-845JMxbkN3gK-kJGzh44W1KpvKQ6PHn7NW8pjrrZ7wgrFWW3sWnr-8pl47SW98Y6w02PL1CfW3dppZr45n2qDV6ZLKy5ymmF5f6Qc6Hs04)
---
We want to hear from you. What concerns or questions would you like us to raise? After you [donate](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVQxNw7KQdMxN5pbbmKdKLxPW2x7JLQ5GS_fPN1CRsZR3m2nnW7lCdLW6lZ3n0W57l2w48RHwNlN8xcNyvPWL_tVsy1pp8kh8pxW5q_bTT1c4KShW922lfk4YLLJVW12X7l12ppsdYW1Hw4FC4ML-h6N7zp_vfQXg-VW7M62Mf5fvj9lW5JZ2gj8VhZD5W14-QlN8hgc28V_dpyK2Dc1njW748Nsn1TzGBcW91ZzNy6mc9zlW4vV_nC7s1MptVDczKj2Gk0GBV98LLz5DcK2CW93BKzw8F0pRjW2KSq4t9jHXq4Vcj_vV797s7DVMcX5z27yHd8W2F7-Gx2RpPmfW7GBnj485fR0KW298Gnw4-c4rBf3cSQh204), please hit reply to share your thoughts.
---
|
---
Thank you, Peter! Your gift allows us to amplify your voice in our nation's capitol. Please keep a look out for future emails as we report back to you on the progress we are making to restore our elections. Unite4Freedom wishes you a very merry holiday season!
---
With Gratitude, Sheila Coombes, Director, [Unite4Freedom](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVQxNw7KQdMxN5pbbmKdKLxPW2x7JLQ5GS_fPN1CRsZx3m2nnW6N1vHY6lZ3lyW543MFc7MRSqtW6rXHkj53xzM5W37XTZ32SH1dcW596B-T10RW79W1dnDMz6hV-8cW12XmXw80Z6hbW37FqcV57tZMPW8Tyr6P96LG5wW2J8ZfC7qrg35W8ddZJH7_kKzHW6WfSM372077LW8PTYKr7cs-RXW63V0hJ1zg9W7W7m11J86sj5-PW96qPw21_xs7-VVDhfS2dnC0ZW8flcH46sd7lwVBDBHW2bhll6W78D5LJ59tpRbW2PNtyv6cpgZQW2xTTBt5pB9BqV3scdH2h1LjDf5xjkbC04)

body:
President Trump [announced a $12](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGunDAQBdCvgQ6Ex4ChcJGGbtOmRIM9XiYxNrK9i_bvI57eH7x6pLn33D-P9YHsOTx_40G6uLgGurKnUiitDtOBbE80__BJe8yFPW1s3QodDI2ApptXi-w_a19b7YiAZE1aqHEANfW9qHe9yXkwCFJOsxGdQxhBCpLkDFmhNlGzvr8J6GYhOgWixRE21Q9D5yZp-kFVfUeWS0zt38ih7OT8J74ptSYetdd7KWeu5K8KlgqW67rasJlbcd8rWLZX5kA5V7CQiSEenwqWkl7H2dxASrlBts23sjE7B2ySCQi9mqepTtqeF3vPebyrPA9k_xVdfrTXW8P_AAAA___W6n9P) billion aid package for farmers on Monday, calling it "bridge payments" to help producers weather the impact of his tariff policies.
