# Tuesday, December 9, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1965, the [Charlie Brown Christmas special](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQRU8DHcg2YKBwkYZu06ZEgz1eT2IwsidL9vbR5gqpv_Tf0_u4rTegSMf9HXY07NN64FUiMmNePeQdyJ1gv-COIRWmiBs5vyqhhkaqRsyrA4rPta-d8YgKuxqNHPWgxqnvZR2M84NGITrcJt1BJyRIvblJaDcN8zzLmszrTSoxSylGJVvQahv7YRB-6mw_jFUv0BGn3H4mOjigj8_0wNzatNfRBOazVN1bpZZKLdd1tYEKp_x87ZVaIDPZiKVSiw2QI2Gz5XQdjQ2ZCu9Qmu8Df060jK6xEUohW2fjzotipKJfAvcdKP4B-V-VHkb9BgAA__8dPHzu) made its TV debut, breaking several TV rules along the way: It featured actual kid voices, a jazz piano soundtrack, and a reading from the Bible about the birth of Jesus. All of these elements worried CBS executives, but viewers adored it, making it a perennial classic. Between wrapping gifts and wrapping up the year, your brain might be running on low battery. As we report below in _The_ _Holiday Section_ , doctors recommend a [few small tweaks](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb_G7ohgAOMUFNu4y7ZbWhMz2LOLTQQkkf9-lSe9L3jt1dW9R-fPbb4hJz7W37iTbzHPB71rotaozBHLjhweuPzDlbZcGye6c4gzSLBCgZDXOSCnczZ98JEISPfklRssuNEY1W9-CSBHgvtVjzaY4KIbJMAQtcOgrcae_WdNgbwqJR2oCw5wd8ZaGUe9GOs6Iylwy-XyN_PRNorpzC8qlyXvffJba4_a6V8dTB1MBz1LTnk9c4y80KfTwYTiO-faqlifHEi0LFDUVqhWEQuR2HLigKeohDUfHUx98eHx5pS4Dh-MdUdOX7ftR65eHv4HAAD__ylbftw) that can make a big difference. 🎄 If you’re still hunting for the right gift, _[The Flyover Christmas Guide](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7FyhCAUheGnkW4duIBoQZHGbtOmZBAuehMUR8nu7NtnTJMHSH3OfDP_x93dPWXa5ne_oq2puA2fZ8Za8XDJH6unuPvw5Wdcylkp40QxOeCgbwJufHDRU345xaJNiICSoRWm02B6pQRbrOFJy8i5TFyqLvSdGsIEfe_VNGCQgZG9NAF8EIIbEK3vYDJKa556GZQ2jeIYqZaj_Sy01QVTfpUHHm0oK8t2qXU_G_nWwNjA-DfPlOr8TRGvXwMjO2zcn5Qznd1lzqun_GvUf4U_LPwEAAD__2Q3a-s)_ is the easiest place to finish your list. 🎁 Later today, we’ll send you a quick [Brad’s Deals](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkr2OnjwQha_GdH4FxvwVFN-nV3SbNiUaPANM1sbENovI1UdsoiRbRml9jh4fPZrPL-MLsOVt-QSO-jT7caMzWkqJwjhDcMC4g3mFhVYfE1uaGOdR5aqShZJ5NyKwvUadYT8TKSoz6oumrlTTal1ka1_nnWknQ21NZsa804iTagyq1lRatzrj_qYVKu-KIm9U8YBaTY2uqnxuS6OrRuickJMPjy-et7TSbC__RuFhvMtsv6a0R1H-J9Qg1HCe52MKgBEJbLwrQg2T9YtQQ5FLcPDNb3IP7EhOtNHMKcrLH9LBJTef5OvmTwmTP5IohyO5MfojGBLl8_fPEhMIVYPbRfn_3XGEfDhRPpHjbuH6EBpwO_CyifL5lwt-KJa3n19EMzK-k7o_HsF8HZ1HsPfMcNCHYIWACyT6mWWhx_1kaznWt9vFAdt3l-mfDuCtV98DAAD___l3xn4) roundup of Amazon Prime perks you might be missing this holiday season. If you’ve ever wished your generosity could stretch even further, today's sponsor, [Convoy of Hope’s Matching Challenge](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O2zAQRk9DdTLEISnaBYtFDHdOm1IYk0NpEv4IEu2Fbx8o2Jxg2-8BDw_fr_t0R05c5p-YybVYp0Kfe6LWaJsibhk5rOj_4ExL3RsnenCIEwxgegn9cJkCcnpPugsuEgGpjpy0owF71lp2i_MXM-pB2mjwYoMedXwECmClNudwBt-xO2wShouUgwV5whEeVhszxLPy2lihBwrc6nb6Xbm0hWJ61xdtJ19zl9zS2roL9SHgJuDma3nVd41LXelUt1nALWPzC5iDq9uz5Wmvz82TUNcvkYDxmDMFfmahroFnbph6DF_EY16R5yLU9cfHvR-OTPuf1dKoNKGuBRvXgqkvqdtcWD85Jd7Ho3_OyOlfb_vWyS8HfwMAAP__93OQbQ), lets every dollar you give right now be doubled to feed hungry families and bring hope around the world.

## Trump Sets $12B Farm Package
President Trump [announced a $12 billion](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGunDAQBdCvgQ6Ex4ChcJGGbtOmRIM9XiYxNrK9i_bvI57eH7x6pLn33D-P9YHsOTx_40G6uLgGurKnUiitDtOBbE80__BJe8yFPW1s3QodDI2ApptXi-w_a19b7YiAZE1aqHEANfW9qHe9yXkwCFJOsxGdQxhBCpLkDFmhNlGzvr8J6GYhOgWixRE21Q9D5yZp-kFVfUeWS0zt38ih7OT8J74ptSYetdd7KWeu5K8KlgqW67rasJlbcd8rWLZX5kA5V7CQiSEenwqWkl7H2dxASrlBts23sjE7B2ySCQi9mqepTtqeF3vPebyrPA9k_xVdfrTXW8P_AAAA___W6n9P) aid package for farmers on Monday, calling it "bridge payments" to help producers weather the impact of his tariff policies. The assistance includes $11 billion in one-time payments under the Agriculture Department's new Farmer Bridge Assistance program, with the remaining $1 billion reserved for specialty crops not covered initially. Trump stated that [the money would come](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQhZ_GdEb2YNZQuLgN3d42JRrsMUxifmScRfv2EXmF1Ef6zjnfx3N8Iife5v-4kitxHze6zkSlUB4j5hU5HOi_cKZlPwsnmjjEERS0UoNU_RiQ03s0VXCRCKipyGn7aMF2xuhqcTR1Sk99jx4MYdMAdbZTCnrrow9WV-xumgbVa60s6BofMFnTtip2jTetFUZR4LLn-nPnrSwU03t_Ua79vlbJLaUcp2j-CRgEDNd11X6b_B0KGG60gEGDgEF1AoaSv9dD3s8oS-QgS8ZAsmDmGE_pF96wXsqaquzCcXFKfD7uCfOKnH4ry588vRz8BAAA__90h3pY) from tariff revenue and will be distributed by Feb. 28, with payment amounts to be announced by the end of December. The program targets farmers earning under $900,000 annually who grow soybeans, corn, cotton, wheat, rice, and other crops hit hard by [the China trade](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL9GZLjQgAQECi4h86UXUgMambkViJLGdvnvt9hf2Liruvu9f_f5jhz5ePzFnZyENB_0LpFEKM8B847sT1y_8EFbKsKRFvZhhgZMraFuxtkjx8_cVd4FIqC2Iqd7a6Afuk5XmzN-GYINdl30utjBtoQUQC_gl340Y6jYXW0amlHrpgd9QwtL3xnThKFdO9OrriHPkvLtf-JDNgrxk16Ub2vaq-g2kbOo9o-CScEkG20c45UpmLa00wWkYEK_88FFMgqnQ8FkbDsYY2rJz_2sn8eLOJb6YqZcYylcBI-VFExVdv58c4xc7PXmsSP_LFTyK2UvB98BAAD__-_mgQc) war. Trump also promised to remove environmental regulations on farm machinery to lower equipment costs.
## Paramount Makes Hostile Warners Bid
Paramount launched [a $108 billion hostile](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFutDAQBeDTmM4rezB4KVz8Dd3-bUo04GGZrMHIOKy4feQoN0g30pM-vTcfj-GBHHh7_seVXJ7jsNH7CJQzpWHGtCL7HacXPmmJR-ZAI_t5AAWN1CBVN3jkcA2m8m4mAqorctq2Ddi7MbpanPX3TgMYau2IvjO6tR46bHxNdu5IVeyKpkF1WisL-oYtjNY0jZrv9WQaK4wizzmm22fkLS80hyuelG5TXKvglpz3Q9T_BPQC-hMTU75KJqAvsoA-nwL6MkxAv2PCNX5tWf4OkhlfVDw5spdvTFs5Uzyk52MqwSU11G2ram2LViXn9zeHwEdbyj1X5PBTJv_pg6eD7wAAAP__urKDnw) takeover bid for Warner Bros. Discovery on Monday, just days after losing the studio to Netflix in a months-long bidding war. Paramount CEO David Ellison's all-cash offer of $30 per share—$17.6 billion more than Netflix's cash-and-stock deal—went directly to shareholders after Warner Bros. repeatedly rejected Paramount's proposals. Unlike Netflix's plan to acquire only the studio and streaming assets, Paramount's bid includes [the entire company](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZCC7sYEJHFxCNpdeiNq4PfSNsRF4h52_X7HaP9i4pFdV7999uiNHTo-_uJItIU-JziNSKbRPAfcV2W84P_FBSz4KR3LswwQSTK2glrfJI8f3pCtvAxFQW5FVfWegH7RW1WINKekG0q2eu-EGoMhr58gYHHpsg67YXjQF8qaU7EE12IHrtTEyDO2sTS-0JM8l783_zKksFOI7v2hv5rxW0S6lbIdo_wgYBYzneTZzcvMVChgvtIBRgYBRDgLGDXdc80cq9fF8e0wz1T_Hase-Pp2vE5UQ-bNZyhqr3frt5Bj56K4hjxU5fheXX9l6WfgKAAD__46CfPo), meaning CNN, HBO, Discovery Channel, and TNT Sports would stay under one roof rather than being spun off. The financing comes from Larry Ellison and RedBird Capital, plus a $24 billion commitment from Middle Eastern sovereign wealth funds and [President Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OnDAQxp_GdEbYGFgKio0iUl2KpLgSDfZ4mTv_Qbb30L595ChvkGqkmdGn7_d7f9vegByFx0_wuBQbt4BXdlgKps1C8kDmBP0JDzxiLuRwJ2M32cmBC8m7eTNA7rWpxiwWUWLf4CKmcZDTTSnRHItGJadRdTeltBnmfQClZtPpUUxGgdENLTVNyG4WopukaGGU-6SGobO3XqthYqpDQyWm9iNSKAda94pfmFodfeOWo5Qzs_7O5Mrkel1X63OoNyZXDPyZmVx9DPhictXRnxAI6-4DEhr--cxHwMQp8xNS4dHWCT4-Q8n8HzPfyXAbE78g1ec9xcwNZV1r1FxI_H4Xv95_zJH1a9RkWP_9W9WKV_6N6WzSYs6LnKM8VqCHB3J_Acp_Wf9a5J8AAAD___7WmEw)'s Affinity Partners—all agreeing to forgo board seats and voting rights. Trump already [flagged concerns](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMhp8GuqDEhABFimvo5torkSHOkFtDUMjAztuvWO0bbPfJtqzv__89xgcGDtvzL65ks4_jRtfBlDOl0WNaMbgd5w980hKPHJim4PwIEhqhQMh-dBj4PerSWU8EVJdkVWsaaDutVblY3xOoztSTMT00RnamqWeja-2N7Dv0ZbD3NwWyV0q2oCo0MLW6aaTv6lk3baEluZBjqv7HsOWFPL_jSama41qyXXLej6L-U8BQwHBdV7VN853i3hcw3FjA8DrED-X0Wndx4PueZM_hU1yYNkpiSvEQjpDFnuLEtIorMIuwnZFPcgL3PcUTWaR5Q9BtD3WZrNvvq3CY2_S5YuBvs_yrOk8LXwEAAP__XuCKcg) about the Netflix deal's market dominance and said he would be involved in the approval process.
## Original _Star Wars_ Cut Finally Returns
Disney has announced that [the 1977 theatrical](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQhU8DnZE9YJstXKSh27Qp0YCHZRIDK3u0aG8fkSuk_fT0_r7u4x058f74xI2CLMe401kSiVAeF8wbcnzi_IMPWo8inGjiuIygwSoDSt_GiJzeY1fHsBABtTUF450F33edqdcw-Sm6yTgL0Dqv0WLba6vB9uB66KnmcLkZ0DdjtAfToIPJd9bqpW_nzvqq0xRZjtx8H7zLSkt6Hy_KzXxsdQqryLNU7UcFQwXDeZ5NEcwn5nIJKhiuRRUMF1UXVlbLqnDf-UW5YH4rWQkl84xJZUqEheoc4vPklLi4q8BjQ05_gfKvl14BfgMAAP__RcV71g) cut of _Star Wars_ will be released in theaters on February 19, 2027, to commemorate its 50th anniversary. The newly restored version features [the original unaltered](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO6yAQheGnsTsiGDDEBcVt0uW2W1pjM9izi00EKFH26VfeV9j6SOeT_o_7dEdOfKz_cSffYp4OetVErVGZIpYdOTxw-cKVtlwbJ5o5xAkkDEKBkOMUkNN7Mn3wkQhI9-SVswO4qzGq33yMVi8zBqdHHCEu2szWGgmLwRjNYHv255sCOSolHagLWpidGQYZr3oxg-uMpMAtl8tn5qNtFNM7P6lclrz3yW-tPWqn_3Vw6-C28veeQz63Dm61YREvLFXkwisfmMSTSuV8iEKFEmElAVJKO1qtXV98eLw4Ja72ZNcdOf0y7U9tnh5-AgAA__82q3fm) film—not the 1997 Special Edition with dated CGI additions and the infamous Greedo-shoots-first scene that controversially absolved Han Solo of any guilt in the cantina shooting in Mos Eisley. Director George Lucas has been adamant that this original version would never return, insisting the Special Edition "was the one I wanted out there." Fans have clamored ever since for a chance to see the 1977 version again. The limited theatrical release will come out a month ahead of [_Star Wars_ _: Starfighter_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAURp9GOwxcUbSg2MZutt3SXOGidxd1AswY334z8wp__SXfOTl_HvMDOfKx_sadbAnnfNCVI5VCaQ6YdmT_RPcPV9rOXDjSwj7MIKETCoQcZ48c71nX3gYioLYmq0zfgRm0VvVmO4M4Dg7coBVqg6Mkr0OvPSk5tk7WbD9vCuSolDSgGuxhMbrrZBhapztTaUmey5mavycfZaMQ7_NNqXHnXke7lfLMVfurgqmC6bquxi3frYIpF0ziwpTFmXjlA6NwryL4EGUjLJSyCLSkF6ZbgAQjOlk2gcfBb0oZ013BVCfrnxfHyLn_uKw7cvyyy4-CvS38DwAA__8kZn-C) starring Ryan Gosling, arriving March 28, 2027.

clean_body: President Trump billion aid package for farmers on Monday, calling it "bridge payments" to help producers weather the impact of his tariff policies. | | | | | | Tuesday, December 9, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1965, the made its TV debut, breaking several TV rules along the way: It featured actual kid voices, a jazz piano soundtrack, and a reading from the Bible about the birth of Jesus. All of these elements worried CBS executives, but viewers adored it, making it a perennial classic. Between wrapping gifts and wrapping up the year, your brain might be running on low battery. As we report below in The Holiday Section , doctors recommend a that can make a big difference. 🎄 If you’re still hunting for the right gift, is the easiest place to finish your list. 🎁 Later today, we’ll send you a quick roundup of Amazon Prime perks you might be missing this holiday season. If you’ve ever wished your generosity could stretch even further, today's sponsor, , lets every dollar you give right now be doubled to feed hungry families and bring hope around the world. | Trump Sets $12B Farm Package President Trump aid package for farmers on Monday, calling it "bridge payments" to help producers weather the impact of his tariff policies. The assistance includes $11 billion in one-time payments under the Agriculture Department's new Farmer Bridge Assistance program, with the remaining $1 billion reserved for specialty crops not covered initially. Trump stated that from tariff revenue and will be distributed by Feb. 28, with payment amounts to be announced by the end of December. The program targets farmers earning under $900,000 annually who grow soybeans, corn, cotton, wheat, rice, and other crops hit hard by war. Trump also promised to remove environmental regulations on farm machinery to lower equipment costs. Paramount Makes Hostile Warners Bid Paramount launched takeover bid for Warner Bros. Discovery on Monday, just days after losing the studio to Netflix in a months-long bidding war. Paramount CEO David Ellison's all-cash offer of $30 per share—$17.6 billion more than Netflix's cash-and-stock deal—went directly to shareholders after Warner Bros. repeatedly rejected Paramount's proposals. Unlike Netflix's plan to acquire only the studio and streaming assets, Paramount's bid includes , meaning CNN, HBO, Discovery Channel, and TNT Sports would stay under one roof rather than being spun off. The financing comes from Larry Ellison and RedBird Capital, plus a $24 billion commitment from Middle Eastern sovereign wealth funds and Affinity Partners—all agreeing to forgo board seats and voting rights. Trump already about the Netflix deal's market dominance and said he would be involved in the approval process. Original Star Wars Cut Finally Returns Disney has announced that cut of Star Wars will be released in theaters on February 19, 2027, to commemorate its 50th anniversary. The newly restored version features film—not the 1997 Special Edition with dated CGI additions and the infamous Greedo-shoots-first scene that controversially absolved Han Solo of any guilt in the cantina shooting in Mos Eisley. Director George Lucas has been adamant that this original version would never return, insisting the Special Edition "was the one I wanted out there." Fans have clamored ever since for a chance to see the 1977 version again. The limited theatrical release will come out a month ahead of starring Ryan Gosling, arriving March 28, 2027. subject: Trump’s Supreme Court helps TX wipe out 5 Dem seats

body:
The GOP has answered Trump’s call to take off the gloves and fight Democrats bare-knuckle, no rules and no refs. We have to fight back.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJhGrYFhQXdOvQTRnf8KUg-zruZRxi88HXzuIcQXLAXcus0EreVO4HszEar6ky8tE0SAEgrbL-mSMIIm9usiYkEEgWd-LyrRhFDVPHvLE0LI7GtP7SVFUT2mm84z-Zzuccgyq-ChSGe-EDg3qiKTmBrwqSYAc1rrqMm57hXmPsrn7ZvGBoak1AoKrJEcebEtbcKwrNAAY4fUJ7tBUBeqm_u47Ja70vUpD2KzTVrNDBY=&c=paycmoillrKCcLyEgV7xULFa-r1zkqgoCGtDW9fOaP4XF9v41cLErg==&ch=4gW5mhEjao-GFwcgvBs556Dlvrk7HNeWzG14Qi7gYoyxGsNMHAUvYg==)
---
Peter,
In a 6-3 partisan vote issued in the dead of night, the Supreme Court signed off on Texas's racist gerrymander -- clearing the way for Trump to wipe out 4-5 Democratic seats:
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJhGrYFhQXdOvQTRnf8KUg-zruZRxi88HXzuIcQXLAXcus0EreVO4HszEar6ky8tXcjblRjDluBre2mI84c0FExfbqvXcOKA4JhFai1W2VV8_qEKitQL2YnQLU8O9BojX_pA7fMXjM4yqigAasoCYyRZb75ij5VqsLfkLbn1dTfeDiqd_cluIMWEffx3JiRt1mY3Ix0BYP2Xg6HAbzLTQ_Ah8D5N8bceX02wTTf-I_Q=&c=paycmoillrKCcLyEgV7xULFa-r1zkqgoCGtDW9fOaP4XF9v41cLErg==&ch=4gW5mhEjao-GFwcgvBs556Dlvrk7HNeWzG14Qi7gYoyxGsNMHAUvYg==)
---
Peter, we won't beat around the bush. This is bad. The GOP has enthusiastically answered Trump's call to take off the gloves and fight Democrats bare-knuckle, no rules and no refs.
And to be honest, right now Trump is winning.
Here's MAGA's scorecard, and things are looking pretty ugly for Democrats:
✅ Completed: Texas. Missouri. North Carolina.
👉 Happening now: Indiana.
🔴 Coming soon: Kansas...and the big one: Florida.
But we can't curl up into a ball and give in to despair. That's what Trump wants us to do.
Instead, Dems need to get up off the mat, brush themselves off, and FIGHT.
Fair Fight Colorado is pushing forward with a ballot initiative that will let Coloradans decide on a new Congressional map to counter MAGA election rigging.
Colorado has four GOP members of Congress, but Republicans haven't won statewide since 2014. Democrats can easily gain two or more seats from redistricting--and can even kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress in the redistricting process.
[The Supreme Court has its thumb on the scale for Trump. Democrats will lose the redistricting wars and possibly the House unless blues states wake up and fight back. ## Crockett Enters Senate Race
U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett [joined the race](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb_GdEb2ECAULl5Dl9duiYw9hNkYjOxJSP5-BfsJW85c6eqe83UbbpYCrff_dkHD7ykOK-45IDOmIeNqGZN1mGf7wOdmxzEy530ABbXUIFU3eEvhM1wKb0blO12g0W1Tw1U3nSpmg66qdXfVvvEaWvRVB433tpp0PbV2dAWZo0yD6jQoDW3ZWKe8h1r5q66gqsVFoSeOqeQZGd82T-ETX5hKF5cimJl5y6L6J6AX0O_7Xk7xfVAcuYB-i4GYXBbQT4TJoeT0XDbp0vGW3zYvtKJ0KboHMsuTNcvnJme6zzLzef66kIeMIhm_7RQC5aYVF3VfLIVzDP9N4cvATwAAAP__zF2JaA) for U.S. Senate yesterday—the last day of the state's candidate filing period—ending months of speculation about her next move after the congressional redistricting plan approved by lawmakers this summer drew the two-term Democratic congresswoman out of her Dallas district. Prior to Crockett's announcement, former U.S. Rep. Colin Allred [bowed out](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOszAUhE9jOiP7YSAULtLwV_m12iYleuBHsNbYyDYhuf2K3SNsN9KMRvPN_Tbc0DrrH_9xJZ1fcxg8HclRzhSHRB4zRZwoLfhF-4bjGHJOxwACai6Bi24waN17UIXRozCdLEjLtqnhIptOFIueW6VQQTPX7SQrrFpFnWpRjmYWqqKusPoskyA6CUJCWzY4CWOgFuYiK6hqpgQZm0Ms80KZXphm9w5PiuUU1sLpJectserKoGfQH8dRrsmfHoOePN8Tg_6EYtBvwdlsp1NOwVnP0blIhpsYtsTDnnmY-S81P7H5YZ3jcfd8DpEvYU_ErU-Z0DDoMfLrVX7e_32MRdRmO8M2NS1T4rGidT_78t9efWr4DgAA__9E0I1i) of the Senate race and said he would run for the newly redrawn District 33 against Democrat Julie Johnson. Crockett's pastor, Frederick Haynes III of Friendship-West Baptist Church, announced he would run for her District 30 seat. Crockett is an outspoken critic of President Trump and has [gained notoriety](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFygzAQRL9GdDCnMwgoVKShc9qUzCGdjcYyYtDZ2H-fwfmE9Dtv9-3PeTxTiGG5ftOdrbwuaVx4z5FFeBszLyS8keM8040fK01TEsn7iIBNqbGEfvQU4nusC28n8L0u2OrWNNhp00MxWw2eDBK3k5kQXQ1AkzGXlgy0DZMvgj1gGqHXCBrbypAD77EB3-kTnhpVA_sgaatkZuEX5Ut8pydvlUv3ItpZZM3q9KVwUDjs-16tKQYJLh0BhcNhpHA4ahQOGhUO0Ckc3JbcjUVKWpb0WBzn8oMv_7zLKfgSwHTQQFNs1q97iDFk06oarncK8TNA_nfb0-JvAAAA___gKIAI) by tangling with her Republican colleagues. Earlier this year, she referred to Gov. Greg Abbott—who uses a wheelchair—as "Governor Hot Wheels." Crockett was [favored](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuS3CAQhk-DMlTQegcETsjWqUNVC1orPEiooHc1c3uXxkfY-K__9f35mD8wxHB8_sadDD_XNB90lUjMlOdCBzJldFQ2fNDXicuSmMs1g4JOapBqmj2G-JrbyptF-UlXZPTQdzDqflLVZmjpW1hWwKHpmpWQGu_U6Id-XXTn26EK5g7ToCYNSsNQ9-iU99ApP-oGmk60inzglGveiOmJZY2v9E25dmmvotmYzyKaXwKsAHtdV_0oyLcowN5vBNi3TYC9qwRYDQKsGgXYTKf8i2UPB0mXk3sQs6SDKRfpaU8uIwcnzxx2zC-5piy_ivwPRoCtsvHnFWIMpR9Eqz53DPG9i39G89vAvwAAAP__oQOJ3Q) by a plurality of Democratic voters in a recent poll and has more than $4.6 million in her campaign account. After Allred's exit, her primary opponent for Democratic votes is State Rep. ## Houston Losing Residents to Domestic Migration
Harris County saw a net loss of 31,165 residents to domestic migration between July 1, 2023, and July 1, 2024, according to a [Redfin analysis](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDluwzAQRU9DdRKGQ60FizTqnDalMBZHFhFqATkx7dsHyhXS_g_85X3dphv54PfHJ21s5bUc0845BRbhOCXeSTjSzGmlb_456X4_RFKeELApNZYwTI58eE914ewd3KALtrprG-x1O0CxWtMO1NcGZ-YOHXLXD0Z3NZgGkBbgwtsrTCMMGkFjV7U0g3PYgOu1QdOoGth5OWIlKwu_KC3hfTw5VvOxFcGuImdS5kPhqHDMOVeR3eL3y1Y4Xn8UjnPwGwmXm39EEn_sZWQKJSe51GuCwrGI1p3Zh-BT26kaHhv58Fcj_4PztPgbAAD__5FjeFI) of population changes in flood-prone areas nationwide. That figure was the second-highest behind Miami-Dade County's net loss of 67,418 residents. Approximately 31.3% of homes in Harris County are in areas designated as "high flood risk." While lower housing costs [attracted people](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u4yAURleDOyK4_JgUFNO4e9NOaWG4jtHDJoLr-GX3o8wWpv6kT-ecP1_zV8glH4_fYUdPP2udD7x6QSJsc8cjELYQsW_hG89nWJZK1K8ZBBgugYv7nEIu71kPyS8i3eWAXo7WgJP2LobNCzTWjU46N-pRoLLRGS2MHk1cFi1gyP5zJkHcJQgJ482GKFICI5KTCpRhWmDKVNuNNiT8CX0t7_rCdot1H4rfiJ6dqV8MJgbTdV23762en5HBFBrlWJDB9PFiMJUaQ2EwbaG13Hms50Fv3jCt-eB7feXjwetJfKtnp3owmMAZjkpqpVbNhVWWa71GvjiMPNho0DgrE-ih-fS8cim525Fp8dhDLv8Y6f_Kvjz8DQAA___kwYpz) to flood-prone areas during the pandemic, higher home prices and increased insurance premiums, along with political preferences and weather-related risks, have spurred outbound migration, according to the report. "_People are always nervous about flooding in Houston, but it's no longer the top concern like it was after Hurricane Harvey_ ," said Redfin Premier agent Roze Swartz. Overall, Harris County's population [still grew](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpiAQhJ8GMywYUdeA4BKzvfRCa4RRqUOwYP51_7e_cl_h4q--ru7-87l8Yogh7b_xJMvfW14S3TUSM5WlUkKmgo7qgX_pdeG6ZuZ6L6CglxqkmhaPIb4X03i7Kj_phqwehx4-9DCp5rAOQJvNdbh67AbtcDQGJr3122BgJdUE-4RpUJMGpWFsB3TKe-iV_9AddL0winzgXFo-iOkb6xbf-YtK6_LZRHswX1V0vwTMAub7vlt3lJweKmB-5giYj_yqnJP88QXMWDi4SA_BUkKVLr8Sv6XPJ1UOTp5hL8ghJ_moIe1yizl7CRqgH8G013E1xfrrDjGGOozCqP3EEH9a8f99-WXhXwAAAP__lUOKrQ) by about 100,000 residents between 2023 and 2024 due to international migration. In nearby Fort Bend and Brazoria counties—where 37.3% and 53.7% of homes are at high risk of flooding, respectively—domestic migration accounted for 10,467 and 7,382 new residents. Both figures from 2024 are lower than those from the previous year.

Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Crockett Enters Senate Race U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett for U.S. Senate yesterday—the last day of the state's candidate filing period—ending months of speculation about her next move after the congressional redistricting plan approved by lawmakers this summer drew the two-term Democratic congresswoman out of her Dallas district. Prior to Crockett's announcement, former U.S. Rep. Colin Allred of the Senate race and said he would run for the newly redrawn District 33 against Democrat Julie Johnson. Crockett's pastor, Frederick Haynes III of Friendship-West Baptist Church, announced he would run for her District 30 seat. Crockett is an outspoken critic of President Trump and has by tangling with her Republican colleagues. Earlier this year, she referred to Gov. Greg Abbott—who uses a wheelchair—as "Governor Hot Wheels." Crockett was by a plurality of Democratic voters in a recent poll and has more than $4.6 million in her campaign account. After Allred's exit, her primary opponent for Democratic votes is State Rep. James Talarico, who raised within a month of joining the race in September. Houston Losing Residents to Domestic Migration Harris County saw a net loss of 31,165 residents to domestic migration between July 1, 2023, and July 1, 2024, according to a of population changes in flood-prone areas nationwide. That figure was the second-highest behind Miami-Dade County's net loss of 67,418 residents. Approximately 31.3% of homes in Harris County are in areas designated as "high flood risk." While lower housing costs to flood-prone areas during the pandemic, higher home prices and increased insurance premiums, along with political preferences and weather-related risks, have spurred outbound migration, according to the report. "People are always nervous about flooding in Houston, but it's no longer the top concern like it was after Hurricane Harvey ," said Redfin Premier agent Roze Swartz. Overall, Harris County's population by about 100,000 residents between 2023 and 2024 due to international migration. In nearby Fort Bend and Brazoria counties—where 37.3% and 53.7% of homes are at high risk of flooding, respectively—domestic migration accounted for 10,467 and 7,382 new residents. Both figures from 2024 are lower than those from the previous year. Bowl Games Preview While Texas Tech and Texas A&M are headed to the , nine other Texas teams are scheduled to play in bowl games, and six bowl games will be played in the state. On Dec. 13, Prairie View A&M (10-3) will face South Carolina State (9-3) in the in Atlanta after defeating Jackson State to win the Southwestern Athletic Conference. On Dec. 18, Arkansas State (6-6) and Missouri State (7-5) will play in the in Frisco. UTSA (6-6) will play Florida International University (7-5) in the in Dallas the day after Christmas. On Dec. 27, San Diego State (9-3) will play North Texas (11-2) in the , and the University of Houston (9-3) will face LSU (7-5) in the in Houston. TCU (8-4) will square off against USC (9-3) in the in San Antonio on Dec. 30, and Texas (9-3) will meet Michigan (9-3) in Orlando's on New Year's Eve. Earlier that day, El Paso will host Arizona State (8-4) and Duke (8-5) in the . On Jan. 2, Rice (5-7) will face Texas State (6-6) in the in Fort Worth after more successful teams like Notre Dame (10-2) withdrew from bowl contention. The same day, SMU (8-4) will play Arizona (9-3) in the in San Diego. | Flying together with our sponsor Who loves this more than parents? Investors. A safer alternative to wisdom tooth removal is a parent’s dream come true. No more chubby cheeks, missing school or work, or risks of complications. However, with the market for wisdom tooth extraction worth $5 billion, . Meet . Their proprietary tech uses targeted heat to prevent wisdom teeth from ever forming. After ~1 minute per tooth, children can immediately eat, play, or return to school with no fear of pain. And it’s not just a win for parents. Dentists unlock revenue they previously had to outsource to oral surgeons. Next up? FDA clearance. TriAgenics’ goal is to make its revolutionary treatment the new standard of care by 2030. . | ➤ Austin: Gov. Greg Abbott warned school districts not to oppose efforts to establish TPUSA's Club America chapters in every Texas high school, saying the Texas Education Agency would impose "meaningful disciplinary action" on those that try to do so. () ➤ Tyler: The Longriders Motorcycle Club their 40th annual Toy Run on Sunday. In Waco, hundreds of bikers turned out for the 33rd annual Tri-County Toy Run. Organizers expect the events to provide toys to 500 kids in East Texas and 5,500 children in Bell, Coryell, and Lampasas counties. () ➤ Laredo: President Trump criticized U.S. Rep. Henry Cuellar, whom he recently pardoned for alleged bribery, for "Such a lack of LOYALTY" for Cuellar's decision to run for reelection as a Democrat rather than switch parties. "Next time, no more Mr. Nice guy!" Trump added. () ➤ Brownsville: A fire destroyed a building at the Palacio Real Apartments complex on Sunday, displacing an estimated 42 residents. The cause of the fire has not yet been determined. () ➤ Uhland: Mayor Lacee Duke is charged with a felony for alleged misappropriation of $250,000 in city funds. She was arrested on Wednesday and released the following day on a $20,000 bond. () ➤ San Antonio: A 33-year-old Marine Corps veteran died by suicide in the parking lot of the Audie L. Murphy Memorial Veterans' Hospital on Thursday. It's the second such death outside the hospital this year. () ➤ Austin: A coalition of food and beverage manufacturers has filed a federal lawsuit to invalidate a portion of a new state law that requires warning labels on products that contain one or more of 44 ingredients banned by other countries. [**And as parents, our hearts are heavy this Christmas.**](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/WZwfJaFsL9cWadMIzGvaPEsoz_therX_P8sOS2J2fYQN8GlLWqBJOa1FF9qC3UeYUKe4oefoa9Jm2H4CFlSjpBdiUh6CBz8eS0KNBi3gZGWbj-N7P15SpNuaCKsHTzDC_mWNzW5eNfhBhqmE3ZOFj25cj1r9EHGdErxqCQYRBbAT7Zn2UYsg3jUlh7PTIPOAzo7yHFzrjj_zHzGSJB2-CR2ZCM6NMSE2QI14cT_au6aiECOGGnk08T-e2M50c-R7ui9ydBG5tbf8knEVQ7ouZM_4m0NOvNYzRMsF1FNLoU9OEkidvhb5pZI9aJa0artqNK1cs7TGJ2thKv_bC1VXSyCDlCvahOkyTko40-gi_pSkDbaZwlZss6BHhFfZSSFUrEnHjG3g7lNDehwnaEbpzJXM7XhaUSSuaqieuHMrgS6dJzhL-GpUfD2-lBvBF8BevAw5o5tP1CrhtfdjRHhjE_yfXyj5gYHbMtXjO18HdZoCN9aPHf8zXtoGNkbk6uyxhGiJO4UmLpmPGKL31ajS_r6n318o_dylLtTV86Tish9z8EPPBr_ZmT6pg7L-xeLo7YWTNnDFXJArIvkoAlidI2uvHH0AJBoTK7PnnIHaNQNWHaYU-pDDf6N74t4AL8Nlpm8UMmyr1-UQK3jg4F0aYe3jVLejTtBTKteeO28IBd3V-u-vQfhMgw74CgnjfOxbYtvXCdv8Y4PBVNEVBT-Fn2VgpDVTNPyYxmFPorgTOzfe6-8CakL8DIjdf064w5ymAv4VyHkzZRqtNFE/0IKKQjF314VuqV4KzTJNOvRqx0XMxAtV/15)

This season usually fills our home with joy, family, prayers, and warmth.
But this year feels different.
_This year, our daughter Nancy is walking through fire._
**[And we have one Christmas wish, just one,_that we hope you’ll help us fulfill._](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/uiBhh_wvLoS3k5qlnvjwvdPZHpsXxW-ETf3q9Vnz4cOEME2OWNh251WLBZZyaZkA82hPjEZS9xYWbO8REVOqYVvRlLaQDPTwftJwh432pizFoiWKvFahsDCqAIbmT6Mo03xaXY4cM6_mlsKmci8FcKlu8DvkMtnLPra9Leq20Scn2FoN6tRHpNBZWnUjwcz6iiReggKSE6N0eIoc8cYFYPkwOsAroyR4qUXANxJJRanYlN5h8y5Jqm3ESXWsq-TnyI-jGc7fxAPcF2z4UhC5NP54I3txm3OvrHYMpHCOEUK8vE7vpO1_SpwbTg1YEc5yl1Xtm3ah4hT2uFKj2Ga7_Q_ZH3pn4MoPJ5rCVxX-zEMAbqobOZk-HyP6NYklThHDHvVsdSGuNiDbGCy4JZkPl9oXWeg7wLlJDNdOfbIW7vppQvNCFzWySbUIIG076fRFaSk1o_59DahF1D7F46t_IT0HF0tA75hT3CVzeg4uvIoxeG3VR-tLA_iJjbdgrGDIs0YX7aUxdYB1fXIDOopoVk8P--5C4LOahyp921rnZ-LnKy6oqczZWSTQaRiO7YPRH8uV46gXGFFbcZNJ4HM304e0c3oqRgCAR8F3lF7D0tMTPpt0PvmiDg37ZGfzrjBh2dSM13WZD49Ut-Dxf_e-U8nXOsMSTo61X8vMzoJMveBAIZIv7HxJoqDn3sHOEyA5JDfjJ1PeybJwSyiwoYBOYJ5DtT_5Blk2FBrQ1efDqonCYFEoYSOGEnSdENo4JDiUlPnokDUjjEOuvHk/vKyq6fHZHZGBUsD0yJtSB_9kY4iDKU_e/15)__**
But first, let us tell you something about her.
**When our daughter Nancy was 17, she dropped out of high school. **
We remember the night she told us. _Her hands were shaking. She thought she’d disappointed everyone she loved._
But we raised her to believe that setbacks don’t define you—**how you rise does.**
[**With a WWII veteran for a father and a schoolteacher for a mother, she grew up hearing the same lessons over and over again:**](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/jrHFd22kCfYB4SB2TEi8vFhkk6ag3N9M3y0k6T6NX9FXdQ1ajkV-uMD4opFQG8-hZUe7nu4DaMhKlXexy5jNH37b-Js4tCcdVxY0EMJDIG6alfMuLiRtEfZJQITRuAVGxZT1yn98Jjlaa41IquiYVjML7Jg13UBUXzaJXeye3VqLdLNXCr2TWk2UD20v0ZpATb3aZPd21rSeScMO-bpdEKuz11mG57MpUoVzS0BB_176Lqski6ea1j4gGDGDtBL8rt6dvnTVQwZ_lcsezGyPttoxpvXM63Jkofre80zw4SmGNSwCgRwWcB1t0X83EJMY_yJ5IWFoh59Fz4e1k3pIy7WRdZZA7YtxkMwFywMwHmsniZXwjZPaKkk1cbzk-2QCaKfmT9jXvnzXR31yXtzFIBaZDwGDtvLR4T9KOrp4U_vguzG5vVeaG4zm2ABQqAMqarGPaqbfX2d6_7Hmsh1ZbkTGrg4_7kzi_xGaww2aB1jnRbLaJFZk47zkr2kqAlyzVPgADN9Rxv3yvDV2NMgUFIFswtsQWIJj1GUwyM32KqfdpWygAWKG7eWUxkJ3ig9ppv2B8ou5x4Mj4K3w3-0JZ-2wAXn5N8K7YkR-xlFruEKGwsrUAPaTm2YEz8il7zgkBZjSjlfJWeNYweczrYtEs7qQKcqnDQE4xlZhlFO1QPbGHntyImaq9XzkJMyeu_y2d0oqoEdYAoxE2d2NapgngsHx4337mULj2Fydou-p4E9id360bXAyP219NUXA1oBZZckeMgAaT4u-Aeo/URHaGv3OFc8ZavWoNXldR2M1T1ywyFiw/15)
👉 _Never quit._
👉 _Never run from the truth._
👉 _And never let anyone tell you that _**you are less than what God made you to be.**__
So we gave her a choice:
**Go back to school... or get a job.**
Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy. She picked herself up, took a job at Waffle House, and fought her way back.
**[By 21, she became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, following in her father’s footsteps.](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/DIeM0ovTNyRy0TU2a4_Qhrr7Vqdie4u47UWjLzKQyBsZLC9EfbiM9F1FbtEt4Pm0_eEg8muM7pdasEokLOfrJS3j6MhTAs0ayxxtMIU-kuFlhsauRkrQ9XaMAY6IwW2HPZoqwJ9AGrur2JBbxAqyGEUYlMuZ0r_JxzCD8yzQQQW-tEtofw3BtbqTy0F2R3FzWhLPs_PJDCurMSCVAM1YxkMaXY6T1AHMN7jxf679vdZxWlEpW9Dv_YdVCjXuizljbbfZRDIyPS1mz0efue55WiqpwdYtpF8LJ43TYKZTfIkXt9Lw4rTqM0RYc9EPZVSFCspdalNTQ-TPWSHwmV_Dma2i5IQD0BicSOXYIb_mkGFPpP3cH85GobyMIb8zd3-jxdlfs8r0SDxsVIdBrJBYErfNzKc4PnAtLiddq4pOEk6sEPDWDckEn6NHA_RRd_MI56keD5hssOc_pQcmgtRkjtrbr8lIQ1wz0wu9JtRM-uwTqj6-g0WNtBmGs0yGSYfYzBnqOfdgcyZIHgjYBkvX3HBkQ0-0n5DiyMFzgx_YKyjRX1KMoc70aPQQBhDYRZ2UZX7HqGzDDBBg8OK61BojN9ZIah1X7vZFK1hklqf-0OeHJI8LxHCgBpkJ8lQZhYhYhwZdn4d40lslFyh-gVLTxP6VQQMqCKwf2YvWMxYnGWpWizNOLY0ZB1x5P74Z4jXrOpQUPP3X7nY0jsar4DZjaYGLd6OPbIwyhAfN2LWZ2aqzZjhpKUqTFrnu6fXInFhP-5oG10CJh8VtEv4/6aQVyPggDsXV9S4dF_fWUprJVLuWJLhl/15)**

[](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/gHNLUbb96is7XM9QhUgv5KTWxcjuD6wfVTNsjcN89utyuR4PDkPeJ_JQDqQD0imte0wd_AIRxf0C2O3NElBDFvgUG0I3d292vVAlGU8CC6d5NiydvCVskfWCclP5Mpf0xa7sxJdLI5h2WlO-xZ7RYOzxLqbAxvV7ZKnXB3CFSPwintPwe4dgwmggNDd7-G3SDU3JgLUG3nk4IuGiWVdNtAJGbfu25opgbOqXTB0rRXYZezsEate0LTWOHlFCQKRri9WiaBvvOfwl3WxzruyK9VlYCv_vkT_6Yyebq3aSS2sEUrw5R5BGFWWYa3B0ZYJCK8l1i4lwl5a0L4HFI4LEo_uY2_Gv-RSR3uAzi3axNO9KBWrCypN720f4czBMI-m-K62rkovwyHzp100LTbv8NHYcimDS1ZtKbxBa2lvAWLynJst4U2zbtJ2iEenUoXmh2ZVpsdPv-1xOGyuhHoIwiJ1tFz2UyC_d4o6_Meauv_yD6nUQLC5N-Ceg76LOTyCeMKXOdN_8HWY_bbBPEpw50dXhi1uMQfiUzVyYI0O4fmQSdYIztsfgd2cq677ZiOPJpBDCkFtEpMOVFVlMtBxr8swDOBmCsVcc0dWuw_t5U_grBgXPg3F1uQHq0H9SvMzfmt_xv2cgriJZZ7VoeLTbxuAL3_T2_zOE9vRzLKgiUG3reVCL9XifNjQswCp_8byjVhm8dXkuUXtpWcR86yQ_95HpC5FR5N5ANjBdlmzpO8kXm-ot3TM9TMu8AzZKZ1QnYuf5uDCZNOl4Z_k/0dwqh9Yc0EdzDjONBziF1WmTMeTZrbrB/15)

[ **SUPPORT NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR** ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/QT5Bn4GjCr0vKzj1wq6f2bQyZqEXRbzVBALp3XQ4oJZpQjSIF8jpQ_W9MG2FS06IsW_ZQNaWl8DyJAmguBaL4lkosBh36nM0vTYfZbT51JsHoSCVauWzwZzERLMQGtgvzL4axVjd8yFPLiKPhGGurXmzs_flP-TX1ggctC-IkPEd6MrUPB4QJMLINPJQwRW5n4SMOlm0-hVpBFuM4pCl4e9GDBKv4OWtMFw5cK4Sgiiur0goklT0owcMFslQIYxDzVaePWOQK3zHayK9VsLv64Z00HaVU11MayYWl_wVclHuY6vYkEcvslnzOML8yq02kHsWBTzbcE_V1C2iHEVWfu5hEP9VBh4y1fEhPz4MTXYRCl9tdwySrimrLJYnxpALNjl94mlipq_a8Bb80diM6m3vC4ajWUmgzybfECcgHgUJwjmsJDs42bTbRVbDLaAmbJPGsH7akk0DGRMObhPv2LYvQlDQskjhrZiN6LZbdEof0p_3EDOEZBpnxPzFdzLkm3lMo2eLcqJ1sMWJ_1cAV7k-ea-1Mj-7ObaYohuSc95-LYWzJ72EyoCpq4ayId9R7V-H_zNXXf0OiAylG9POo-3CNs8PKHYJcj8MiobDKOJ2NsJDp0F0iPa3m5cBB8wHIoBul3aqKlkD3AbAlWD-S_TsXmGDDLlbCig66di14oXHuk-F1qxXdxXMROjJpJl_rxzRueRkcP6DDslCFwAKI6z7nb2bgw0WWHHNEPecPlq_UMHswm10obg2YhVUv35_aFC6ajS5LfHQlaU/3SvYJuzgcMOUvpKrAaOvlMzCtpCltaDk/15)

**Soon after, she was elected as the first woman to represent South Carolina in the U.S. House of Representatives.**
She’s been fighting her whole life; for herself, for her kids, for the truth, and now... _**for her state.**_
**[Today, Nancy is running for Governor of South Carolina. And just like she did at The Citadel, she’s marching headfirst into a battle.](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/Q6TtZbFW9uSkJTkrJMTbpstrB_F1Kj2fOW5I-6pHjyTa9jHzMzqTy0B1GT5L6wEPXaE8_z9dARJpmt_P3zfoKvvYIJ01xhlPbonjhBRNVSYmI6DAnENwzN_IwukzHyLDATiq0vyrn4rFjCiFmCpN3YddM5nUQxqzalCfKR0aL64eQOj_k6CWZf2fxt9kgCOjet2AeD1d3BoFxJM9b9V8qe7OiQmWvhaH9pkjY-rtc8yuiDozA7fSHVQ7akg9Rw2x6h7RtpErBhDRRwGT2kEToT8-YTw6I_WkgYly_EpBokUkLwrN3Ibup2uaKClTCGQ3wu2trA6fjfhJJ4kZY2aDl0DAZzIMDzBs_W2NmCcCe3RdloPGZ43Z1ezoYYKP8eQur-2lVa3rIhzDV-ERinmb1ZYGHkDOW61Hv_SaPp8muAJDhAndNtl27apV09UVwR8pyZKCbx01kTnTkdmgpHSeCXn9TNPrNre3z_Cvwjuk7SK_SPGsVnqjFqMCPUOqQ3Jmw5K2THB2Gcd2Lo4AqFMqkBHZgN962XtdZNnlknbYWuj1JqK3QLVPG5f-wW1F_f5ffY_dYSvoJcFnOZz5JQUd99SGvPS0HfkcBvta-2d5PxAGSjQy4mVdCGe0Iw8CFvf9rzA_2ZJVYJfeZTwjdYdWpD-ena5N5GPGdASJLHq13nwmZXnjdKg7BNXcsiJPSuhWgZSg3JLTwktBg2YoxglKWwG1QEZyM-hmqj6er2kGy8xcTlk_SdVH7Zg8ns3v2jKvLuICn-_p5y5SyK5f/9jV27vdcVOYh3TwCsWVBt85tlYiVj7Di/15)**
The Establishment has its knives and pitchforks aimed at our daughter.
_They stalk her. Send her death threats._She’s even been physically assaulted.__
As parents, we won’t lie—it’s hard sitting back and watching our daughter face relentless attacks day after day.
But Nancy is our daughter. And we know this: **She never backs down. And she _never_ stops fighting.**

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

clean_body: Please read this| | | | | | | | Dear Peter , This is Brigadier General James Emory Mace, U.S. Army (Retired), and my wife, Anne. Today, we’re writing to you not as public figures... but as parents. This season usually fills our home with joy, family, prayers, and warmth. But this year feels different. This year, our daughter Nancy is walking through fire. But first, let us tell you something about her. When our daughter Nancy was 17, she dropped out of high school. We remember the night she told us. Her hands were shaking. She thought she’d disappointed everyone she loved. But we raised her to believe that setbacks don’t define you—how you rise does. 👉 Never quit. 👉 Never run from the truth. 👉 And never let anyone tell you that you are less than what God made you to be. So we gave her a choice: Go back to school... or get a job. Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy. She picked herself up, took a job at Waffle House, and fought her way back. Soon after, she was elected as the first woman to represent South Carolina in the U.S. House of Representatives. She’s been fighting her whole life; for herself, for her kids, for the truth, and now... for her state. The Establishment has its knives and pitchforks aimed at our daughter. They stalk her. Send her death threats.She’s even been physically assaulted. As parents, we won’t lie—it’s hard sitting back and watching our daughter face relentless attacks day after day. But Nancy is our daughter. And we know this: She never backs down. And she never stops fighting. She’s up against a machine that wants to erase the values of faith-based, service-minded Americans who believe in truth, family, and country. Peter, if Nancy’s going to pull this off and save our beloved state of South Carolina,she needs your backup. Please, from two parents who love their daughter with everything they have... Help us lift her up this Christmas. 🙏 With respect, General James Emory Mace (Ret.) and Anne Mace Proud Parents of Nancy Mace | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR | | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: I just watched a highway clip that honestly doesn’t look real. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | I just watched a highway clip that honestly doesn’t look real. # Off to the (Primary) Races!
---
| |
---
| It seems like only yesterday that Texans were casting ballots to determine who the best party nominees were for important elected positions across the state! But, here we are again, gearing up for an **exciting and pivotal Primary Election** on March 3, 2026. The window for candidate filings officially closed yesterday evening, so we now have a complete look at who has decided to **run for reelection, move up the political ladder, or challenge an incumbent.** As usual, Team TFVC is reviewing lawmakers’ records on key medical liberty votes, as well as sifting through dozens of candidate surveys so that we can bring you a **complete and reliable list of candidates** who are committed to protecting and advancing informed consent, medical privacy and vaccine choice. Over the course of the next several weeks, we will be releasing names of those candidates whom we believe are deserving of your support. **Today, we are proud to recommend our first round of candidates:** Ken Paxton, US Senate
Steve Toth, CD 2
Briscoe Cain, CD 9

Bryan Hughes, SD 1
Bob Hall, SD 2
Charles Schwertner, SD 5
Lois Kolkhorst, SD 18
Charles Perry, SD 28
Kevin Sparks, SD 31

Brent Money, HD 2
Joanne Shofner, HD 11
Terri Leo Wilson, HD 23
AJ Louderback, HD 30
Wes Virdell, HD 53
Helen Kerwin, HD 58
Andy Hopper, HD 64
James Frank, HD 69

Tim O'Hare, Tarrant Co. Judge
Michelle Evans, Wilco GOP Chair

“Name: Unpronounceable.”
“Deport Every Indian.”** These are all _real statements_ that a sitting Republican elected official made about me. My name is Raja Krishnamoorthi (but you can just call me Raja). I’m an immigrant, Member of Congress and proud American. It’s unacceptable and dangerous that in 2025, elected officials feel emboldened to spew outright hate speech and call for the mass removal of Indian Americans like me. The cruel tactics and racial profiling used by ICE, DHS, and Donald Trump have given license to racists to harass whomever they choose, including me. But it’s not just about me. Trump’s rhetoric and actions enable racial targeting and amplify the worst in humanity. _It’s up to all of us to push back on this hate._ **No matter what the racist MAGA extremists say, I’m a proud American citizen. And I love this country enough to fight like hell for it.** That’s why I’ve spent _every single day_ taking these racist bullies on – from standing up to Kristi Noem to getting the police called on me for trying to inspect ICE facilities. **It’s also why I’m running for Senate. If you want leaders who refuse to flinch in the face of hate — who’ll rise up to meet the threat Trump poses head-first — I need you in this fight with me, Peter.**

[**_If you’re ready to fight back against hate, please chip in $10 or $25 to my campaign today. Together, we can turn the page on this dark moment in our country. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120911920/587757055/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.09_Attacks_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTAwMjU3NC0wOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ekWvG2-dRfE0ra4bz3CHNgZ3YCWbB6hscFFagpPkUcg=) | | [ DONATE $10 → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120911921/587757056/527259264?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.09_Attacks_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTAwMjU3NC0wOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ekWvG2-dRfE0ra4bz3CHNgZ3YCWbB6hscFFagpPkUcg=)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: I hope you are reading my emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
We won on Tuesday, but that’s where the good news stops and the bad news starts.

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-2oW8zS1qIe4VvvMFE2iw)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, I hope you are reading the emails I send, but quite frankly, we're not seeing many of our supporters take action. While Republicans kept a U.S. House seat in our hands on Tuesday in Tennessee, the margin dropped by over HALF from one year ago when President Trump easily won the same district over Kamala Harris. It's got me wondering if there is a correlation between the lull in contributions we're seeing, and the low margins are candidates are winning by this year. Is the writing on the wall, and I'm the only one who doesn't see it? Are you still motivated to win, or have you lost faith in spite of our many accomplishments this past year? I'm curious to know what's going on. Next year's election is going to be a turnout election, and I can assure you that the Left is going to show up. I'm really worried about our folks, voters like you, getting out to vote when President Trump isn't on the ballot. **I 'm asking a small favor:** could you please let me know if you're still with us by making a small contribution of at least $10 today? I know this isn't a poll exactly, but my team and I will use the results of this email to determine the size and the strength of our movement as it stands today. **[< <chip in $10>> ](https://trk.email.tedcruz._9qxSu6x94QTjf3pgUYg)** Thanks, Sen. name: Parler Sponsor
subject: Could Your RMD Strategy Be Costing You?
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://view.parlermailer.com/?qs=f9ee93aed897c51fbf03857cbca3e7459bfdf4486c33160556a6026f7e41a08c0b2ddc0b5e0bf91bf710a748b7867137743f21f0d22c74069ce7bd779dbf21a15f4c1bc3502d977475febfb87cb09a80 "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Allegiance Gold
* * *
| **[It's RMD Time Again.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=201dd1d239ce00104fe5697e8ef49018fc27ce23a771cbc433f70f937616dcf8c8a69ce5f2cd758e450ae8a2656231a5fe9ac3ebbc50a975c41221084c6139b6)** **Imagine opening your retirement statement this year...** And realizing that a simple decision - one most retirees never even think about - could reshape your taxes, your diversification, and even your long-term financial stability. Every year, Americans over age 73 are forced to withdraw **tens of billions of dollars** from their retirement accounts. And year after year, most people follow the same path: **Take the RMD in cash and move on.** Not because it's the best choice. But because no one ever tells them there's another way. **[The "Default" RMD Isn't Your Only Option.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=201dd1d239ce00104fe5697e8ef49018fc27ce23a771cbc433f70f937616dcf8c8a69ce5f2cd758e450ae8a2656231a5fe9ac3ebbc50a975c41221084c6139b6)** Financial institutions make it easy to withdraw cash. Too easy. But simple isn't always strategic. Taking your RMD in cash may:
* Increase taxable income
* Force you to sell assets at moments that may not
align with your plan
* Reduce the overall portion of your wealth that remains invested

And yet... **[There's an IRS-Approved Alternative Most Retirees Never Hear About.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=201dd1d239ce00104fe5697e8ef49018fc27ce23a771cbc433f70f937616dcf8c8a69ce5f2cd758e450ae8a2656231a5fe9ac3ebbc50a975c41221084c6139b6)** Few realize that **RMDs can also be taken "in-kind."** Meaning: instead of withdrawing cash, you can receive _certain assets directly_ without liquidating them first. No, it doesn't eliminate taxes. But for many savers, it may help them:
* Preserve their long-term allocation
* Avoid being forced to sell during volatile markets
* Strengthen diversification, depending on their strategy

It's fully IRS-allowed... but rarely mentioned in traditional planning conversations. **Before You Take Your Next RMD, Ask Yourself:**
* Do I know _most_ IRS-approved ways to satisfy my distribution?
* Am I selling assets when I don't want to - or at prices I don't like?
* Could an in-kind distribution align better with my long-term goals and risk tolerance?

For something you're required by law to take each year, understanding your options isn't optional - it's essential. **[To help you make sense of it all...](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=201dd1d239ce00104fe5697e8ef49018fc27ce23a771cbc433f70f937616dcf8c8a69ce5f2cd758e450ae8a2656231a5fe9ac3ebbc50a975c41221084c6139b6)** We've created a clear, simple breakdown of:
* Cash vs. in-kind RMDs
* How each method works
* Questions to ask before choosing
* What to discuss with your advisor

So before you take your next withdrawal, **[take a moment to get informed.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=201dd1d239ce00104fe5697e8ef49018fc27ce23a771cbc433f70f937616dcf8c8a69ce5f2cd758e450ae8a2656231a5fe9ac3ebbc50a975c41221084c6139b6)** Your decision today could influence your strategy for years to come. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=201dd1d239ce00104fe5697e8ef49018fc27ce23a771cbc433f70f937616dcf8c8a69ce5f2cd758e450ae8a2656231a5fe9ac3ebbc50a975c41221084c6139b6)

---

**About Steve Roberts**
Senator Steven Roberts, a fourth-generation St. Louis native, was sworn into office on January 6, 2021, to represent Missouri’s 5th Senatorial District and was selected as the Democratic Whip for the Minority Caucus. Previously, he served in the Missouri House of Representatives from 2017 to 2020 and chaired the Missouri Legislative Black Caucus. A graduate of the University of Miami and Pepperdine Law, he has worked in Congress, as a prosecutor in St. Louis, and as a Captain in the Missouri Air National Guard’s JAG Corps. He also manages Roberts Law, LLC, and remains active in Missouri’s legal and civic communities.

body:

The not so good news is, we still have a ways to go.

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: It’s official: I’m running for Senate.
body:
Y’all, it’s Jasmine.
I’m reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas.
Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I’m not launching this campaign to play nice. I’m doing it to fight — because Texas deserves someone who doesn’t back down when the bullies come for her. It deserves someone who fights back.
But to win this race, we’ll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. And to be blunt, that won’t come cheap.
That’s why I’m asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I’m counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue. Will you answer the call by splitting a donation between my campaign and Real Texas? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?refcode=120825_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jasmine Crockett and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?refcode=120825_1&amount=25]
Let me be clear: When there’s a fight worth having, I don’t flinch. I don’t shrink. I don’t back down.
Just ask the communities I’ve fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I’ve represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. I’m a lifelong fighter for justice.
So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he’s terrified of what I represent — and what I’m bringing to the Senate when we win this race: truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people.
If you believe that insults won’t silence us — if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation — I need you. We’re launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That’s why I’d be so grateful if you could pitch in $10, $25, or more to help us hit the ground running. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Real Texas ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?refcode=120825_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jasmine Crockett and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:

DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?refcode=120825_1&amount=25]
Thank you,
Jasmine

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: One of the hardest battles of my life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester |
---
[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=3af5838f816a4a78837c776b6065f2d1&_e=gwEq-7k9ZuchqaqYsqWl1TjghEFgt1sE_9AWND-Tl0aNbP58HR_YtT8SKvi6xiK0IyHBFCifU5hXckYKvS4Vomm7SHj0xkU9JMkNvCzWvvKtI4c1Uak1e6rI8Vi6zkLRAGtJv5NDYqQ0UStrJhvDrQnwXC34PI6Dkx5Lqhd74NcTN4nlhOE-2xYZCtO5bDsGTed3jrQSHrPXs52pFYSKNJV3A14bDF3zEhc9Z_LDDnje3MHKXL_tLyX4XOtNCX8z42STI76b88-2oWoDbtu8hLSXWsZsfrPkLUvv55xIeHd8luQOad-FyqjS4NVdOnZRkuv4mIfUNVE1wEEkB5Ga3P81fEn8DosFvpJUlMzng77KOcSxPHDhQQvEkJMp-cHM-tIWbtcHNmKV4h15wlqKK-zkHy0mf_FWmQUqpn1kR6qTC5LRqG1VjUOmwDDF55Dq002MmuA8pLuszLlRQKooa8dTnm4OBwmyILJdQmwj5Fke8SRNvZsgt30e9-_1G5TSODyB2LB4yscbzePz7SE3SX_sU53TipxCk_ofsYOnpz6aty8ih3jRYgpXAOTRMaCNZQI-T-o8kTgLF2Z79fpTpRzfF3mOrs-cvaj89s2LQvoGw5V1ebXj2WJVKKCUmz6JIVWKmhJpTo6iBzi79ikCSVMBwUoSei4asC5oG-tjb7lgOBpqsmZxY1CQKgEjBlXS6YgZLB06RzXgW4B718Nq17bu9J5PgOOdqsWkEXHWFsv-bBgk3E5SJFWYjqyq6d48)

Fellow American,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I'm proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn't a "gimme." We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That's because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who'd smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Fellow American, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I'm proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn't a "gimme." We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That's because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who'd smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines - the Republican Senate Majority Maker! - booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve's radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she's been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader's chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They'd love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: Help me embarrass Bernie Sanders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. |

---
Peter,

Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates.

In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ _**stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.**_ ”

**Translation:** She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash.

That’s not leadership.

**That’s the socialism I fought against overseas.**

I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea.

_**I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach.**_

As a _**Navy SEAL Officer**_ , I deployed _**nine times**_ across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa.

I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security.

That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth.

Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in _**DECADES.**_

What I don’t have right now is money. _**[If you still believe capitalism is worth fighting for, would you please consider a small investment in my campaign today? $5 or even $10 will do if you can spare it.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=977c96cc79664aa5a5615adf27a19e3c&_e=nEiYeOYTsFJL8RgAR45tBINURqEJuNvGLx-nMz9mGCzUCdOtRpu1-oQKzQRqBYeFdZcSYiFdmOOvX5ElaDXfYx4ONMgcDBrJkitOjSYhvxpV9OR41jl4uTEqioz71PPPIYGHkY6Xorr-S-IlnqUI3S1Hq8RLhej_pwRoecHgEpHbxiW_dOvdYJdkFh47EWkIpcU_kv1R1bDiS0Hx0by7mI8uREzbJeMN0WYwDHeyb9z3UjXDfrGT3PodCEUPJOCtNUiMD7fURkd24Zgs16bCDm_EwAUU7ANc0j3L7ayluqxcDvfl53ZJyAmHpEZzEMZ7qLwcJNlWUkDae_oWr5xzgrWt79A5nj3XoFjIKCmdswKvyH7k7Nqv56Oyi4KW9Nrne7sbugYpANhzBCMTD123iHXTF9CIiw8wJOJL54l3phsoBxSD4zLgmxwE3n9odOo48FVRz3elJF4S6bk8yE9ZNFBZD9tgXy6mOpZ0LvWNacmvIARN3sW0uXLnRMIPFhoVigyUOHTV3Pmv6xG-Q_X8CsY5zOc1mKSFURReKx6GMppA8VLDmdAW3Z2e6wP-vyw73im4HH-OqvwW4wqOiLg0bmXz43UIXIhgj91OW5wkvex1p7hARqTR9cFqcjN7xxA6w8eJYQOofhLwgzihGLDYlg4AQnHza2bU7Avs8YrvS0NEc1eDF3Asm5xwSk2xilt4oXM3Pjlt79fOBZExCXt7pmOgFzG19olsKeZoxpyruEzep5XAj4Q9TwtrCOVXT6zxiP0N-bHSSFQ6MHI3l91i1gxSOoBbOdLWEgtVYx43Y_U%3D)**_

\- Now, with Bernie’s blessing, she’s eyeing the Senate to nationalize healthcare and tax away innovation.

President Trump is already restoring deterrence—tariffs on China, sealed borders, and energy independence.

He needs allies like me: a SEAL who’s deterred real enemies in war zones, not dreamed them up in committee rooms.

My opponent’s Bernie-backed vision? It’s the same failed playbook I’ve seen abroad—quietly obedient societies, where the human spirit withers.

clean_body: I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. | Peter, Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates. In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests. ” Translation: She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash. That’s not leadership. That’s the socialism I fought against overseas. I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea. I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach. As a Navy SEAL Officer , I deployed nine times across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa. I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth. Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in DECADES. What I don’t have right now is money. My socialist opponent’s record? \- As Tim Walz’s right hand, she sued to defund ICE detention, letting illegals with records roam free—while fentanyl from cartel labs (fueled by open borders) kills 1,200 Minnesotans a year. \- Now, with Bernie’s blessing, she’s eyeing the Senate to nationalize healthcare and tax away innovation. President Trump is already restoring deterrence—tariffs on China, sealed borders, and energy independence. He needs allies like me: a SEAL who’s deterred real enemies in war zones, not dreamed them up in committee rooms. My opponent’s Bernie-backed vision? It’s the same failed playbook I’ve seen abroad—quietly obedient societies, where the human spirit withers. he left’s poll shows a Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat. We need FINANCIAL FIREPOWER to counter Bernie’s political machine, which is equipped with hundreds of millions of dollars and an email fundraising list 10 miles long. Every dollar arms the next generation of American strength—and will help us bury Bernie’s agenda in Minnesota. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: Deterrence works when your adversary believes you’ll act. China believes me. Bernie fears me. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: What unhappy retirees have in common
body:
| Hi Peter, What if you're unhappy when you retire? That's a sad reality for more than 1 in 3 retirees. And almost half of them have one thing in common—they're lonely. This shouldn't come as a surprise. Research shows that people generally aren't prioritizing social connections before retirement, and the trend toward maintaining existing friendships or cultivating new ones is even weaker.1 That can end up backfiring in a big way when we retire, even if we have massive nest eggs and solid financial plans.
---
|
---
[**Click here to see it!**](https://financeinsights.net/vW6qsxgxZtkZn3AHKeXLjsqL2lA?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) The truth is that joy isn't a given in retirement—and if you don't end up enjoying the retirement you've dreamed of, you could have no one to blame but yourself. The upside? You're in control. And if you know how to invest in different forms of wealth, you can transform your savings into a life you love living. [**Want to see how to balance your plans and live a richer life in retirement? Click here.**](https://financeinsights.net/vW6qsxgxZtkZn3AHKeXLjsqL2lA?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) To smooth transitions and more joy in retirement,

**Reid Rasner - CEO**
