# Bill Maher destroys left-wing pundit...
# Asks her in which Islamic country would she feel comfortable wearing her mini dress
Bill Maher left progressive news host Ana Kasparian **[fumbling during a heated debate](https://substack.com/redirect/b5c45d5c-cee5-4f4b-8e36-7de84dd0db05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on his "Club Random" podcast when he challenged her to name a city in a Muslim-majority country where she would feel safe wearing her white mini-dress, insisting Israel is the only country in the region accepting of Western culture.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ef7474e1-c403-40e7-866f-150c28150abb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Kasparian blames Western destabilization, Maher pushes back:** When Kasparian initially responded that she "would not be comfortable in this dress in any of the various Middle Eastern countries that have been destabilized," Maher incredulously interrupted asking "You're not really blaming it on whitey? You're blaming Islam on whitey?" and repeatedly pressed her on whether she believed Western destabilization was the reason she couldn't wear the dress.
* **Young Turks host ultimately concedes Tel Aviv most comfortable:** After going on a rant about terror organizations and the Syrian civil war before Maher reined her back in, The Young Turks host ultimately admitted she would not live in any city from North Africa to Uzbekistan and conceded "a woman of my age who grew up in the western world would probably feel the most comfortable in Tel Aviv."

* * *
# **Christian university bars TPUSA chapter from official recognition**
Sadie Burnett, president of Turning Point USA at Vanguard University in Costa Mesa, California, said her chapter **[has been barred from becoming a recognized student organization](https://substack.com/redirect/e9028159-fdd4-4d9b-8ba7-581d2c01f91d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after the school made an official decision in 2023 to stop accepting political clubs, claiming "Christians do not necessarily belong in politics" and adopting a policy against "political advocacy initiatives."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e9028159-fdd4-4d9b-8ba7-581d2c01f91d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Unrecognized status limits chapter activities and access:** Without official recognition, the TPUSA chapter cannot book rooms for meetings in advance, receive university funding, participate in club rush to interact with new students, or host tabling events where students can approach and ask questions--what Burnett calls "one of the heart and cores to Turning Point"--forcing members to gather only outside and not in any official capacity as a conservative group.
* **School offers "co-curricular programming" alternative:** VP for Student Development Amanda Lebrecht said the university moved away from political clubs as part of advancing "our educational mission within the context of our small Christian community," instead encouraging students to work with administration on broader initiatives like last year's "Year of Civility" and this year's "Courageous Conversations," which brought pro-life activist Lila Rose to campus.
* **Student says Christians deserve voice in politics:** Burnett argued "Christians have a place in politics, and not only a place, we have a profound voice, the most profound voice in politics," calling it "so disappointing to see a Christian university push this idea that Christians should not speak and that politics are taboo," while noting she feels like she "got the rug pulled out from under me" after choosing to attend the school.

* * *
# **Conservatives mock Jasmine Crockett 's last-minute Senate launch in deep red Texas**
Conservative leaders ridiculed Rep. Jasmine Crockett's Monday **[announcement of her Texas Senate bid,](https://substack.com/redirect/a1b80e1c-ecff-4f25-a305-ddf43c6769c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with Gov. Greg Abbott posting she's "about to learn the hard way that most Texans are very different from her district" and will be "pummeled for her progressive socialist agenda," while the Republican Party called her "Low-IQ Jasmine Crockett" and questioned why Democrats are "clearing the field" for her.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5cb721c2-f93b-409b-8541-9b6456299ad1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Campaign ad featuring Trump insults backfires:** Crockett's 42-second launch video, which features sound bites of Trump calling her "low IQ," drew widespread mockery, with conservative commentator Eric Daugherty saying she "royally SCREWED UP" since "Trump won Texas by 14 points," while even conservative podcaster Matt Walsh joked "I agree with every word of this Jasmine Crockett ad," and political commentator David Freeman predicted "she will LOSE by 17% points, a landslide."
* **Crockett enters race after Allred drops out:** The progressive firebrand's announcement came hours after Democratic candidate and former Rep. Colin Allred dropped out citing concerns over party unity, with Crockett framing her candidacy as standing up against Trump and saying "this moment we're in now is life or death," while she faces incumbent Republican Sen. John Cornyn, who is also being challenged in the primary by Texas AG Ken Paxton and Rep. Wesley Hunt.

* * *
# **Trump urges Ukraine to hold elections despite ongoing Russia war**
President Trump called Monday for Ukraine to conduct **[elections during its conflict](https://substack.com/redirect/f3fdfda4-3d22-431e-bf7a-59bb28b94db8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with Russia, suggesting the nation risks losing its democratic character if voting remains suspended indefinitely under wartime martial law provisions.
* **Constitutional complications:** Trump told Politico reporter Dasha Burns that Ukrainians deserve electoral choice despite the country's constitution prohibiting votes during martial law--imposed by President Volodymyr Zelensky after Russia's February 2022 invasion--with normal presidential and parliamentary terms having expired in May and August 2024 under peacetime conditions.
* **Pressure tactics acknowledged:** The president responded to his son Donald Trump Jr.'s weekend suggestion about potentially abandoning Ukraine: "It's not correct. But it's not exactly wrong," emphasizing Kyiv must "play ball" on peace negotiations while acknowledging Russia holds advantages due to superior size and strength.
* **Peace proposal frustrations:** Trump expressed irritation that Zelensky hasn't reviewed the latest peace framework negotiated between American and Ukrainian officials despite his top lieutenants endorsing it, stating "a lot of people are dying" so the Ukrainian leader should "find time to read it."

The comments emerged as the Trump administration pursues fresh efforts to resolve Europe's bloodiest conflict since World War II.
* * *
#

body:
We have to stop them.
**Here’s how Republicans apparently want to govern (make it make sense):**
→ Cede congressional authority — allowing one man to govern on his whims of the day, even if that means gutting services like Medicaid
→ Take away your rights — from abortion care to the ballot box
→ Make everything more expensive — by pulling tariff numbers out of thin air
→ Speed up climate change — because they think they’re rich enough to avoid its effects
→ And gerrymander as many states as they can — so they can stay in power and avoid facing political consequences for their actions
Our last hope of stopping them is Democratic candidates with a proven record of winning statewide in battleground states. _Does that sound like anyone you know?_
**[Peter, North Carolina is Democrats’ BEST chance to flip a Senate seat from red to blue, and Roy Cooper is the only candidate who can do it — but winning won’t be easy. body:
It’s official. The filing window closed last night at 6 pm, and we now know the full field: a three-way race for the Democratic nomination for AG. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/last-night-14191434?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=e01eb1d576&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , It’s official. The filing window closed last night at 6pm, and we now know the full field: **a three-way race for the Texas Democratic nomination for Attorney General.** And here’s the good news: **Team Jaworski is leading this race.** **We can win this on****March 3** , and we can win it **outright, without a runoff.** But to do that, I need your help right now. [**Make a contribution today >>>**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=af19653cf0&e=5d8d80652b)
[**Add your name to our growing endorsement list >>>**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=de43cdedcd&e=5d8d80652b) Texas Democrats want a fighter as their next Attorney General. Someone with the backbone to stand up to corruption and the experience to deliver justice for every family. **I am the only candidate in this race with that proven record.** As Mayor of Galveston, I took a courageous stand and won a prolonged battle to build first-class community housing for working families. I fought for fairness even when the political winds were against me. As a Texas lawyer for 35 years, I have protected families and small businesses from powerful offenders who thought they could get away with abusing people. I stood up for justice, and I won. I am an honest family man—a loyal husband to Rebecca, a proud father to our two children—and I know that the heart of public service is simple: **every voter wants to protect their family.** I am offering you mature, battle-tested, principled leadership as your next Attorney General. I am respectfully asking for your vote as we build a movement that speaks for every Texas family. Let’s win this together. Onward!

**
**

I am offering you mature, battle-tested, principled leadership as your next Attorney General. I am respectfully asking for your vote as we build a movement that speaks for every Texas family. Let’s win this together. body:
Pete Hegseth is supposed to receive a report by Wednesday, December 10th, with recommendations on how to punish Mark Kelly for speaking out against Trump. At the top of the list of those punishments is recall to active duty and court-martial.
#
Peter:
Senator Mark Kelly is under enormous pressure from Trump and his goons.
Pete Hegseth is supposed to receive a report by Wednesday, December 10th, with recommendations on how to punish Mark for speaking out against Trump. At the top of the list of those punishments is recall to active duty and court-martial.
All this from a draft-dodging coward and the most unqualified SecDef in American history, aimed at a bonafide American hero.
VoteVets has had Mark Kelly’s back from his first campaign for Senate, and we need our supporters with him, too.
So, we have two humble requests for you:
**_FIRST:**_ [**Add your name to this list and join the list of thousands of patriots who say they have Mark Kelly’s six.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251208_vv_em_kelly/?refcode=em251209-1-160&akid=34811%2E3013755%2EhZwxh7)
**_SECOND:**_ [**Watch our latest digital ad, “Heroes and Fools,” that we’re running online in support of Mark. And, if you can afford it, donate to make sure millions of liberty loving Americans see it.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec25-kelly.pINQbt&refcode=em251209-1-160&t=1&akid=34811%2E3013755%2EhZwxh7)

Thank you in advance for your help,
The team at VoteVets

body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Yesterday was Texas’ official filing deadline for candidates running for Congress in the 2026 midterm elections.
Lizzie has drawn challengers in her race for re-election next year. But we’re building on our strong coalition to re-elect Lizzie—just as we always have done—and we want to make sure you’re a part of it. If you haven’t already, add your name here and endorse Lizzie for re-election [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5UDO0lBIx0Suhu-aPG8aHw2] .
https://secure.ngpvan.com/5UDO0lBIx0Suhu-aPG8aHw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5UDO0lBIx0Suhu-aPG8aHw2]
We know that Lizzie is a proven and effective leader who fights for Texans and their priorities—like access to affordable health care, lower costs, and fair maps and fair representation in Texas. Lizzie is focused on getting things done for our state, and she’s also focused on electing more strong Democrats up and down the ballot, in Texas and across the country, to help Democrats take back the House and hold the Trump administration accountable.
GIVE LIZZIE YOUR ENDORSEMENT! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5UDO0lBIx0Suhu-aPG8aHw2]
We also know that the Texas map that the Supreme Court has now permitted to go into effect for the 2026 elections betrays the fundamental principle that all Texans should have a say in our government. Lizzie is counting on everyone on #TeamLizzie to work together to help make sure this racist redistricting plan backfires, and that Texas Democrats win back these seats and more.
And we do that by winning at the ballot box every single race we can next November, including Lizzie’s re-election in TX07.

Team Lizzie

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Tennessee deserves better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Republican leaders are putting wealthy donors first
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KC1X694YKD9EZ90FCWZZYK7F_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KC1X694YKD9EZ90FCWZZYK7F_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, Our communities are paying the price while Republican lawmakers protect wealthy donors and corporate interests.

Again.
Instead of addressing the real challenges facing Tennessee families, **the GOP continues to prioritize their wealthy pals’ pocketbooks.**

Tennessee families are asking for safer neighborhoods, great public schools, and thoughtful investment in public services, **yet the Republican-controlled legislature keeps blocking progress at every turn**.

Our Caucus believes that the government should serve the people, not special interests. We believe every Tennessean deserves leaders focused on improving every family’s quality of life.

Can you chip in $5 today to help us keep fighting for progress for everyone?
---
| | [ Chip in $5 Today ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KC1X694YKD9EZ90FCWZZYK7F_2)

Shae Robins is a fan favorite in many heartwarming films, including "Passport to Love" and "Destined at Christmas." She joined
Moms for America to discuss her latest project, "A Christmas Prayer."

In addition to her family-friendly entertainment, Shae is wife to performer and musician, Brad Robins, and together they have two
children. Shae shares how she balances marriage, motherhood, performing, and faith. Like, subscribe and share.

The Rise of Faith-Based Films Celebrates Family Values and Hope

theaters and through streaming services. After many years of few options for family entertainment that supports a faith-based
worldview, we have so many to choose from!

clean_body: There are many options for family-friendly entertainment. With the rise of faith-based films, we have many great offerings to choose from. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] December 9, 2025 • Newsletter Shae Robins on Motherhood, Acting and Her Christmas Movie Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Shae Robins is a fan favorite in many heartwarming films, including "Passport to Love" and "Destined at Christmas." She joined Moms for America to discuss her latest project, "A Christmas Prayer." In addition to her family-friendly entertainment, Shae is wife to performer and musician, Brad Robins, and together they have two children. Shae shares how she balances marriage, motherhood, performing, and faith. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] The Rise of Faith-Based Films Celebrates Family Values and Hope Looking for wholesome, family-friendly movies and shows to watch this winter? Faith-based films have been on the rise, both in theaters and through streaming services. After many years of few options for family entertainment that supports a faith-based worldview, we have so many to choose from! We have rounded up some of the best. What is on your list? Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [-] DONATE TODAY []

Their journey taught me something I have carried my entire life: **democracy is precious, and it must never be taken for granted.** **[That is why I am running again. And I’m asking you to become one of the first Founding Members of my 2026 campaign. Minnesota is a national leader in democracy.
* We have one of the**highest voter turnout rates** in America.
* We passed **automatic voter registration** and **restored the freedom to vote** for thousands of returning citizens.
* We **strengthened access** for tribal nations and created pre-registration for students.

**But this progress is under threat.**
* The Trump Administration has already threatened to ban voting by mail.
* They demanded private data for millions of Minnesota voters.
* They weakened the federal agencies that help protect election security.
* And they have refused to reassure us that they will stay out of state-run elections in 2026.

**These are not hypothetical risks. They are happening now.**
Here in Minnesota, we have pushed back every step of the way. We sued the administration and won. We refused to turn over private voter data. And we are preparing for every scenario to keep our election fair, accurate, honest, and secure.
**But I cannot do this alone. Not in this moment.**
**[If you believe in protecting the freedom to vote, if you believe in truth over disinformation, if you believe Minnesota must remain a national leader in democracy, I’m asking you personally: Will you become a Founding Member today and help us launch the strongest pro-democracy campaign in the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120926527/587802769/329411655?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_251209&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgzMzU2MWEtMThkNS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dazpqlg_ybn6foPrNimy5yX2KDykH_Q4-gch3TV0oUI=)**

My family’s story is why I do this work. My great grandparents fled Lithuania, a place where they had no freedom to choose their leaders. Their journey taught me something I have carried my entire life: democracy is precious, and it must never be taken for granted. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | ********************=****************** | ******************=****************** | ******************=****************** | ******************=****************** | ******************=****************** | ******************=****************** Minnesota is a national leader in democracy. We strengthened access for tribal nations and created pre-registration for students. But this progress is under threat. The Trump Administration has already threatened to ban voting by mail. They demanded private data for millions of Minnesota voters. They weakened the federal agencies that help protect election security. And they have refused to reassure us that they will stay out of state-run elections in 2026. These are not hypothetical risks. They are happening now. Here in Minnesota, we have pushed back every step of the way. We sued the administration and won. We refused to turn over private voter data. name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: A brief explanation →
body:
---
Derek, Today, we are going to ask you to make your first donation of 2025 directly to the DNC — but first, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why we need your support right now. Here’s what’s going on: Less than a year into Trump’s presidency, he’s:
* Started building his $300 million White House ballroom while cutting food assistance for people nationwide.
* Threatened to end voting by mail and asked Republicans to redraw congressional maps across the country in their favor.
* Repeatedly talked about arresting his political opponents, while threatening to pull the television licenses of news agencies that have accurately covered his disastrous second term in office.

Trump wants people to be too demoralized to oppose him. He wants to intimidate us into silence. He and his allies are counting on Democrats throwing in the towel and completely giving up. But we won’t — and neither should you. That’s why this month is so important. December has just begun, but in just a few weeks, we face our most important end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since the 2024 election. At the end of the year, we will be required to report how much we’ve raised over the last few months. Those numbers will tell a story: A lot of contributions will show the strength of Democrats’ opposition to Trump and his agenda heading into next year’s midterms. _They’ll show we aren’t done fighting_. [**So, Derek, we’re asking: Can you join thousands of your fellow Democrats in making a contribution to the DNC today? It will add up fast when we all come together to do our part:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251209_5475_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5475_22930333_7DBM4j&akid=5475%2E22930333%2E7DBM4j) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251209_5475_fr&refcode2=5475_22930333_7DBM4j&akid=5475%2E22930333%2E7DBM4j)**

The Democrats

name: NH GOP
subject: Even Santa’s fed up with the Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee, Chairman Jim MacEachern
body:
New Hampshire Democrats have been placed squarely on Santa’s Naughty List.

| | | | | [|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=d2b7e94f34&e=f3aa6419cd)
| | | | | |

Friend,
**We’ve just received a leaked memo from the North Pole — and it confirms what we already suspected.**
**New Hampshire Democrats have been placed squarely on Santa’s Naughty List.**
According to the memo, they landed somewhere between bicyclists on busy roads and people who use speakerphone in public.
**And the reason?**
**Their relentless push for an income tax, a sales tax, and anything else they can cook up to make life in New Hampshire less affordable.**
Even Santa’s elves are calling it “the most aggressive anti-Christmas agenda in the country”.
While families are trying to make ends meet this holiday season, Democrats in Concord are dreaming of new ways to reach deeper into your wallet. If they get control in 2026, their “wishlist” is simple:
More taxes. More spending. Less freedom.
Republicans are the only thing standing between New Hampshire and a very expensive Christmas future.
But we can’t keep the Granite State tax-free without your help.
[**Will you chip in today to keep Democrats on the Naughty List — and keep their income tax schemes off the table?**](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=7c7d374c66&e=f3aa6419cd)
🎄 [**Donate HERE to Protect the NH Advantage**](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=476879672e&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [DONATE $25](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=871edef7cc&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [DONATE $50](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=d031924e65&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [DONATE $100](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=28adc2f9c9&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [DONATE $250](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=a32d89410f&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| |

Every dollar helps us stop the left from turning New Hampshire into Massachusetts with mountains.
Let’s give Democrats the lump of coal they earned, and keep our state free, prosperous, and proudly tax-free.
Thank you,NHGOP
---

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

A Tesla Explosion That Changes Everything

Near Trump Tower in Las Vegas, a Tesla Cybertruck exploded—and it’s raising serious questions.

The details are _shocking_. Gas canisters. Fireworks. A planned detonation.

But here’s the twist...
| [ ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=d032a77cc364456ca0f8d78ea0912c57&_e=bzGZRixylcWDK2b7sBV60PcNzdpYT5XWEMoY-vOFgwG9HE9P0n5kK9YIG8uQ3rufGI-r08TTsroEdB3_D_4UBZbBzbL9hPKoVsJ2nagOqrolrt3g0OeqT-JTkQH3cwyM9cl8k5rYOJx2dTJDXI7eoBYg88cABCL8i-Q0NMUJ3Z9TDHkmAY_sipH0vueHT0kQWxCF6n2rehKcDL6JtdjPM8dhexsNPGijmRPWt0E3lp0efVTxYmqe0alWbBvo4nmP29AaCdPliQozusATtTXDKszXnHcsD6dTqAGbNWInVwp6EoqfOmrbg_fYK4jO9yhU6VS0YjyPT_fYRsr4FMDESIAixO2rJ4Hom7XZiLX3xqXWEy5JU6olmcKM_OkQ976SQlGoZWVYZcOHTKDkI9mrzKyjHuuRCmIA6RuOxXsbQmwwjZSeRpdOiLEZayyeEfYt4zzuiXkGL-YAlbOmY-BH5dETlWPUjOzyApDCoS4ZNjnkIhAG1JYt9IYYA2vllNXGP9MDQY1pr3DZDWmgADTqd_FWZZMLfRsPyxLHUpGqMg0hmzVt8fhcsEThPsM07CdGeMgePITz91EbnDppyxV7cQ%3D%3D)
---
There’s something bigger behind this story—something most people haven’t noticed.

Do you see it?

[CLICK HERE to uncover the truth.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=d032a77cc364456ca0f8d78ea0912c57&_e=bzGZRixylcWDK2b7sBV60PcNzdpYT5XWEMoY-vOFgwG9HE9P0n5kK9YIG8uQ3rufGI-r08TTsroEdB3_D_4UBZbBzbL9hPKoVsJ2nagOqrolrt3g0OeqT-JTkQH3cwyM9cl8k5rYOJx2dTJDXI7eoBYg88cABCL8i-Q0NMUJ3Z9TDHkmAY_sipH0vueHT0kQqAMlzs3Z68FUq4A1GvDBjXQDZ_aXollsESPpUT3WGt_URYtrqQCxKCh6uX62ljfmHSMSZ6OD3iGg2pUrON69ymUY1B6nbI8mLFBXGxsLBd1EwG_7LlgNFBnKTy9bR0pO71KrvUXJ9hjuIKGxdba-totVjARSkl00IcQHiA_5m27yM9vYcWHsGgsnxZTw7-20RG7AK9FASRPGgbfcXJMOgpCKqJ8bN6lgAILpEL8aPDdrVNs4kua8g28_ywPh6breDXX-_J4vjt865rxbMJXnyhmwvp-9WRMfYeKdpyy6FkX7lqU7zfmIYQlsNbrBVjqiGHKxYuoe2et4qBM1VywQpVzekVvBN9qQdLUFSnmUXYB7V0QJiRcgHIhSrRjzOJayrX-FrNVHI3L5ngpYxA2K_g%3D%3D)

You won’t believe what’s really going on.
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
---

If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. Should you wish to stop receiving emails from us, you can unsubscribe at any time by . This editorial email containing advertisements was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you have shown an interest in Financial Education topics. To ensure our emails continue reaching your inbox, please add our email address to your address book. Stark Media LLC appreciates your feedback and inquiries. However, please note that by law we are unable to provide individualized advice. | Unauthorized replication Stark Media LLC, duplication, or dissemination of our content, either entirely or partially, is strictly prohibited without prior written consent from Stark Media LLC. We appreciate your adherence to our intellectual property rights. If you require assistance, you can reach us via email at mailto:support@yourcapitalminds.com "support@yourcapitalminds.com". We are here to assist you at all times. We are located at 222 Delaware St, Ste 2071, New Castle, DE 19720.© 2025 Your Capital Minds. Аll rights reserved.

| Hi Peter,
Don your merriest holiday outfit and come celebrate the season with the MassGOP! We're decking the halls for a night of Christmas cheer, good company, and what's sure to be an exciting straw poll for Governor on Thursday, December 18 in Boston. Your personal invitation is tucked below like a present under the tree. 🎁✨
To RSVP and claim your straw-poll ballot, simply follow this link: [https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/christmasparty25](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014npBHjanBEnkrjcKCuoQgT-h4ROMrvje15IoDsQv3VzZ_UsmZIFni9XQ6UQVXf26Wm7gzu6wPiiNG-X7qZ_bdxbO9t2-KcPlqlhMkGVAmuMf6zl9w4FNrSmeSDbEgW9IL9xdbxRqo5obYAozlfVKaFkLggYH-rUg-UVTbABpoHDzcyNm5kjZuy6et5XMOabRbb_B-eBjvp-H9-EtzE7_FA==&c=taKotldTKnaoP-7Oi1tCHcImG5yI0k8w1lP6ccJQKO2JqnfAHdvsmg==&ch=GN5EFqgBEmWfYP97pjY4zdy2PHK6iH6aFWgaipOKTlNes61mZmLvXw==)
Or, email me directly to say you're coming at [haley@massgop.com](mailto:haley@massgop.com).
Votes must be cast in person.
If you're able to chip in a little extra, or haven't contributed yet this year, now is the perfect time. Best positioning Republicans for victory in 2026 is the best gift you can give to the MassGOP this holiday season: [https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/christmasparty25](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014npBHjanBEnkrjcKCuoQgT-h4ROMrvje15IoDsQv3VzZ_UsmZIFni9XQ6UQVXf26Wm7gzu6wPiiNG-X7qZ_bdxbO9t2-KcPlqlhMkGVAmuMf6zl9w4FNrSmeSDbEgW9IL9xdbxRqo5obYAozlfVKaFkLggYH-rUg-UVTbABpoHDzcyNm5kjZuy6et5XMOabRQz4mtkhSHbJQxoWzla3hAA==&c=taKotldTKnaoP-7Oi1tCHcImG5yI0k8w1lP6ccJQKO2JqnfAHdvsmg==&ch=GN5EFqgBEmWfYP97pjY4zdy2PHK6iH6aFWgaipOKTlNes61mZmLvXw==)
Can't wait to celebrate the magic of the season, our 2025 wins, and all that's to come in 2026.
See you on the 18th! Haley
Haley Jones Executive Director, Massachusetts Republican Party

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: Asking for my friends at GIFFORDS PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When I was 15, my life was changed when I learned about the shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251209-1-b&t=1&akid=11095%2E3935704%2E0BRy-Q)
---
Hi there -
My name is Maxwell Frost. I represent Florida’s 10th District in the US House of Representatives. I’m the first Gen-Z member of Congress, and I’ve been involved in the gun violence prevention movement for over a decade.
When I was 15, my life was changed when I learned about the shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut.
I was eating with my friends before a high school band concert when I saw the news. The tragedy called me to action, and I attended the vigil in Washington, D.C. where I met some of the loved ones of those who lost their lives.
Seeing their pain, I knew that I could not rest until we see a future free from gun violence. And so I became an organizer in the gun safety movement. Then three years after Sandy Hook, I became a survivor myself.
I was appointed a vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force in Congress—a position I’m honored to hold. We must enact transformative, commonsense legislation to end our country’s gun violence epidemic. That’s why I’m working hard every day in Congress to make gun safety a reality in our nation.
I’m grateful that organizations like GIFFORDS will be there to help me with this important effort. GIFFORDS is one of the organizations leading the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence. Like me, Gabby Giffords was inspired to dedicate her life to gun violence prevention a decade ago after the tragedy at Sandy Hook.
The team at GIFFORDS had my back during my election, and now I’m asking if you can step up today and support them before midnight.
[**Will you make a donation of any amount you can to GIFFORDS PAC? It all adds up to help fuel the work they do to help pass stronger gun laws and support candidates like me who will have the courage to act.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251209-1-b&t=2&akid=11095%2E3935704%2E0BRy-Q)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q42025.XBpxZs&refcode=em251209-1-b&t=22&akid=11095%2E3935704%2E0BRy-Q)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q42025.bzPEeG&refcode=em251209-1-b&t=23&akid=11095%2E3935704%2E0BRy-Q)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q42025.BnaACt&refcode=em251209-1-b&t=24&akid=11095%2E3935704%2E0BRy-Q)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-q42025.3xF0Vo&refcode=em251209-1-b&t=25&akid=11095%2E3935704%2E0BRy-Q)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&refcode=em251209-1-b&t=26&akid=11095%2E3935704%2E0BRy-Q)**
---
****
A future without gun violence is possible, but only if we work together. Thank you for joining me in this fight and supporting GIFFORDS.
\- Congressman Maxwell Frost
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251209-1-b&t=27&akid=11095%2E3935704%2E0BRy-Q)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=11095%2E3935704%2E0BRy-Q) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| In 2018, the last time Trump faced a midterm election, Democrats picked up 41 Congressional seats. Based on the massive overperformances by Democrats in elections across the country this year, Democrats should be on track for an even bigger blue wave...
Unfortunately, MAGA now holds an edge in redistricting. If it continues at its current pace it won't matter how many seats we flip, we will be at an unbeatable disadvantage, and we won't reclaim the House.
That means it doesn't matter how unpopular Trump becomes, his rigging of the 2026 midterms ensures that he will no longer have to face the voters to maintain his grip on power.

Mark our words, our system of free and fair elections is being torn apart at a pace so rapid that they will no longer exist by November 2026.
Our only shot at coming out of this with our Democracy intact is if we redistrict back. If done aggressively, not only do we survive but we beat them at their own game and ensure their plan backfires.
California and Virginia just joined the fight but if it's just them it will be too little too late. More blue states must come online with redistricts of their own in order for Democrats to stay on track to win the midterms and reclaim the House.
Colorado is now joining this fight. Fair Fight Colorado is introducing the ballot initiative that will give Coloradans the opportunity to vote on new maps that will make Colorado bluer and counteract Trump's redistricting efforts.
But by no means is success in Colorado guaranteed. It will be a steep uphill fight. Getting this on the ballot will require collecting hundreds of thousands of signatures and we expect MAGA to contest us over every single one of them. They will throw everything they have into stopping this.
We need to prepare for all out war. [If every person on our email list gave just $5 it would mean hundreds of thousands of dollars for this critical endeavor. Small dollars add up. Can you make a donation of $5, or whatever amount is meaningful to you, to get Democrats the resources we need to redistrict Colorado?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-KsE3p--L0R0qjQzZrXS27h5QW-jdsP1RENu4tZB_QtKQpgHDCuLvIzk5QIkF1FAs09V5clnwzJEFCDSTsJA1GYzvqugxM4RZh-wdofcoBM7-0X84rZaFPatO4rRgUufa0PrSe0zRYnj7O9zjMc3ZulhP7sxtJnJ05Od3fDIu4bXKYvIAcNng7EZwLAPSLCDcT4MPZyHli-W01ONmlvOM1SqK-sKeuBA&c=Jd9BMlmnrot1HsbDA-eXK_a05b5NiHuglgGAJN3-6TGI-fGigca57A==&ch=KM5Wkj2sERgvszln7aFAlfAzwDxmz6HPJ0X1iCau2AhhcK8Zqq0L1A==)

body:
| Democrats only need to flip FOUR Senate seats to win back the majority.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5144%2E35263%2EIjlgfR)
Friend, can we make a simple ask? Democrats only need to flip FOUR Senate seats to win back the majority — and today we’re asking you to pitch in $1 for each of those seats. **[That’s just $4.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2527?c0=stb-em-dec25.9SjycO&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251209_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5144%2E35263%2EIjlgfR)** | | [DONATE $4](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2527?c0=stb-em-dec25.9SjycO&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251209_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5144%2E35263%2EIjlgfR)
---
Voters showed up this November to reject Trump’s agenda and elect Democrats. We proved we can win.
Now, Republicans will pour millions into protecting their majority and advancing policies that roll back our rights and help the wealthy. _That means our Democratic candidates are in trouble._
**But we can give them a run for their money with just $4 at a time from grassroots supporters like you._We mean it_ — when people give what they can, it adds up fast!**
****[Tammy is fighting to help Democrats win back the Senate majority. If you’re able, can you chip in $4 (that’s just $1 for each seat!) to help us flip the four seats we need to take back the majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2527?c0=stb-em-dec25.9SjycO&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251209_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5144%2E35263%2EIjlgfR)****

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: I just launched this historic campaign, and I need you with me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA
body:
| Y'all, it's Jasmine. I'm running for the United States Senate because Texas deserves a fighter who won't back down. You know me. I didn't come to Congress to play it safe. I came to raise hell for working families, protect our freedoms, and call out extremism wherever it rears its head. Now, with the stakes higher than ever - a madman in the White House and his most loyal foot soldiers in Congress giving him carte blanche - _I 'm stepping up again. _This time, to flip a Senate seat that Republicans have held for far too long. **Let me be blunt: Texas is ready.** [**If you 're ready, watch my launch video and then rush a donation between my campaign and Shawn Harris**** help us have a historic first week >>** ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/UVZ7CsnMZ6I_uZ34gPYXcA~~/AAPPABA~/Col-HKz03Lmde5nhTQvKsu0m01_GXQkcN17MF5pUOrfHzhNLGFaEDeJb-BzT0d9LzYzzgEmabwycVrkS5hcwBnrwPkoZOR9td5ry0VNEES9YflJ75As9ROYbyg_qOH_qYwsO37Ck18cX0f0icGQrS4cRSFoBVJeCLRByY4HdS0S5DRzuSz30j_DSxxcDUoqN510aFG5xZ_U2eN51FaqMU8GIasIe2FsTIqJO878mG45EGCaOkCFxgQq_f8BAf81WkQlYu0UNv0iUXiFShD0e2DrrFh94xOWA4z5xDA8lLRUXNcbajDmFEaSC0A9W5fOWfWJJPksOa2dphAw1so8k11O5XObGJVsfK95ypZM9mPY~)

| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/UVZ7CsnMZ6I_uZ34gPYXcA~~/AAPPABA~/Col-HKz03Lmde5nhTQvKsu0m01_GXQkcN17MF5pUOrfHzhNLGFaEDeJb-BzT0d9LzYzzgEmabwycVrkS5hcwBnrwPkoZOR9td5ry0VNEES9YflJ75As9ROYbyg_qOH_qYwsO37Ck18cX0f0icGQrS4cRSFoBVJeCLRByY4HdS0S5DRzuSz30j_DSxxcDUoqN510aFG5xZ_U2eN51FaqMU8GIasIe2FsTIqJO878mG45EGCaOkCFxgQq_f8BAf81WkQlYu0UNv0iUXiFShD0e2DrrFh94xOWA4z5xDA8lLRUXNcbajDmFEaSC0A9W5fOWfWJJPksOa2dphAw1so8k11O5XObGJVsfK95ypZM9mPY~)
---
Texas is younger, more diverse, and more energized than at any point in our history. We've seen what happens when Republicans hold all the power - attacks on voting rights, a near-total abortion ban, book bans, cruelty, and a government run for the wealthy and well-connected. Meanwhile, everyday Texans are working harder than ever and falling further behind. Folks, _I 'm over it._ I'm running because I believe Texas deserves a Senator who actually gives a damn. A Senator who shows up. A Senator who fights for justice, for working people, and for the truth. A Senator who isn't afraid to say the quiet part out loud when extremists in Austin and Washington come after our rights. But I'll be honest: this race will not be easy. Not by a long shot. Republicans will spend whatever it takes to stop us. They know that if Texas flips, the entire national map changes for 2026 and beyond. **That 's why I need you. Not next month, not later this week. ****_Right now_****.****We need a historic first week. ** [**If you 're with me, show that you have my back today by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Shawn Harris ****to help me kick off this campaign with the strength we need to win in Texas.**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/UVZ7CsnMZ6I_uZ34gPYXcA~~/AAPPABA~/Col-HKz03Lmde5nhTQvKsu0m01_GXQkcN17MF5pUOrfHzhNLGFaEDeJb-BzT0d9LzYzzgEmabwycVrkS5hcwBnrwPkoZOR9td5ry0VNEES9YflJ75As9ROYbyg_qOH_qYwsO37Ck18cX0f0icGQrS4cRSFoBVJeCLRByY4HdS0S5DRzuSz30j_DSxxcDUoqN510aFG5xZ_U2eN51FaqMU8GIasIe2FsTIqJO878mG45EGCaOkCFxgQq_f8BAf81WkQlYu0UNv0iUXiFShD0e2DrrFh94xOWA4z5xDA8lLRUXNcbajDmFEaSC0A9W5fOWfWJJPksOa2dphAw1so8k11O5XObGJVsfK95ypZM9mPY~)

clean_body: | Y'all, it's Jasmine. I'm running for the United States Senate because Texas deserves a fighter who won't back down. You know me. I didn't come to Congress to play it safe. I came to raise hell for working families, protect our freedoms, and call out extremism wherever it rears its head. Now, with the stakes higher than ever - a madman in the White House and his most loyal foot soldiers in Congress giving him carte blanche - I 'm stepping up again. This time, to flip a Senate seat that Republicans have held for far too long. Let me be blunt: Texas is ready. ~ | ~ Texas is younger, more diverse, and more energized than at any point in our history. We've seen what happens when Republicans hold all the power - attacks on voting rights, a near-total abortion ban, book bans, cruelty, and a government run for the wealthy and well-connected. Meanwhile, everyday Texans are working harder than ever and falling further behind. Folks, I 'm over it. I'm running because I believe Texas deserves a Senator who actually gives a damn. A Senator who shows up. A Senator who fights for justice, for working people, and for the truth. A Senator who isn't afraid to say the quiet part out loud when extremists in Austin and Washington come after our rights. But I'll be honest: this race will not be easy. Not by a long shot. Republicans will spend whatever it takes to stop us. They know that if Texas flips, the entire national map changes for 2026 and beyond. That 's why I need you. Not next month, not later this week. Right now.We need a historic first week. ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ I'm running because I believe Texas is worth fighting for. And I know that with the momentum Democrats have right now combined with the power of this team, we can make history next year. With gratitude and fire, Jasmine | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Where Things Stand
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501306152%2501Senate%2bUpdate_%2bWhere%2bThings%2bStand%250115418.58222326.7624336.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501306152%2501Senate%2bUpdate_%2bWhere%2bThings%2bStand%250115418.58222326.7624336.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **December 9, 2025** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
## Senate Update: Where Things Stand
As Maryland families gather for the holidays, too many are struggling to cover rising costs -- rent, groceries, health and energy bills. Federal employees and contractors are still trying to bounce back from Trump's shutdown and the relentless attacks on our federal workforce. And communities across our country are bearing the burden of Trump's harmful policies. In the new year, thousands of Marylanders will see their health insurance premiums increase or lose their insurance coverage entirely because Trump and Republicans are refusing to extend Affordable Care Act (ACA) premium tax credits. Donald Trump promised that on day one of his Administration he would start to drive down prices and address the affordability crisis -- but he has reneged on those promises. Instead of helping working families, he's spent the year boosting powerful special interests and his billionaire buddies. He is gutting health care to help pay for tax giveaways to the ultra-rich and making corrupt deals with foreign governments to secure financial gains for his family and friends. I refuse to accept this corruption. I believe in a government that serves all people, not just ultra-wealthy people. Here's the latest on my work to fight back.
### Republicans' Refusal to Stop an Explosion of Health Care Costs
We're running out of time to prevent an explosion of health care costs. When Trump and Republicans passed their "Big Beautiful Bill" over the summer, they permanently extended tax cuts for billionaires and the super-wealthy, but let the ACA premium tax credits that help millions afford their health care expire at the end of the year. In other words, Republicans refused to defuse a ticking time bomb on Americans' health care. Because of their refusal to extend the ACA premium tax credits, nearly 4 million Americans will lose their insurance, premiums will skyrocket for over 20 million Americans, and costs will rise for everyone. Unless Trump and Republicans in Congress change course, premiums will rise by 35% on average for approximately 190,000 Marylanders who currently receive these tax credits, and 30,000 Marylanders are expected to lose their health insurance entirely because they will no longer be able to afford it. You may have already received a renewal notice about your rising health care premiums for 2026. Congress needs to act now to extend these tax credits and stop these health care costs from skyrocketing before it is too late. But defusing this time bomb isn't enough. Let's face it, we have a broken health care system. We spend nearly 18% of our economy every year on health care. We rack up huge bills just trying to navigate the paperwork. But the health outcomes don't show meaningful benefits -- not to Americans' life expectancy, and not to our access to quality care. We're not getting what we're paying for. So, we shouldn't just be tinkering with the broken system. Let's finally get it right. I agree with those -- including the President -- who say we should get rid of the middlemen that drive up everyone's costs. It's time to build a system of universal health care that's focused on people instead of profits. That's why I believe now is the time to [pass Medicare For All.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fbsky.app%2fprofile%2fvanhollen.senate.gov%2fpost%2f3m6xkwvnvlc2o&redir_log=623457000836450)
### Fighting for Students with Disabilities
50 years ago, Congress passed the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act, or IDEA, which guaranteed the right to a free, quality public education for children with disabilities. This was a watershed moment for our country. On this anniversary, I'm grateful for everyone who has helped to realize the goals of IDEA, including students with disabilities, families and caregivers, teachers, paraprofessionals, researchers, advocates, and so many more. Click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fyoutu.be%2figh8Kw4YeVA&redir_log=200690743873188) to watch my remarks about IDEA on the Senate Floor. I am also glad to report that my bipartisan resolution commemorating this anniversary [passed the Senate](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-cassidy-announce-senate-passage-of-bipartisan-resolution-recognizing-the-50th-anniversary-of-the-individuals-with-disabilities-education-act&redir_log=170310018941437) last week.

But even as we celebrate IDEA's 50th anniversary, we must remember that we have a long way to go to meet its promise. In 1975, Congress pledged to fund IDEA at 40% of the cost per pupil. We've never come close. Today, we fund IDEA at less than 12% of the cost per pupil, leaving schools and students short a whopping $38 billion every year. For many years, I've [introduced legislation that would fully fund IDEA](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2f04%2f07%2f2025%2fvan-hollen-huffman-introduce-bill-to-fully-fund-special-education&redir_log=433957172287891) -- and I will keep fighting until my bill becomes law. We teach students to keep their promises, and the federal government should do as we say.
### Demanding a Foreign Policy that Aligns with Our Values
The new [National Security Strategy issued by the Trump Administration](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1997419171098099909%3fs%3d20&redir_log=193161617218361) represents a huge retreat from principles that have long guided our relations with the world. As a member of the Foreign Relations Committee, I believe that US foreign policy should reflect American values, especially our support of human rights, freedom, democracy, and the rule of law. And that means we must have the courage and consistency to apply those standards not only to our foes, but also to our friends. But too often, we're coming up short.

The Trump Administration is trying to pressure Ukraine into a [so-called peace deal](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fbsky.app%2fprofile%2fvanhollen.senate.gov%2fpost%2f3m662jwsodk2s&redir_log=374841056045442) that would reward Russia for its aggression and encourage Putin to start more wars in the future. Trump's billionaire buddies have lucrative financial ties to Russia, and -- surprise, surprise -- the negotiations seem to put their business interests ahead of our collective national interests and universal human rights. It is repulsive to see this coming from an American president. I'm fighting back.

Off the coast of Venezuela, Trump appears to be on the verge of starting a war. For months, he has ordered the US military to attack boats in the Caribbean Sea that he claims are carrying "narco-terrorists" smuggling drugs to the United States. Yet his Administration has provided no evidence, and, at the same time, the President is issuing presidential pardons to convicted drug kingpins. There is much that the Trump Administration could do to fight the plague of drug addiction in America. But instead of focusing on ways to help Americans, Trump is starting a dangerous conflict overseas. He authorized covert CIA action in Venezuela, threatening to repeat all our country's worst mistakes in Latin America. And he's amassing the largest US military buildup in the region in decades, openly threatening a regime-change war that would risk the lives of American troops and innocent Venezuelan civilians. While the President has the authority to defend the United States from imminent attack, there is no such threat of attack from Venezuela, nor from these boats in international waters. The extrajudicial killings of the individuals on these boats are nothing more than state-sanctioned murder by the Trump Administration.

Donald Trump is not a king; he does not have the power to start foreign wars without provocation. That's why [I joined Senators from both parties](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dhGZqLShqd7g&redir_log=87665232205297) in voting to stop Trump's march to war, but MAGA Republicans blocked us from holding the President accountable. Despite this setback, we must not let Trump drag us into yet another war.

In Sudan, violence continues to roil the nation as hundreds of thousands of civilians have lost their lives in the current civil war. This war has been fueled in large part by a militia group called the Rapid Support Forces (RSF), which both the Trump and Biden Administrations have determined to be committing genocide in Darfur. The RSF is being propped up by weapons from the United Arab Emirates (UAE). While the UAE is an important US partner in many domains, we cannot look the other way while they enable genocide. But instead of holding the UAE accountable, [Donald Trump is rewarding the UAE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1997386272495563041%3fs%3d20&redir_log=276976781805360) with American weapons and the crown jewels of American technology -- and the UAE is buying Trump's favor by signing massive cryptocurrency deals with his family. That's why I brought up legislation I've introduced to [cease US arms sales to the UAE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dxzHSSTAffcY&redir_log=238998118279298) unless they stop supporting the RSF and fueling the ongoing genocide. Republicans blocked my bill, but I'll keep fighting to use our leverage to end the bloodshed in Sudan.

In addition to these conflicts, I continue to closely monitor the promised ceasefire in Gaza. I remain deeply concerned about the lack of full enforcement of even the first phase of the ceasefire as the loss of Palestinian civilian lives and the dire humanitarian situation continue.

At the same time, I've continued to speak out about increasing violence on the West Bank and the treatment of Palestinians and others held by the Government of Israel. That includes an American citizen, Mohammed Ibrahim, a 16-year-old boy who was beaten and imprisoned for 9 months, without a trial, by the Netanyahu government. I repeatedly pressed the Netanyahu government to release Mohammed -- including when I visited Israel and the West Bank in August, where I met with Mohammed's family. I also [pressed the Trump Administration](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-merkley-castor-frost-lead-colleagues-in-pressing-trump-administration-on-detention-of-16-year-old-us-citizen-by-israel&redir_log=461560567181271) to use its leverage to free Mohammed and to uphold its duty to prioritize the safety of American citizens abroad. I was hugely relieved when, on Thanksgiving, [Mohammed was released and reunited with his family.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fbsky.app%2fprofile%2fvanhollen.senate.gov%2fpost%2f3m6n6wynet22x&redir_log=535229716157443)
### Trump's Assault on our Immigrant Communities
Trump is not only abandoning our values abroad -- he's doing the same here at home. His recent racist, bigoted attacks on our immigrant communities are only spurring more hate and division in our nation -- and they're a blatant attempt to distract from his bad marks from the American people on the state of our economy. Instead of blaming him, Trump wants you to blame your neighbors, who -- unlike President Trump -- have nothing to do with the rising prices Americans are seeing in their energy, health care, and grocery bills. This tactic of attack and distract is despicable, but it's one of Trump's favorite moves to bully and belittle immigrants.

I will continue to support our immigrant communities, here in Maryland and around the country. President Trump claimed that his immigration policies were targeting the "worst of the worst." While I am for prosecuting and removing violent criminals, the overwhelming majority of Trump's targets pose no threat to public safety. Indeed, we have seen this Administration harass and abduct pastors, veterans, small business owners, and many other innocent people who contribute to our communities every day. Let me be clear: these actions aren't making our neighborhoods any safer.
### Delivering for Maryland Communities
While I've been deeply disappointed by Congressional Republicans' approach to funding our government -- including their refusal to enact guardrails to prevent the Trump Administration from redirecting Congressionally-mandated funds -- I do have some good news for Marylanders: the three FY 2026 funding bills that have passed included some of the provisions I've worked on within the Senate Appropriations Committee, and I was able to secure direct investments for our local communities within these bills. These include:
* Provisions to support the [continued operations of the Beltsville Agricultural Research Center (BARC)](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-alsobrooks-announce-protections-for-barc-and-over-25-million-in-direct-funding-for-local-projects-supporting-economic-development-emergency-response-veterans-infrastructure_more&redir_log=644676911641711) in Prince George's County - which has been targeted for closure by the Trump Administration, along with $6 million to modernize aging buildings on its campus.
* [$3 million for invasive wild-caught catfish processing and inspection,](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-alsobrooks-announce-protections-for-barc-and-over-25-million-in-direct-funding-for-local-projects-supporting-economic-development-emergency-response-veterans-infrastructure_more&redir_log=644676911641711) which will help the Chesapeake Bay ecosystem, support Maryland watermen, and give Marylanders a healthy protein source.
* [Over $670 million for military installations across Maryland,](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-alsobrooks-announce-over-670-million-for-maryland-military-installations&redir_log=18878352117960) including National Guard vehicle maintenance shops in Washington and Harford Counties and a contained burn facility to responsibly dispose of unexploded ordnance at Naval Support Facility Indian Head. We also secured a $250 million increase to veteran homelessness programs and $945 million for the VA's medical and prosthetics research.
* [Over $25 million to support community projects throughout the state,](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-alsobrooks-announce-protections-for-barc-and-over-25-million-in-direct-funding-for-local-projects-supporting-economic-development-emergency-response-veterans-infrastructure_more&redir_log=644676911641711) including emergency response programs, veterans' initiatives, economic development projects, infrastructure modernization, and more.

During these difficult times, I'm also always looking for ways to highlight exceptional Marylanders who bring joy to our communities. That's why Senator Alsobrooks and I -- along with Congressman Raskin in the House -- are working to [rename the US Post Office in Olney after Edward Ramsey,](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-alsobrooks-introduce-bill-to-rename-post-office-in-olney-after-beloved-employee-edward-ramsey&redir_log=570278434061104) an Army veteran who worked there for 27 years. Ed Ramsey was a public servant through and through, joining the Army to defend our nation, then going on to serve his community in the local post office for many years. During those years, he was the welcoming and genuinely friendly presence that his neighbors looked forward to finding when they walked through the doors of the Olney Post Office -- so much so that many of those who came to know him launched a grassroots effort to rename it in his memory after his passing. I'm honored to stand with them -- it's a fitting tribute for a good man who made a lasting impact on his community.
### Thank You
In December of 1776, just months after the Declaration of Independence, George Washington's army teetered on the edge of defeat. Our new republic seemed doomed to end before it began. In those dark days, the great patriot Thomas Paine wrote these immortal words:

"These are the times that try men's souls: The summer soldier and the sunshine patriot will, in this crisis, shrink from the service of his country; but he that stands it now, deserves the love and thanks of man and woman."

I've seen you standing up. I've seen you standing up in every corner of our state, from Mountain Maryland to the Eastern Shore and all points in between. I've read your letters, heard your voices at town halls, and joined your marches. I know that even after a long, difficult year, you and our fellow patriots are just getting started. In these dark times, you are what gives me hope.

Onwards! Chris Van Hollen
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100064&__crop=15418.58222326.7624336.7517223)
|
