Yet his Administration has provided no evidence, and, at the same time, the President is issuing presidential pardons to convicted drug kingpins. There is much that the Trump Administration could do to fight the plague of drug addiction in America. But instead of focusing on ways to help Americans, Trump is starting a dangerous conflict overseas. He authorized covert CIA action in Venezuela, threatening to repeat all our country's worst mistakes in Latin America. And he's amassing the largest US military buildup in the region in decades, openly threatening a regime-change war that would risk the lives of American troops and innocent Venezuelan civilians. While the President has the authority to defend the United States from imminent attack, there is no such threat of attack from Venezuela, nor from these boats in international waters. The extrajudicial killings of the individuals on these boats are nothing more than state-sanctioned murder by the Trump Administration. Donald Trump is not a king; he does not have the power to start foreign wars without provocation. That's why in voting to stop Trump's march to war, but MAGA Republicans blocked us from holding the President accountable. Despite this setback, we must not let Trump drag us into yet another war. In Sudan, violence continues to roil the nation as hundreds of thousands of civilians have lost their lives in the current civil war. This war has been fueled in large part by a militia group called the Rapid Support Forces (RSF), which both the Trump and Biden Administrations have determined to be committing genocide in Darfur. The RSF is being propped up by weapons from the United Arab Emirates (UAE). While the UAE is an important US partner in many domains, we cannot look the other way while they enable genocide. But instead of holding the UAE accountable, with American weapons and the crown jewels of American technology -- and the UAE is buying Trump's favor by signing massive cryptocurrency deals with his family. That's why I brought up legislation I've introduced to unless they stop supporting the RSF and fueling the ongoing genocide. Republicans blocked my bill, but I'll keep fighting to use our leverage to end the bloodshed in Sudan. In addition to these conflicts, I continue to closely monitor the promised ceasefire in Gaza. I remain deeply concerned about the lack of full enforcement of even the first phase of the ceasefire as the loss of Palestinian civilian lives and the dire humanitarian situation continue. At the same time, I've continued to speak out about increasing violence on the West Bank and the treatment of Palestinians and others held by the Government of Israel. That includes an American citizen, Mohammed Ibrahim, a 16-year-old boy who was beaten and imprisoned for 9 months, without a trial, by the Netanyahu government. I repeatedly pressed the Netanyahu government to release Mohammed -- including when I visited Israel and the West Bank in August, where I met with Mohammed's family. I also to use its leverage to free Mohammed and to uphold its duty to prioritize the safety of American citizens abroad. I was hugely relieved when, on Thanksgiving, Trump's Assault on our Immigrant Communities Trump is not only abandoning our values abroad -- he's doing the same here at home. His recent racist, bigoted attacks on our immigrant communities are only spurring more hate and division in our nation -- and they're a blatant attempt to distract from his bad marks from the American people on the state of our economy. Instead of blaming him, Trump wants you to blame your neighbors, who -- unlike President Trump -- have nothing to do with the rising prices Americans are seeing in their energy, health care, and grocery bills. This tactic of attack and distract is despicable, but it's one of Trump's favorite moves to bully and belittle immigrants. I will continue to support our immigrant communities, here in Maryland and around the country. President Trump claimed that his immigration policies were targeting the "worst of the worst." While I am for prosecuting and removing violent criminals, the overwhelming majority of Trump's targets pose no threat to public safety. Indeed, we have seen this Administration harass and abduct pastors, veterans, small business owners, and many other innocent people who contribute to our communities every day. Let me be clear: these actions aren't making our neighborhoods any safer. Delivering for Maryland Communities While I've been deeply disappointed by Congressional Republicans' approach to funding our government -- including their refusal to enact guardrails to prevent the Trump Administration from redirecting Congressionally-mandated funds -- I do have some good news for Marylanders: the three FY 2026 funding bills that have passed included some of the provisions I've worked on within the Senate Appropriations Committee, and I was able to secure direct investments for our local communities within these bills. These include: Provisions to support the in Prince George's County - which has been targeted for closure by the Trump Administration, along with $6 million to modernize aging buildings on its campus. which will help the Chesapeake Bay ecosystem, support Maryland watermen, and give Marylanders a healthy protein source. including National Guard vehicle maintenance shops in Washington and Harford Counties and a contained burn facility to responsibly dispose of unexploded ordnance at Naval Support Facility Indian Head. We also secured a $250 million increase to veteran homelessness programs and $945 million for the VA's medical and prosthetics research. including emergency response programs, veterans' initiatives, economic development projects, infrastructure modernization, and more. During these difficult times, I'm also always looking for ways to highlight exceptional Marylanders who bring joy to our communities. That's why Senator Alsobrooks and I -- along with Congressman Raskin in the House -- are working to an Army veteran who worked there for 27 years. Ed Ramsey was a public servant through and through, joining the Army to defend our nation, then going on to serve his community in the local post office for many years. During those years, he was the welcoming and genuinely friendly presence that his neighbors looked forward to finding when they walked through the doors of the Olney Post Office -- so much so that many of those who came to know him launched a grassroots effort to rename it in his memory after his passing. I'm honored to stand with them -- it's a fitting tribute for a good man who made a lasting impact on his community. Thank You In December of 1776, just months after the Declaration of Independence, George Washington's army teetered on the edge of defeat. Our new republic seemed doomed to end before it began. In those dark days, the great patriot Thomas Paine wrote these immortal words: "These are the times that try men's souls: The summer soldier and the sunshine patriot will, in this crisis, shrink from the service of his country; but he that stands it now, deserves the love and thanks of man and woman." I've seen you standing up. I've seen you standing up in every corner of our state, from Mountain Maryland to the Eastern Shore and all points in between. I've read your letters, heard your voices at town halls, and joined your marches. I know that even after a long, difficult year, you and our fellow patriots are just getting started. In these dark times, you are what gives me hope. Onwards! Chris Van Hollen |

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Trump is scared of me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Trump is TERRIFIED of the incredible grassroots momentum we're building together – and he should be.
| | |
---
Whether or not he admits it, friend, it's pretty clear Trump is scared of Coloradans like you and me.
He's singled us out for ensuring every eligible citizen can participate in our democracy through mail-in voting – and he's **punishing** workers and active-duty service members in our state by moving the U.S. Space Command HQ to Alabama over the issue.
And he's refusing to send congressionally allocated money for Colorado to administer food stamps – **starving** at-risk Coloradans because we don’t share recipients' private information (which we've never been required to share before) that could help his administration surveil and target folks in our state.
So after I single-handedly **blocked** 88 unqualified nominees from confirmation last week, I can already hear the unhinged accusations Trump will levy at me.
My track record is proof that nothing stops me when it comes to protecting Coloradans from his cruel and out-of-touch agenda. **He's scared that I’m going to use every tool I have to push back against his lawless agenda as governor, just as I have in the Senate. **
**He's scared that under my leadership****, Colorado will be at the vanguard of the firewall of states that put an end to his chaotic regime.**
So as the governor's race gets into full swing, _I know_ he'll make me one of Republicans' top targets for defeat – and that means rallying his billionaire MAGA allies to flood this race with millions to stop me.** Because more than anything, Trump is TERRIFIED of the incredible grassroots momentum we're building together.**
Good. He should be – we won't let him off the hook so easily.
But since I don't rely on shady special interest donors for funding, I can't make good on that promise unless I can count on Coloradans like _you_ to power this movement to victory.
**[So, friend, will you pitch in $5 or more now to ensure we strike _real_ fear into Trump’s heart when we win this thing?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120934543/587827614/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1013-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQxZWUyZS0yMWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4DJk3MpT8LhVrW0KRQ7bpBww49Nhbep-_dEk36VHJ_w=)**

clean_body: Trump is TERRIFIED of the incredible grassroots momentum we're building together – and he should be. | | | Whether or not he admits it, friend, it's pretty clear Trump is scared of Coloradans like you and me. He's singled us out for ensuring every eligible citizen can participate in our democracy through mail-in voting – and he's punishing workers and active-duty service members in our state by moving the U.S. Space Command HQ to Alabama over the issue. And he's refusing to send congressionally allocated money for Colorado to administer food stamps – starving at-risk Coloradans because we don’t share recipients' private information (which we've never been required to share before) that could help his administration surveil and target folks in our state. So after I single-handedly blocked 88 unqualified nominees from confirmation last week, I can already hear the unhinged accusations Trump will levy at me. My track record is proof that nothing stops me when it comes to protecting Coloradans from his cruel and out-of-touch agenda. He's scared that I’m going to use every tool I have to push back against his lawless agenda as governor, just as I have in the Senate. He's scared that under my leadership, Colorado will be at the vanguard of the firewall of states that put an end to his chaotic regime. So as the governor's race gets into full swing, I know he'll make me one of Republicans' top targets for defeat – and that means rallying his billionaire MAGA allies to flood this race with millions to stop me. Because more than anything, Trump is TERRIFIED of the incredible grassroots momentum we're building together. Good. He should be – we won't let him off the hook so easily. But since I don't rely on shady special interest donors for funding, I can't make good on that promise unless I can count on Coloradans like you to power this movement to victory. = | | = Thanks for everything, Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: Haley Stevens
subject: They’re spending $80 million to ban abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I’m not backing down

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1605%2E49239%2E4hB5Lb)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10211?t=2&akid=1605%2E49239%2E4hB5Lb)
---
null, it’s Haley.

I want to talk to you for a moment, not as a politician running for office, but as a woman from Michigan.
You may have seen the news: **An anti-abortion group just announced they’re going to spend $80 million to help Republicans win the Senate. And they’ve named Michigan a top target.**
They’re launching ads and door-to-door campaigns to support MAGA extremists who back a near-total abortion ban – like my opponent Mike Rogers.

Let me be clear: I’ve spent my career fighting for reproductive freedom. I’ve stood with Planned Parenthood, I’ve defended access to care, and I’ve worked to restore the rights we had under Roe.
And I’m not going to stop now.

This is personal.

**_[If you’re with me, will you rush $5 to help me fight back and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10212?t=3&akid=1605%2E49239%2E4hB5Lb)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10213?t=4&akid=1605%2E49239%2E4hB5Lb)
---
Here’s the bottom line: This race could decide control of the Senate. It could decide whether abortion rights survive in our country.

Mike Rogers has Trump’s endorsement and the backing of a MAGA Texas billionaire.
But I’ve got you.

So if you believe in reproductive freedom, I’m urgently asking you to **stand with me.[Rush $5 now to help us win this race and keep Michigan blue. ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10212?t=5&akid=1605%2E49239%2E4hB5Lb)**
With grit,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10214?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1605%2E49239%2E4hB5Lb) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10211?t=7&akid=1605%2E49239%2E4hB5Lb)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Haaland
subject: The most competitive race in New Mexico history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Republicans are closing the margin of victory in New Mexico — we can’t let 2026 be the year they win.
| | |
---
We need to be honest with you, friend:
New Mexico’s elections have become _a lot_ more competitive over these last few years — **and chances are this race is going to be _very_ close.**
In 2018, our Democratic governor won by 15 points — but in 2022, that margin was cut in half. And in 2024, Donald Trump came within six points of winning our state.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1595?t=1&akid=6072%2E400544%2EvkSrmA)
That’s dangerously close — and a clear warning: **New Mexico is not a safe blue state.** Deb’s victory is anything but guaranteed, and Republicans will do anything they can to flip our state red.
**That’s why we aren’t waiting — we’re investing in statewide organizing right now to reach every voter.**[**Will you chip in $5 (or more if you can) to help? Early action and investment is how we’ll win in a close race.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1595?t=2&akid=6072%2E400544%2EvkSrmA)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1596?t=3&akid=6072%2E400544%2EvkSrmA)
---
| | [Donate $35](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1597?t=4&akid=6072%2E400544%2EvkSrmA)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1598?t=5&akid=6072%2E400544%2EvkSrmA)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1595?t=6&akid=6072%2E400544%2EvkSrmA)
---
Deb knows there’s too much at stake to take anything for granted. She’s traveled to all 33 counties across the state, stood alongside healthcare workers fighting for better wages, listened to people struggling with accessible healthcare and affordability, safety in their communities, and more. She’s fighting to change the game for New Mexico — but she can’t do it alone.
Democrats’ margins are shrinking, and Republicans know they’re within striking distance. Unprecedented dark money, attack ads, and misinformation are coming. We need to show up, be ready for what’s to come, and have Deb’s back.
[**Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help give Deb the resources to reach every voter, fight for every community, and build a brighter future for New Mexico?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1595?t=7&akid=6072%2E400544%2EvkSrmA)
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1595?t=8&akid=6072%2E400544%2EvkSrmA)
---
Thank you for your support.
— Team Haaland
|

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: Switching places with a Navy SEAL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ffbc4ab88b73466686364c6e4f6817cb&_e=5R1ogvY_RO8k7UYgFG59bWFcIPhb4YLII6F4anSFckwgizUXdNVmvQGuGSBa7hU7FEjCLW5a9ygstTT6bGiAdT-V6hHMSsDwCWRjcBT_Q-LL4jgThbIjue4RC5cy2cG5U4PZOSOLBW2oXhDucJcwxyLMrm04BgjNKCV7dXYoPpbWb55Udc5VR0OYfx85fsdqVolisafWM2Fb9lUgUFjaEgtZNvS-Bur4VL2ipMrlirHgkgnuDOSok7qkKxircwk5B2NgpGNPym_139z2LqAZ4tuzsslZuHz4rawrLmiPgA_PCk7CzbXMj8gnvfPjRFlXAFjnk-tzw-LXxPvFMgWlXnPdq11MLdvd5XWGMG-LQcx8wUWPrqGWVBE0gt0Oao2AL1KRe1J20GUxBDInuJ161a8JY73nFY1gq8U6GVdFLS9sgPmzlC7wjltbjV7bXscAz_Z_QbImKAUMCsa7Uv0VZt9GJembjzc4k31IbLbRfpGDEHiEMdgGM7dhJxuuOCdEYIZ4hT5n5UpMRMH8Lc0NkuGGziXuh9HkwnRoSwcfscLImHY4929YiLxVdxCdUEZLBplkyEfE32OnWZxRsu6ErRBPFtD7ino9JHOOc08NuJ5tJe4zIIhw-rxYJDzSJj9_SBnvBLb4n7p9IbR5jdotxTWZW9z3-msn64A3x0Cef_pAfX0iXZ8a03ZqNsBDxeBZkMxkgExz3tHNzkEyX_7YulMdidgtzVxOmFWd_8EqYFU%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Imagine, for a moment, **switching shoes with an active-duty Navy SEAL.**

The satellite phone rang at 3:00 a.m. local time.

You’re in a 20-foot shipping container turned command post, somewhere in the Horn of Africa you never see on a map.

_**No staff. No teleprompter. No second chances.**_

One of our teams was pinned down.

Bad guys closing in.

Decision time: **extract now and risk the helo, or hold and risk the men.**

You make the call. You get every American home.

_**That’s what a real 3 A.M. decision feels like.**_

_[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ffbc4ab88b73466686364c6e4f6817cb&_e=5R1ogvY_RO8k7UYgFG59bWFcIPhb4YLII6F4anSFckwgizUXdNVmvQGuGSBa7hU7FEjCLW5a9ygstTT6bGiAdT-V6hHMSsDwCWRjcBT_Q-LL4jgThbIjue4RC5cy2cG5U4PZOSOLBW2oXhDucJcwxyLMrm04BgjNKCV7dXYoPpbWb55Udc5VR0OYfx85fsdqVolisafWM2Fb9lUgUFjaEgtZNvS-Bur4VL2ipMrlirHgkgnuDOSok7qkKxircwk5NB1uRwkfbwD3T4IwGhoNw7qCYglhX3fDESnw0eNdF98a7D2_pvxgakueHbkDvY6tQmBrH1f8KgddSLElDRElAJwXJFwnEZmEwKI-WvInqhpRqmhQR8N3Cs31HdfmFIUQR_aJelX_RQnURFOtv5yc9SINPoY1WffMlFPHK2ZwYD9bTD1PymOIGvtDoSExh-3-5WUo-y2_7nsqZiCXQrXPvz5WZLsLv8l3lSV2crfmgknjM_vHFmY-Pjux7WxqSQuyqS83v6aIB66ZSj1JZV785k0HJD-_VcaSSbHsib6pVbK1lgY4m2eUs0N37I9HwDn9gonHEPHMFl_sC39c7y8V-hxf73J2kMrBDBdkvbW3alv-ga0kOJJJPBQbE88YyxTAYcb_j-XFJw06Txd48bwXGrjnOvQ4lHYYWH8M4GRRVMHwTPd07Gn1IsQqWxAMi10aOZXlF4MpGP4gtrlrm5yM1dkEKapCxhPhW9FoKiQ5WyE%3D)_
Now, Minnesota faces its own 3 A.M. moments—only the phone is ringing in **Minneapolis, St. Cloud, Duluth.**

1. **_A 74% spike in carjackings since 2020._**

2. **_Illegals with criminal records released into our neighborhoods because Walz-Flanagan sued to defund ICE detention._**

3. **_Small-town hospitals are closing because state mandates crushed rural budgets._**

But this isn’t just happening in Minnesota - it’s happening all across the country. In big cities, small towns, and in state capitals, with out-of-touch career politicians leading the charge.

_**That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - because Americans need a battle-tested former Navy SEAL, like me, ready to take the tough 3:00 a.m. calls that are commonplace at the highest levels of government. **_

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ffbc4ab88b73466686364c6e4f6817cb&_e=5R1ogvY_RO8k7UYgFG59bWFcIPhb4YLII6F4anSFckwgizUXdNVmvQGuGSBa7hU7FEjCLW5a9ygstTT6bGiAdT-V6hHMSsDwCWRjcBT_Q-LL4jgThbIjue4RC5cy2cG5U4PZOSOLBW2oXhDucJcwxyLMrm04BgjNKCV7dXYoPpbWb55Udc5VR0OYfx85fsdqVolisafWM2Fb9lUgUFjaEgtZNvS-Bur4VL2ipMrlirHgkgnuDOSok7qkKxircwk5f1JDKmusxydf_mgOhzBP4zOPVC49wUrto0DNBKmnR6uJZZ8d8TxThmYd5rcRgoMPnIDyHfAH483Co7SdeQtI2lzzKsT3rPracGCSV4iMrkqf7a9M7fCyxj9zM66O5Av04gSByN4_hm5UAUKFiSOMZxjoPinbwVFvWHjCEPbTMk-IY0ChFsvKRvREmv9zIOOROwwW-x6IhWHs7edum5e2p_RVYpiS0bYnc_NPFWydSru4ff9n394IchUkRGBKCZCG2JWw0tKHNF7Veho1m3V1DylDryx5yPvCxeR1ZsgzsG0vQUJOSdDyaecS4o4-ZL0dOWgIV5IlPhOmDLwjQri0oW0BYjjIUYS7mYGmmh5jbtwrhBKRrMpMcDolHhmmJRr4vhqMzmNHJh9lSrwMja61t5cEKwAXudHK25OV7Jg5sa7lYXK-Hk9ulqgDmMp9xm5EHwOW98RbacIqIzkL-baVACmpwczxVvQ-TUPoGWrUl0U%3D)

My opponent?

She’s never taken a 3 A.M. call that didn’t come with a donor list attached.

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan. I’ve done **nine combat deployments** across **70 countries**. I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds.

Minnesota doesn’t need another career politician who reads a poll at 3:00 A.M.

America needs another Senator who has _****already answered the 3 A.M. call****_ —and brought everyone home.

The left’s most recent internal poll shows a _** **generic Republican within 2 points**. That means **this seat is flippable****_—but only with the help of grassroots conservatives like yourself. You must step up now if we’re to have any chance of flipping this seat for the first time since 2008.

Could you **[please consider contributing $5, $10, or even $25 to our campaign today?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ffbc4ab88b73466686364c6e4f6817cb&_e=5R1ogvY_RO8k7UYgFG59bWFcIPhb4YLII6F4anSFckwgizUXdNVmvQGuGSBa7hU7FEjCLW5a9ygstTT6bGiAdT-V6hHMSsDwCWRjcBT_Q-LL4jgThbIjue4RC5cy2cG5U4PZOSOLBW2oXhDucJcwxyLMrm04BgjNKCV7dXYoPpbWb55Udc5VR0OYfx85fsdqVolisafWM2Fb9lUgUFjaEgtZNvS-Bur4VL2ipMrlirHgkgnuDOSok7qkKxircwk5EdiEOsDCub_HPV0vFCsVd6u0BEdAuao7JnSkDURqVds3WogG3k-VJS_ORgeh5pCd45RhKJoIadF1jTGDpv90PQrd9vJfGTV-3dZziQhw7Qae7VIy7dGs78PzPt7EjeVF-7CG6NDWf_sYWJBiBuyczBKkg8f64IV-4EKQvO8Jmlq_2f8ranPxPfd1mZRjjRWK_GIlKTlt4lNBNhG6jQYpQcLDuOvsguo101FLdpE0ZT7KRnDVkT2l67muTTdTXIC2R-BrxSSX3YTeC8iGjkZUJwUmHbtBvwrLQzYRTJXlrh98bUT4vJokGBXTVvOcJGe_PToHj2DQcfUPVysMmSlLchd6KjupFxHIptdN25BcvgSPw2cRBSdApoi184Co2yy2_oM444nu5RHyv-NHZxtDT9ZYusrvl-phYvytTAu9DwqMIxYxiiVnxCJtdMANHKa1RqRt2KQjtnq3lK8mCOVnMiURrSckVMFjdXy_rzaTuKY%3D)** I have a story to tell and a lot of fight in me, but the one thing we don’t have is money.

I’m not backed by Hollywood or D.C. consultants. **I’m backed by conservatives like _you._******

Every dollar received by my campaign sends a message to the national GOP:_****Minnesota is in play. ****_ Because when the next 3 A.M. crisis hits—whether it’s a border surge, a riot, or a cyberattack— The American people deserve a U.S. Senator who’s **already been there**.

For a better tomorrow,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL

_**Former Navy SEAL officer

Proud Minnesotan **_

clean_body: I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds. | Fellow Conservative, Imagine, for a moment, switching shoes with an active-duty Navy SEAL. The satellite phone rang at 3:00 a.m. local time. You’re in a 20-foot shipping container turned command post, somewhere in the Horn of Africa you never see on a map. No staff. No teleprompter. No second chances. One of our teams was pinned down. Bad guys closing in. Decision time: extract now and risk the helo, or hold and risk the men. You make the call. You get every American home. That’s what a real 3 A.M. decision feels like. Now, Minnesota faces its own 3 A.M. moments—only the phone is ringing in Minneapolis, St. Cloud, Duluth. 1. A 74% spike in carjackings since 2020. 2. Illegals with criminal records released into our neighborhoods because Walz-Flanagan sued to defund ICE detention. 3. Small-town hospitals are closing because state mandates crushed rural budgets. But this isn’t just happening in Minnesota - it’s happening all across the country. In big cities, small towns, and in state capitals, with out-of-touch career politicians leading the charge. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - because Americans need a battle-tested former Navy SEAL, like me, ready to take the tough 3:00 a.m. calls that are commonplace at the highest levels of government. My opponent? She’s never taken a 3 A.M. call that didn’t come with a donor list attached. I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan. I’ve done nine combat deployments across 70 countries. I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds. Minnesota doesn’t need another career politician who reads a poll at 3:00 A.M. America needs another Senator who has **already answered the 3 A.M. call —and brought everyone home. The left’s most recent internal poll shows a generic Republican within 2 points. That means this seat is flippable—but only with the help of grassroots conservatives like yourself. You must step up now if we’re to have any chance of flipping this seat for the first time since 2008. Could you I have a story to tell and a lot of fight in me, but the one thing we don’t have is money. I’m not backed by Hollywood or D.C. consultants. I’m backed by conservatives like you.**** Every dollar received by my campaign sends a message to the national GOP:Minnesota is in play. Because when the next 3 A.M. crisis hits—whether it’s a border surge, a riot, or a cyberattack— The American people deserve a U.S. Senator who’s already been there. name: Tim Walz
subject: re: hotdish
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
It’s damn good.
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251209-263&t=1&akid=263%2E34582%2ElsBA2M)
Peter,
As the days get colder and the year comes to a close, there’s nothing better than sharing a good hotdish with loved ones.
If you’ve never had hotdish, think of it as the superior version of a casserole. Mine’s made from scratch and topped with tater tots (because tater tots make everything better). And let me tell you — it’s damn good.
**I believe public service should be the same: built from the ground up, made with care, and meant to serve everyone.** And in a moment when extremism is threatening the progress we’ve made, that grounded, community-first approach is how we defend our values and keep Minnesota moving forward.
Because at the end of the day, good governing should feel a lot like a good meal: grounded, practical, made with care, and meant to bring people together.
**[If you appreciate that kind of mindset — whether we’re talking dinner or governing — chip in to my campaign through this link to support us ahead of our only public deadline of the year, and I’ll send you my award-winning “Turkey Trot Tater-Tot Hotdish” recipe.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251209.ZPNEoC&amount=5&refcode=em20251209-263&t=2&akid=263%2E34582%2ElsBA2M)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251209.ZPNEoC&amount=5&refcode=20251209-263&t=21&akid=263%2E34582%2ElsBA2M)**
With gratitude,
Tim

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251209-263&t=22&refcode2=263_34582_lsBA2M&akid=263%2E34582%2ElsBA2M)**

# [I'm not a political expert, I'm just a dad who believes in his kid](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=181156745&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMTU2NzQ1LCJpYXQiOjE3NjUzMDA4MDQsImV4cCI6MTc2Nzg5MjgwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HoJydhyRXpFpATlm-hwjdUP5NtP5Dbs3E1FS0ymnapY)
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Dec 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..tZA8DYLlDjl6ToiTr3FBg4BjE0fI2eXzQCKN-eB85NY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/im-not-a-political-expert-im-just?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

My name is Jim Stevens. I'm a small-business owner, former public school teacher, snowplow driver, and most importantly, Haley's dad.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/449a1831-f695-453e-be5f-3510f38391bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I've worked here in Michigan for over 50 years. Still do, even though I probably should've retired by now. But I don't mind hard work - never have.
And that's the spirit I see in my daughter Haley every single day.
Whether she was helping out with the family landscaping business or staying up late studying policy before she launched her first campaign, she's never backed down from a challenge. Grit, grime, and some Michigan doggedness - that's Haley. She's a fighter.

**I 've always said that when the chips are down, Haley is exactly who you want to be standing shoulder to shoulder with. **She's faithful to the people she loves, doesn't have any quit in her, and always stands up for what's right.
Now she's in the biggest fight of her life, running for Senate, and I couldn't be more proud. She's in this race because she loves Michigan. She believes in Michiganders. And I know she'll never stop fighting for working families, public school kids, and folks like you and me.
But here's the hard truth: She's up against millions of dollars from Republican megadonors. I'm no political expert, but I'll tell you one thing - Haley can't win this fight alone. That's why I'm asking, as her dad:
**Will you chip in to help Haley win this thing and keep Michigan blue?**
[ Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f5c6c600-7fb2-468c-9886-5d8e1913b3fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Haley's not in this for fame or to build her personal brand. That's not who she is. She's in it for Michigan. For regular folks. And I'm with her. Always have been.
Thanks for reading this - and for standing with my daughter.
Sincerely,
Jim Stevens
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/96bda8b5-ed82-4876-aefd-23328b90c8eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

We can’t ignore this...
We can’t ignore this...
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18451514/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZEYzOVdFdnAyQg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMDk/LbmNseWdCUzlBNw/qP2hpZHM9bmMwWnJTeDk4c0JYNnhscw/gaThbSg/s3kbd804072)

---
Patriot,
---
The Democrat political machine and donor network isn’t just embracing communist New York mayor Zohran Mamdani...
---
_...They’re helping him raise cash like he’s the**NEW LEADER** of the Democrat Party! _
---
**_“Mamdani Woos Wealthy Donors...”_**
“Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani has turned to crypto kings, movie stars and an oil heir, among others, to help reach his $4 million goal to fund his transition and Jan. 1 inauguration.”
[Source: _New York Times_]
---
In just a few short weeks, Mamdani has hauled in over $3,000,000 from liberal donors – and he’s been touting that total, claiming it shows Americans overwhelmingly support his radical policies.
---
**I want to decisively PROVE to Mamdani that he couldn’t be more wrong:__REAL__ Americans will _NEVER_ _SURRENDER_ to Mamdani and Hochul’s communist, anti-American, pro-jihadist agenda! **
---
The best way to do that is with a surge of grassroots contributions to FIRE Mamdani’s puppet governor Kathy Hochul from office and FLIP the New York state government **RED**.
---
**So, I’ve officially set an ambitious $4,000,000 fundraising goal of our own before our campaign’s _FIRST_ and _ONLY_ end-of-year deadline! **
---
But unlike Mamdani, we can’t rely on the Democratic political machine and their wealthy donors to raise the funds we need.
---
_Instead, our hopes of reaching this goal and FIRING Kathy Hochul rest squarely on the shoulders of thousands of grassroots America First patriots like YOU, Patriot._
---
Like I always say, it’s not the _amount_ you give that’s important, but rather the _sheer number_ of grassroots Americans who step up to help us SAVE New York!
---
No state has moved further to the right over the last few years, and polling shows this race is already within the margin of error.
---
All we need now are the funds to compete with Hochul, and our path to victory will be wide open!
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to help us reach our $4 million goal to FIRE Mamdani’s puppet Kathy Hochul – _the worst governor in America_ – and help unlock a REAL 600% MATCH from New York State. **](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Rep. Elise Stefanik

Friend, I’m not in Congress to play it safe -- I’m here to protect our democracy and fight for the working families who’ve been left behind for too long. That means speaking out when the Secretary of Defense orders an illegal strike and dodges accountability. It means taking on corporate greed. And it means refusing a single cent from Big Pharma or Big Oil -- because my loyalty is to CA-45, not to special interests. **But here’s the truth: The same powerful interests I stand up to are trying to defeat me.** National Republicans see what we’re building, and with just three seats separating control of the House, they’re planning to spend millions in my district to replace me with a rubber-stamp for their agenda. That’s why this moment matters so much. This upcoming end-of-year FEC deadline is public -- meaning every opponent, every Republican strategist, and every reporter will see exactly where we stand. If we fall short, they’ll take it as a sign that this seat is ripe for flipping. If we show strength, we keep them on their heels. clean_body: | = = Friend, I’m not in Congress to play it safe -- I’m here to protect our democracy and fight for the working families who’ve been left behind for too long. That means speaking out when the Secretary of Defense orders an illegal strike and dodges accountability. It means taking on corporate greed. And it means refusing a single cent from Big Pharma or Big Oil -- because my loyalty is to CA-45, not to special interests. But here’s the truth: The same powerful interests I stand up to are trying to defeat me. National Republicans see what we’re building, and with just three seats separating control of the House, they’re planning to spend millions in my district to replace me with a rubber-stamp for their agenda. That’s why this moment matters so much. This upcoming end-of-year FEC deadline is public -- meaning every opponent, every Republican strategist, and every reporter will see exactly where we stand. If we fall short, they’ll take it as a sign that this seat is ripe for flipping. If we show strength, we keep them on their heels. My name is **Victor Marx** -- a husband of 37 years, father of five, grandfather, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and humanitarian who has spent decades serving families and communities around the world. **_I am also the conservative in the race for Governor of Colorado._** I'm running because the challenges we're facing here reflect the challenges facing our entire nation. What happens in one state can strengthen -- _or weaken_ -- the future of America. [**That’s why I’m reaching out today and asking you to become a key early part of our rapidly growing grassroots movement.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6c0a37b7dd404f1b898748f6062ff506&_e=ugLeEjc1MCydv5qNRyjOQJjBjKz9ZE9qA9k5efDMD4wIvpXJhRc8OsrZIyARR07XOW-IdhjZpTZwxqAOB8UgnNqhnsDXF17H-MvsKqiZi9ySDNvJCXWeFC6h8QwMU4tKlpJvsx1c0I8obO8g2jYo5Zxwuu9BelnBN-8g4661BaEu0wIg4e5Dwc9mjboDmdRrl0ReDJM25Oe3gYWxx0lUCQwP6P7Jlsx-WsWp8lq1sRIeIFZkNWxLofYsU89Z3cSw73uwEjDFn6y42v0XmiHTSJXLd0jhW366SBktYdGicC3D4HXUDIVKvLb8gsgIJMtIH7TdSxZa_h0h0pI6YDqXmBLiJJ3piFKz0bsLeS4LcOusJGDdI6hDfHbOm2yx8R_DS2aXtvQ5zn8pZz7MhKZIW13PT5aIeNjk_EeclyIcCGxSk5UNrXE8Ipu3GTySpRNFBViaV5j59HNGb7-gs2cJT-donJr0r1Ps_ThK4WMDq-pgEmecdhZi3nUF4J7r5cx0wdDSWh5BKB8XzpHQpcvo_Zg5RBAJYif6mJtjb9M7t82XguzwvV58QX0JzTg3HjI48uSbdYsVFq8wV-Xky2JJx2yw-f2iRbh80I8FsH6d1vIIIjUJatBqRn-SVrmqTvRE)

For years, my calling has taken me into some of the most difficult places imaginable. From war zones to trafficking corridors to communities devastated by violence, **I 've led more than 150 high-risk missions focused on rescuing and restoring the innocent.** That work exists because **God carried me** through a childhood marked by trauma, instability, and hardship. Through His grace, I rebuilt my life -- and I've spent every day since fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. **_This campaign is no different._** It isn't powered by insiders or special interests. It's powered by people who still believe in Faith, Family, Freedom, and the promise of a stronger America. We're already building real momentum, and we need to keep it going. I want you with us in this fight, [**and a contribution from you of $25, $50 or even $100 will help us continue building a movement that can win here and keep spreading.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6c0a37b7dd404f1b898748f6062ff506&_e=ugLeEjc1MCydv5qNRyjOQJjBjKz9ZE9qA9k5efDMD4wIvpXJhRc8OsrZIyARR07XOW-IdhjZpTZwxqAOB8UgnNqhnsDXF17H-MvsKqiZi9ySDNvJCXWeFC6h8QwMU4tKlpJvsx1c0I8obO8g2jYo5Zxwuu9BelnBN-8g4661BaEu0wIg4e5Dwc9mjboDmdRrl0ReDJM25Oe3gYWxx0lUCYTeJp_B6t-DOrVHxWstSFripxmV4c8tzeclGOpjfvUHn2NzItq5EVVD-asPG4_8mPq_X0MLLifDyEbdHi2BG7Tl62eL82NtFf_Dgea9fb9VJqU75VqTYDZn7YpgA61MmB9xIiJ2ebaWnsajwv5iu8jravpRBKA0mL7ExvwgWO7ekLx-MjkxkvAALBQ09gGiyn6-wV9thnjSbv6tdsZ3w53VVdcZGOyUn61dOaYWsCjYAHwBru5oJ7pDxZKKpWbhidCD0KSAaubF9G1s2tSG1KkbUWkjllSFr0Xlvfbkz4dgNgjxsCxA8JT04lQxMczQUEA7tZooAUf6VKSH8_0QGVqyP08KlJf-ZoMtJ9Fr2BEG-861DjHQHsIbvfbd3p1kKgLAYWx3APu8AXoVdGOWEKOfOlw8MLnYbh7aRP9i5lTE)

Over the years, I've been blessed to walk alongside men and women of deep conviction--people who don't just speak about change but embody it in the way they live. One of those rare leaders I held in the highest regard was my friend, the late **Charlie Kirk.** After Charlie passed, his wife Erika told me that Charlie would want me to run, and she encouraged me to throw my hat in the ring. While I've never considered myself a politician--_nor do I intend to become one_ --I reached a point where I couldn't ignore the reality that our communities are being failed. **I knew I had to do something. ** _Thankfully_ , I'm not stepping into this fight alone. Thousands of patriots have already taken their place in this movement, [**and I’m counting on you to stand with us.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6c0a37b7dd404f1b898748f6062ff506&_e=ugLeEjc1MCydv5qNRyjOQJjBjKz9ZE9qA9k5efDMD4wIvpXJhRc8OsrZIyARR07XOW-IdhjZpTZwxqAOB8UgnNqhnsDXF17H-MvsKqiZi9ySDNvJCXWeFC6h8QwMU4tKlpJvsx1c0I8obO8g2jYo5Zxwuu9BelnBN-8g4661BaEu0wIg4e5Dwc9mjboDmdRrl0ReDJM25Oe3gYWxx0lUCWSySRn4Y5oFAqA83cSlMKYJUDL1f1TqBvlhtc2JQLt0mtw5lce6CPQPUmIiJepcrvWrgXgYE3LVsDVDlfJ2Yk90VcPd2hIpPtmlDMRPdYrHXB2qTRMrmzCRkpk4UYnTEisozNSQcwtWXCKxo0gpvKfOVBBDopp5ej3TBp0zBvcoDO1VVQsebGlLkKbzZVO3DwUGhAO8RsHXFtbxTDm9GJr-7bhr9y-namt8jp-ogtOGEvO7U590LesMeTbRPNMkBYzIzRannqQwFrMp2NandseWl3BvhpoX4YmErRsy82c74AJ1WWQDOdPtQHq4k9hqd-eN7A--OlruG8IawRv5oP1dw-cRnryEgU9BC-IMrqxe-TJUhtO5eYglUuGy3gqihd__zvPQF-0pYEDyQbsqal6wzrRtKw96s5AOl1JE6r4F)

The values that guide me are simple: **protect families, defend faith, safeguard freedom, and steward the natural beauty we 've been entrusted with. **These are not just Colorado values -- _they 're American values._ The struggles we face here -- crime, government overreach, attacks on faith, rising costs -- are the same challenges pressing on families across the country. Turning Colorado around sends a message far beyond our borders: **that courage still matters, that conviction still wins, and that ordinary Americans can reclaim their future.** I believe deeply in that mission. _I 've lived it my entire life._ And I'm grateful to have so many determined patriots standing alongside me as we work toward a safer, stronger, more united future. clean_body: This is my calling The values that guide me are simple: protect families, defend faith, and safeguard freedom. | | | | | Hi Fellow Patriot, My name is Victor Marx -- a husband of 37 years, father of five, grandfather, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and humanitarian who has spent decades serving families and communities around the world. I am also the conservative in the race for Governor of Colorado. I'm running because the challenges we're facing here reflect the challenges facing our entire nation. What happens in one state can strengthen -- or weaken -- the future of America. For years, my calling has taken me into some of the most difficult places imaginable. From war zones to trafficking corridors to communities devastated by violence, I 've led more than 150 high-risk missions focused on rescuing and restoring the innocent. That work exists because God carried me through a childhood marked by trauma, instability, and hardship. Through His grace, I rebuilt my life -- and I've spent every day since fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. This campaign is no different. It isn't powered by insiders or special interests. It's powered by people who still believe in Faith, Family, Freedom, and the promise of a stronger America. We're already building real momentum, and we need to keep it going. I want you with us in this fight, Over the years, I've been blessed to walk alongside men and women of deep conviction--people who don't just speak about change but embody it in the way they live. One of those rare leaders I held in the highest regard was my friend, the late Charlie Kirk. After Charlie passed, his wife Erika told me that Charlie would want me to run, and she encouraged me to throw my hat in the ring. While I've never considered myself a politician--nor do I intend to become one --I reached a point where I couldn't ignore the reality that our communities are being failed. I knew I had to do something. Thankfully , I'm not stepping into this fight alone. Thousands of patriots have already taken their place in this movement, The values that guide me are simple: protect families, defend faith, safeguard freedom, and steward the natural beauty we 've been entrusted with. These are not just Colorado values -- they 're American values. The struggles we face here -- crime, government overreach, attacks on faith, rising costs -- are the same challenges pressing on families across the country. Turning Colorado around sends a message far beyond our borders: that courage still matters, that conviction still wins, and that ordinary Americans can reclaim their future. I believe deeply in that mission. I 've lived it my entire life. And I'm grateful to have so many determined patriots standing alongside me as we work toward a safer, stronger, more united future. | | For Colorado and for America, Victor Marx P.S. If you've gotten this far, there's something I need you to know: You 're not just someone reading an email -- you're someone whose voice and values matter deeply in shaping the direction of this mission. , and your involvement strengthens the momentum we've already begun to build. -Victor | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY VICTOR MARX FOR GOVERNOR Registered Agent: Gregory Carlson | | P.O. name: Kamala Harris
subject: At a defining moment
body:
My friend Roy needs your help, Peter.
| Peter, This past year has been hard on too many people. With rising grocery prices, families being ripped apart, health care premiums skyrocketing, and so much more — Americans are paying the cost of this administration’s agenda. We are at a defining moment. The stakes could not be higher — for our rights and freedoms, our pocketbooks, and our country. And that is why I am asking you to stand with someone who embodies the very best of who we are: Roy Cooper. Roy Cooper is someone who shows up. Someone who listens. Someone who will fight for working families. Roy is committed to defend reproductive rights, fight for fair elections, and stand up to attacks on Medicare. Let me be clear: This race will be close. The other side is pouring in money from special interests, but we know that the power is with the people and it is the people who will decide this election. **[I am asking you personally: Will you pitch in whatever you can today to help elect Roy Cooper to the U.S. Senate? Your contribution, whether it is $5, $10, or whatever works for you, will make a real difference in this race. There is no donation too small.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2353?t=6&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2354?t=7&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2355?t=8&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2356?t=9&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2357?t=10&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2358?t=11&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2359?t=12&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
---
Yes, the power is still with the people. And our government works best when our leaders stand for people — not the wealthy, not the well-connected, but everyday Americans. And when we invest in candidates who share our values, we invest in the future of this country.
**[So please, if you’re able to, chip in to Roy Cooper's campaign today.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2353?t=13&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)** Thank you for doing what you can do to help fight back.
Thank you,
Kamala
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2353?t=14&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=1&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=3&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=4&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=15&akid=132%2E124072%2EXntq-j)

name: Mayra Flores
subject: It was one of the nastiest smear campaigns in America, but God called me back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra for Congress
body:
It stings even writing this
[](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=ffad11294acc4ca99b185393c5411f62&_e=Jqejy4HZ4rkVgMUkX_vumsgjUhzVVJvgIUGKXuN6GiVRxKg9CX6N1Sl8qesmDN_tZsf2gL49PVJymS9AIhN7B5uBXArzxBCmlDKzjarkBl95PLL_UvmzHG3ZHogF0CQ61P9oimeIumCGYbr1rHh7Vkp2bdynefw12Mp7l_YflrXCTUkIh15DrwriQe0tSBT50q0f4xpaFWngy_UbkqbtO5H7yWfr6e1ZHCpJpR9SK4ihffGJUMqa9HdhYniPDG99MoO56aGnjfA51qQku0m1P1MGWxCH5-Vq0DA6BBDDf5RqtjJ3QAwnA5Qawmvq6ro5bw5w_EOP3CD6eX3qn-E8j9pAsKc-5suIpfNLWVaiHHslrs01-gz6BaX7AjIvK8RHVbaGRmM39LKW7rKp0nuqV-enXupLAeVFPMYhDMtaEc5WfKuFd48A3F2iuDAWDnRjHdsv9df-oujvVzpwepOkrydggbvdddPIepxu8rahgwgJVJcPOhwIGpllljnzXdzoWqtOWl2RZQswGYRRDjUoB43MAGtixmV9lVzC4x7LgiIYsg6FMRIcDAylJzEi1DMb-UQhRqxPDeHy2FWI5YwzB3l_4VQylpj5aExSUO5UryfiDX_TN564tJUOKimULK9XAEwtWkONmFuTahP1wilMQZU5fW5U9z2rnM184cJEQ8BZcA0OU9bO2MMM37A7Fpdc0tKt3czNPGmmwx2bjRvZDQ%3D%3D) I conceded my race. I lost. It stings even writing this email. I so badly wished the outcome was different... but you can dwell on the past or learn from it. The Democrats played dirty. They dragged my name through the mud. My opponent hired some nut job to churn out racist and sexist slurs against me-- just for being a MAGA Latina who loves Trump. It was one of the nastiest smear campaigns in America. And in the end, I lost my race by a hair. But I didn't turn to bitterness. I turned to Scripture: "Those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength. They will soar on wings like eagles..." -- Isaiah 40:31 This is Mayra Flores-- and I believe God called me back to finish what we started. [I’m for Congress running again— in the #1 race in America.](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=ffad11294acc4ca99b185393c5411f62&_e=Jqejy4HZ4rkVgMUkX_vumsgjUhzVVJvgIUGKXuN6GiVRxKg9CX6N1Sl8qesmDN_tZsf2gL49PVJymS9AIhN7B5uBXArzxBCmlDKzjarkBl95PLL_UvmzHG3ZHogF0CQ61P9oimeIumCGYbr1rHh7Vkp2bdynefw12Mp7l_YflrXCTUkIh15DrwriQe0tSBT50q0f4xpaFWngy_UbkqbtO5H7yWfr6e1ZHCpJpR9SK4ihffGJUMqa9HdhYniPDG993EYmYOfgbw6K-lE-7gT9gtDr4lRUG4IWi9ReZgB3QW92styuoaWOKfm0Hq9lMZZetxVMlSd4dK_9F-u8cXVB2oBhtyj-G90aXhPiwcQBlp-MHXO4N6nC4EErTjL46pgElzo4xeCvDx5Yv1-MWDHDfaeb0bKToqxAr28YBaG-8kuAGWLsrcYSeUwhndHHHh3UBiysOK6skoEi6mXPD3uNXPfyaT0kPhGjWTL2zSPB-yOArq6NSa1Z0JmXpxoAQwbIiZNlKjYNktrUYgbZX3wk6xfq0aMeDsAEriLVeXukCb1NgDhYmvyu5OFgVZjtZYpgzKT-dyFTdvLycKJqkdTBt7QygLAOiMf-nMWY151FEh2YTIuo0ivksmQs2-LgXXseSUHbYZNJWyyqqyxHJIxTdBqLCbQeKtKulmDoZZONS0TekXgKJqHDAEBExW8IribeHuMVkj0JNnm9UIlOTykIYg%3D%3D) [ Make a small donation to help Mayra win
](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=ffad11294acc4ca99b185393c5411f62&_e=Jqejy4HZ4rkVgMUkX_vumsgjUhzVVJvgIUGKXuN6GiVRxKg9CX6N1Sl8qesmDN_tZsf2gL49PVJymS9AIhN7B5uBXArzxBCmlDKzjarkBl95PLL_UvmzHG3ZHogF0CQ61P9oimeIumCGYbr1rHh7Vkp2bdynefw12Mp7l_YflrXCTUkIh15DrwriQe0tSBT50q0f4xpaFWngy_UbkqbtO5H7yWfr6e1ZHCpJpR9SK4ihffGJUMqa9HdhYniPDG99HfVFqOewSOgvS5i46MFp4FFIugb3BGFzHym2OoK7z_XA-iPrwTeiyQyoJ7q64kPT4jv-D4uftKenZEd4OgLahbivAiT2hECe4Dwoh9lQknMJXy6gd9I7JA_bIY65tGJj0UFAV-lNeEwd9TIy0WZ_qHKhdu0gafpmuHeCXlZHD-qDR2agwmQe6X3ECWFKhxI2gtaVj9O6V737WyoEmqcxe8UDvGO6P_oc-H9OV_vYjYjdvQKcPcPXsHeLQkEKqtKMn_77I1pYfrhEXnWLvc45mm3BBZcpH3IWtIJVbd5S41cptvOfd5X1BAxpLBZiS0ddkKg1S73C_WhoQJU2N-DqIdwbQpQGXeVwAJzFLBTqvEAwCBmeuvT4RAv954L3o2W7CLFPc4yWXC0pbFmLJ_yWhLaryL1CVemFcV54RSkM0xPz-x6cOd08ha8mYbtvSO4qtkrSD1bZxzLnyKQ1vPZjOQ%3D%3D) Setbacks happen. In life. In campaigns. In this fight for our country. But what matters most is how we respond-- and who we lean on when the road gets tough. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Because right now, I need someone to lean on. If we don't see a surge of support this week, this campaign will never recover-- and Republicans will lose our best chance to flip a blue seat red in 2026. [So I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in just $10 or more right now?](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=ffad11294acc4ca99b185393c5411f62&_e=Jqejy4HZ4rkVgMUkX_vumsgjUhzVVJvgIUGKXuN6GiVRxKg9CX6N1Sl8qesmDN_tZsf2gL49PVJymS9AIhN7B5uBXArzxBCmlDKzjarkBl95PLL_UvmzHG3ZHogF0CQ61P9oimeIumCGYbr1rHh7Vkp2bdynefw12Mp7l_YflrXCTUkIh15DrwriQe0tSBT50q0f4xpaFWngy_UbkqbtO5H7yWfr6e1ZHCpJpR9SK4ihffGJUMqa9HdhYniPDG99ulsxHfrX2e1TIklJ4Kc6q6gf8L5e6eh3xnV5DUB1S4E87fINRnyl2r8s11_1g31G3UTDjJgErRVnd9lvC0hd6K9hWJYc3QP7zUm1CexOcgliPl-5ADmHdw4fp_hmyokCOjWTbkGyRmP3sVUNVw2kEhPMoOTffruRp45FudCJj6V6AqqYPiLQSuR74XAo9BAXtmbA6yvZtFI1_raalqXGblix67PjTX6wUBAvrmbdzqWfrl45FtkqyUYc8amhZSvkT0itei0uhOEmX60DZa-iGZHo6te54sw0ux3BNX6fcGlQYWQZ0itHUtsbciBuEsEbH2poomhGdzDRbDSBHHG_MIZYRk4GzVH7nI4v-eL_9722Fi_DVMb2JQE3hAdzjau7CsGAUDN6097cbrqUCpE8JzvrZwirKD618o_lPmpQOE1s9q8Q4XvbQC0FvegmauH_jYQQylsrJtCNNuT7-JR8bw%3D%3D) [ Make a small donation to help Mayra win >>

clean_body: It stings even writing this I conceded my race. I lost. It stings even writing this email. I so badly wished the outcome was different... but you can dwell on the past or learn from it. The Democrats played dirty. They dragged my name through the mud. My opponent hired some nut job to churn out racist and sexist slurs against me-- just for being a MAGA Latina who loves Trump. It was one of the nastiest smear campaigns in America. And in the end, I lost my race by a hair. But I didn't turn to bitterness. I turned to Scripture: "Those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength. They will soar on wings like eagles..." -- Isaiah 40:31 This is Mayra Flores-- and I believe God called me back to finish what we started. Setbacks happen. In life. In campaigns. In this fight for our country. But what matters most is how we respond-- and who we lean on when the road gets tough. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Because right now, I need someone to lean on. If we don't see a surge of support this week, this campaign will never recover-- and Republicans will lose our best chance to flip a blue seat red in 2026. Together, we will not grow weary. God bless you, Mayra Flores | | | Paid for by Mayra for Congress PO Box 516 Los Indios, Texas 78567-0516 To unsubscribe from Mayra for Congress,

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Tell the EPA NO to Rolling Back Clean Water Protections
body:
Dear Peter,

You may have heard about the Trump Administration’s latest attempt to rollback clean water protections: the Polluted Water Rule. [https://thehill.com/policy/energy-environment/5609347-trump-epa-clean-water-act-waters-of-the-us/] At a time when we need the EPA to be doing more to protect clean water that is vital to the health and wellbeing of our communities, Trump is ordering them to do less. Email EPA Administrator Zeldin today, and tell him to stop the Polluted Water Rule.

Email the EPA [https://secure.ngpvan.com/UjWudO2w70qyrJRbcHu6aw2]

Wetlands and streams are valuable resources that provide essential fish and wildlife habitats, store carbon, prevent flooding, filter out harmful pollution and protect clean drinking water. Science is clear: wetlands and streams of all kinds greatly benefit water quality in downstream waters, including drinking water sources. The EPA’s proposed Polluted Water Rule will weaken the Clean Water Act and hand corporate polluters a license to degrade our country's waterways. Everyone deserves access to clean safe drinking water, yet so many communities know all too well what it’s like to live without it. This Rule would make this a reality for even more communities, and that’s just plain wrong. We must stop these rollbacks of our bedrock environmental protections-- send an email today!

Take Action! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/UjWudO2w70qyrJRbcHu6aw2]

This issue is personal for me. The very first campaign that I ever worked on as a young community-organizer-in-training was to close loopholes in the Clean Water Act to protect intermittent streams and wetlands-- the very waterways at risk from the Polluted Water Rule. To see Trump and his allies attempt to dismantle my work, and the work of countless organizers before me, is infuriating. Will you join me in taking a stand for clean water?

Stand up for Clean Water [https://secure.ngpvan.com/UjWudO2w70qyrJRbcHu6aw2]

Thank you,
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director

https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

clean_body: Your invitation from Trump might rot soon. Accept asap! | | | | EXCLUSIVE OFFER FROM THE DESK OF DONALD J. TRUMP Dear Peter, President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club. You’re not asleep! But yes, most people would dream of receiving an email like this one. I personally created the 47th President Founders Club for one reason only: To permanently honor the patriots who founded and carried the entire MAGA movement from Day One! The ones who never wavered, never surrendered, and refused to let them destroy our country twice. I had my team pull the very best files, millions of patriot names, and I went through them myself. Your name rose straight to the top. ** That’s why I’m personally inviting you to become a Charter Member of my 47th President Founders Club. Only 4,700 spots exist in the entire country. I’m holding one for you! ** Don’t miss your shot to stand with the patriots who made the greatest comeback in American history. Your name could be one of them. I am counting on you. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Spineless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
Winning in Georgia puts us one step closer to stopping Trump’s agenda.
#

[
---
Peter, it’s Elizabeth Warren. It is impossible to overstate how absolutely critical the 2026 midterms are going to be for the preservation of our democracy. That’s why I’m asking you to support Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but first, [**can you chip in $5 — or whatever you’re able — to help defend Jon’s seat?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251209-1-f&t=2&akid=1237%2E5691347%2EBm6f7O) _Donald Trump and his extremist allies in Congress are wreaking havoc on our nation’s most vital institutions and engaging in corruption on a level this nation has never seen before._ Pillars of our democracy — like the rule of law, a free press, and the ability to voice dissent openly — are being blatantly targeted by this administration’s top officials, all while Trump caters to the billionaire class. Republicans in Congress have the power to put a stop to this. It would take only a handful to vote with the Democrats and say that Donald Trump has to follow the law. But it seems like the Republicans in Congress have all had their spines removed. All these Republicans can do is bend the knee to Donald Trump. **There’s no question about it: We need to take back the Senate majority in order to stop Trump’s agenda in its tracks.** But there is no path to retaking the Senate majority without defending Jon’s critical seat in Georgia. Jon is facing what will likely be one of the most competitive and expensive elections in the country next year. Republicans are all-in to flip his seat and install another far-right Republican who will spinelessly fall in line. We know Jon can win tough races — he’s done it before. But it’s going to take all of us to make that happen. **[Peter, can you support Jon Ossoff by giving $5 to his reelection campaign today? Every donation will help his campaign stay competitive, win this critical seat, and keep a pro-democracy champion like Jon in the Senate.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251209-1-f&t=3&akid=1237%2E5691347%2EBm6f7O) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/1686?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.zuSSTi&refcode=em251209-1-f&t=22&akid=1237%2E5691347%2EBm6f7O)**
---

Hi there, it's Jay.
I have an awful migraine – here’s why: we’ve had a major dip in our fundraising since the beginning of December, and no matter how you cut it, we’re on track to miss our goal... by a lot.
We can't let our momentum slow down, and your help will give us the resources to create a plan that puts working Virginians first, so I need to ask: can you chip in a few dollars to help us get back on track? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025?]
CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025?]
Look, our team expected a slower fundraising month. It’s the holidays, after all! Folks are buying gifts, booking travel, and generally not checking their emails as often.
But goodness, it’s been A LOT worse than we expected.
You may be thinking: “Jay, what gives? You just won, leave me alone.” And I hear you.
BUT, the fight to protect our democracy and Virginia families doesn’t take days off. There will always be work to do, and it’s going to take all of us to get the job done.
So please, friend, can I count on you to donate $5, $10, or whatever amount you can today? With so much on the line, every dollar you give helps power our fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025?amount=5]

name: Benson HQ
subject: Saving our elections from the SAVE Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1108%2E181023%2EKacvVX)
Team — As a leading voting rights expert and Michigan’s secretary of state, we can count on Jocelyn to stand up for Michiganders’ access to the ballot box. **[Pitch in to make sure we have a champion for our elections as our next governor!](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251209_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1108%2E181023%2EKacvVX)**
Jocelyn has been unwavering in her work to fight for safe and secure elections. She’s stood up to everyone from Donald Trump and Pam Bondi to local Republicans. Just take a look at what she’s done:
* Fought the Trump admin’s lawsuit to get the private, personal information of more than 8 million state residents. That includes people’s driver’s license numbers, Social Security numbers, and other personally identifiable information.
* Stood up to state Republicans who invited Pam Bondi to “oversee” our elections.
* Worked to make our election safer and more accessible for everyone.
* Called out the misleading _SAVE Act_ — which is Republican legislation to make voting harder for millions of Americans — including Black Michiganders, active-duty troops, and the more than 2.2 million women in Michigan whose married names are not the same name on their birth certificates.

**[As our next governor, Jocelyn will continue to stand up for Michiganders’ voting rights. Pitch in to help elect her today!](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251209_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1108%2E181023%2EKacvVX)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/581?c0=jmb-em-q42025.ricJNo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251209_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1108%2E181023%2EKacvVX)

---

Jocelyn will keep fighting to make sure that you can vote and that _your vote counts_ in 2026.
Thank you for helping her do that,
Benson HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

Stood up to state Republicans who invited Pam Bondi to “oversee” our elections. Worked to make our election safer and more accessible for everyone. Called out the misleading SAVE Act — which is Republican legislation to make voting harder for millions of Americans — including Black Michiganders, active-duty troops, and the more than 2.2 million women in Michigan whose married names are not the same name on their birth certificates. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Jocelyn will keep fighting to make sure that you can vote and that your vote counts in 2026. Thank you for helping her do that, Benson HQ

As a DCCC Frontline member, I know the road ahead won’t be easy. But through all of that, I stay focused on what matters for Nevada families. This week, I celebrated a major bipartisan win: a newly signed law I championed to help prevent youth substance abuse and save lives. The **TREAT Youth Act** — which I co-led with Republican Congresswoman Jen Kiggans — funds essential programs to support young people at risk of drug use, addiction, and overdose. It passed with overwhelming bipartisan support, and it was just signed into law. Here’s what this law delivers:
* Prevention and recovery programs for youth
* Training for health care providers, educators, and families
* Expanded access to lifesaving treatment
* Increased federal funding to fight the opioid crisis

I’ve seen firsthand how addiction affects kids in southern Nevada. This law is about saving lives and giving our next generation the support they deserve. But to keep delivering on critical issues like this — **especially as attacks ramp up** — I need your support. # Dems want to block Trump's face on a $1 coin as corruption in currency
Two Democratic senators introduced legislation Tuesday to block the Treasury Department from **[minting a $1 commemorative coin](https://substack.com/redirect/210aca1b-a15e-4fde-8a00-a3879f0259f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** featuring President Donald Trump's likeness for America's 250th anniversary, decrying it as potential corruption in currency.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7821cceb-b51e-49c9-b036-f9c637a6b63e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Senators Target Trump Likeness** : Sens. Jeff Merkley (D-Ore.) and Catherine Cortez Masto (D-Nev.) lead the Change Corruption Act, banning living or sitting presidents' images on federal coins.
* **Design Sparks Controversy** : The draft shows Trump raising a fist before an American flag, echoing a 2024 Pennsylvania assassination attempt photo, as a collector's item for semiquincentennial celebrations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a74d80b5-b21e-43f3-a786-30800f146282?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Treasury Defends Anniversary Push** : The department insists coin honors U.S. resilience under Trump, with legal authority for special editions like past hits including Harriet Tubman and Statue of Liberty designs.
* **Precedent Sets Future Limits** : Bill could halt Trump's coin and establish rules against presidential self-promotion, amid historical sales highs for non-leader commemoratives exceeding millions.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/b0f85512-7878-4edc-afb8-8865fee9d7d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/b0f85512-7878-4edc-afb8-8865fee9d7d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b0f85512-7878-4edc-afb8-8865fee9d7d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/b0f85512-7878-4edc-afb8-8865fee9d7d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# BlackRock's Bold AI 'Picks and Shovels' Bet
BlackRock's chief Asia-Pacific investment strategist Ben Powell declared the AI infrastructure spending frenzy far from over, urging investors to bet on **["picks and shovels"](https://substack.com/redirect/6e8dcd63-df63-400c-b9ba-354e9d7b06af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** suppliers like chipmakers and energy producers reaping steady gains from AI hyperscalers' massive investment deluge.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6e8dcd63-df63-400c-b9ba-354e9d7b06af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Infrastructure Boom Accelerates** : Hyperscalers are ramping up long-term deals for chips, power, and data centers, driving global investment as they race to avoid falling behind in AI.
* **Debt Markets Untapped** : Major tech firms have barely begun issuing debt to fund expansions, signaling potential for significant future capital inflows via investment-grade credit.
* **Power Demand Surging** : S&P Global projects data-center electricity needs nearly doubling by 2030, fueled primarily by hyperscale facilities powering the AI build-out.
* **Durable Gains Ahead** : According to BlackRock,suppliers in hardware, energy, and materials such as silver and copper are positioned for positive surprises and steadier returns compared to volatile AI model developers.

**SILVER AND COPPER CRUSH GOLD**
Silver and copper have **[surged ahead](https://substack.com/redirect/c522a4f9-fcad-4ede-94ef-e4bda30cacfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of gold in percentage terms as the hottest metals investments heading into 2026, fueled by severe supply shortages and explosive demand that have traders betting on record-breaking rallies.
* **Supply Squeeze Drives Gains** : Silver nearly doubled this year amid historic London market shortages, the squeeze has eased recently but has remained persistent with Chinese inventories at decade lows.
* **Massive Investor Inflows Surge** : Nearly $1 billion poured into the largest silver ETF last week, outpacing gold funds as under-allocated Western investors rush in.
* **Volatility Hits Extreme Levels** : Silver's implied options volatility reached highs not seen since 2021, with retail traders fueling a concentrated, parabolic rally.
* **Record Rallies Loom Ahead** : Traders position for feverish 2026 gains in metals tied to AI expenditures via bullish options bets, as silver trades at its most extreme premium since 1979.

* * *
* * *
# Billionaire dumps final Chicago pad as he flees to Miami
Billionaire Ken Griffin, who **[relocated Citadel's headquarters from Chicago to Miami](https://substack.com/redirect/9cec95c1-993c-4cc8-b555-57415567700d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in 2022, has placed his last remaining Windy City property--a luxurious penthouse--under contract after slashing its asking price by about 20 percent.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9cec95c1-993c-4cc8-b555-57415567700d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Luxury Penthouse Details** : The full-floor duplex at Park Tower on North Michigan Avenue, dubbed the building's "crown jewel," is listed at $12.5 million following a reduction from $15.75 million.
* **Completes Chicago Exit** : This sale marks the end of Griffin's extensive Chicago real estate holdings, divested after moving his hedge fund and family south.
* **" I've Lived In A Failed City-State": **Griffen has said that the decision to move was prompted by seeing the consequences of Chicago's policies himself. "I had **[25 bullet holes in the front of my building](https://substack.com/redirect/5886f2b2-099e-433c-9c88-01519646dd1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** where I lived. You can't live in a city awash [with] violent crime,"
* **Praises Florida Governance** : Griffin has highlighted Florida's focus on "traditional values," safe streets, great schools, and strong community as key attractions.
* **Massive Miami Investment** : Citadel's planned new office tower in Miami's Brickell neighborhood is projected to cost around $2.5 billion, underscoring his commitment to South Florida.

* * *
* * *
# **Dimon blasts political bias claims, praises Trump 's anti-"debanking" push**
JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon **[sharply rebuffed allegations](https://substack.com/redirect/f907a6f8-04a0-4178-8845-6649a7dd4b55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from Trump allies that the bank voluntarily cooperated with special counsel Jack Smith's probe into the President Tump, insisting Monday that records are surrendered only under court-ordered subpoenas, not political pressure.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f907a6f8-04a0-4178-8845-6649a7dd4b55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Dimon Demands Maturity:** "People have to grow up here" and stop fabricating claims, Dimon said, stressing JPMorgan never de-banks based on political or religious affiliations.
* **Strict Legal Compliance:** Banks follow subpoenas from multiple administrations--Democratic and Republican alike--and report suspicious activity as required by law, without voluntary disclosures.
* **Applauds Rule Changes:** Dimon has praised the Trump administration's anti-de-banking stance, noting he's advocated for regulatory reforms for 15 years.
* **Proposes Systemic Fix:** Dimon suggest banks should flag suspicious data for government decision-making so as to avoid forcing financial institutions into enforcement roles incurring bipartisan criticism.

* * *
* * *
# US GREENLIGHTS NVIDIA CHIPS TO CHINA!
The U.S. Commerce Department is **[poised to lift restrictions](https://substack.com/redirect/5ac7b3e0-5868-42ce-b4a4-78c88af10f78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on exports of Nvidia's powerful H200 AI chips to China, marking a compromise in the ongoing tech trade truce brokered by President Trump and Xi Jinping last month.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5ac7b3e0-5868-42ce-b4a4-78c88af10f78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Compromise Strategy Revealed** : Officials view H200 approval as a middle ground, blocking cutting-edge Blackwell chips while preventing a vacuum that could strengthen Huawei's domestic AI dominance.
* **Performance Boost Implications** : The H200, with superior high-bandwidth memory over the H100, is nearly six times more powerful than the current exportable H20, enabling China to build near-U.S.-level AI supercomputers.
* **Criticism from Lawmakers** : Senator Elizabeth Warren blasted the decision, accusing Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang of influencing policy through meetings and donations, warning it risks accelerating China's military and tech edge.
* **Market and Policy Shift** : Nvidia shares jumped 2% on the news, signaling a friendlier U.S. stance toward China amid rolled-back restrictions following Beijing's rare earth controls.
