name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/9/2025
body:
Whistleblower says Colorado’s DEI system collides with a federal ban
| | | | [](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
| | Hi friends,
💛 It's Colorado Gives Day! While Rocky Mountain Voice isn’t officially part of Colorado Gives Day, today is still a powerful reminder of how much local, independent journalism matters. If you believe in what we’re building, please consider supporting our 501(c)(3) nonprofit. **Your donation keeps us ad-free, reader-driven, and unafraid to tell the truth.** [Donate here.](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.joinrmv.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.joinrmv.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado families were hit with new data showing [taxes and fees climbing far faster than incomes](https://link.email.joinrmv.), with SB24-230 now challenged as an [unconstitutional climate “tax”](https://link.email.joinrmv.) that would raise $175 million without voter approval. A whistleblower inside the Department of Agriculture says [the state’s DEI mandates violate President Trump’s federal ban](https://link.email.joinrmv.) on DEI programs, triggering a retaliation probe after he warned the policy could jeopardize federal grants. Denver is preparing for [Waymo’s driverless robotaxis](https://link.email.joinrmv.), Liberty Common School won a [$1.8 million federal expansion grant](https://link.email.joinrmv.), and federal prosecutors revealed a longtime USGS IT employee [stole nearly $1 million](https://link.email.joinrmv.) through fake invoices—another alarming government oversight failure.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** A GAO report revealed Obamacare subsidies are still being [approved for fake identities](https://link.email.joinrmv.), with fictitious applicants receiving thousands per month despite years of fraud warnings. And the Supreme Court agreed to hear the challenge to President Trump’s order [limiting birthright citizenship](https://link.email.joinrmv.)—setting up a major test that could redefine immigration policy nationwide.
🗣️**Commentary Spotlight...** Commentaries highlight [Tina Peters’ pardon request](https://link.email.joinrmv.) amid new evidence tying her case to a broader foreign-interference investigation, call for a pause on [Colorado’s troubled wolf-reintroduction program](https://link.email.joinrmv.), and urge voters to reclaim the [true meaning of conservatism and common sense](https://link.email.joinrmv.) as recent political outcomes show how easily those principles are misunderstood or abandoned.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, December 9, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Caught between two governments: Whistleblower says Colorado’s DEI system collides with a federal ban](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
When managers in the Colorado Department of Agriculture (CDA) logged into their Nov. 6 virtual meeting, the agenda read like a standard operational update. But on the list sat two items that created angst: the statewide EDI/Colorado for All report due in December and the launch of a 2026 Inclusive Leadership cohort.
Those initiatives, part of Colorado’s expanding equity and inclusion system, set the stage for a clash with a different set of requirements now coming from D.C.
Rich Guggenheim, the program manager who oversees plant certification inspections for Colorado’s nursery and seed industries, signs off on several USDA pest survey grants. When Inclusive Leadership came up, he typed a short assessment into the chat.
“DEI on steroids.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**[Colorado families hit from every angle as taxes and fees outpace income growth](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **Taxes and fees are soaring far faster than incomes:** Since 2016, the typical Denver-area household’s tax and fee burden is up 48%, while income rose only 27%, leaving families with less real money each month.
* **Policymakers are bypassing TABOR with new “fees”:** From payroll premiums to transportation add-ons and delivery charges, lawmakers have expanded revenue streams that hike daily costs without voter approval—effectively taxing residents through the back door.
* **Housing and local taxes are squeezing families out:** Property taxes surged 20–50% across many counties after Gallagher was repealed, with higher sales taxes and municipal fees piling on—pushing Colorado closer to high-cost coastal states that people are now fleeing.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
|
---
**[Tina Peters Requests Presidential Pardon as New Evidence Bolsters Her Claims](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY A.L. GOODWIN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **Tina Peters seeks a presidential pardon as new evidence backs her claims:** Her attorneys argue she is not a criminal but a key witness in a widening national-security investigation, with sworn testimony from Venezuela’s former intelligence chief confirming foreign interference and vulnerabilities in U.S. election systems.
* **Dominion’s own communications helped trigger the criminal case:** Internal emails show Dominion coordinated with Colorado officials and the DOJ before charges were brought, yet this context was kept from jurors after the judge blocked key evidence—fueling concerns that Peters was targeted for exposing system weaknesses.
* **Whistleblowers and experts say Peters preserved crucial forensic election data:** Technical declarations describe hidden remote-access capabilities, post-certification software changes, and deleted logs—making Peters’ archived records one of the only complete datasets available to federal investigators now probing election-system integrity.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Do You Really Understand Conservatism or Common Sense?**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY RUSS MINARY | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 8** _“You keep using that word. I do not think it means what you think it means.” In the very funny 1987 film, ‘The Princess Bride,’ the character Inigo Montoya clearly identifies a problem that plagues both culture and politics today: people use words without thinking, understanding or agreeing upon their meaning, which leads to needless mistakes, arguments and division._
[**Victory in Christ — The Calling of a Child of God**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 7** _Let’s explore the Reason, Grace, Truth, and Revelation behind the Calling of God’s Children. Every follower of Jesus has two callings—a Primary Calling and a Secondary Calling. Your Primary Calling is not about what you do, but who you become. It’s the call to be a child of God. Jesus said, “Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God” (Matthew 5:9). That’s not a task—it’s an identity._
[**A fee by any other name? Colorado’s climate charge faces a constitutional reckoning**](https://link.email.joinrmv.) **BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 5** _Colorado’s climate fee law, SB24-230, is now at the center of a constitutional fight, but the lawmakers and advocacy groups that once championed its goals have offered no explanation as the legal questions mount. SB24-230 took effect in July and is expected to pull in more than $175 million next year from oil and gas producers._

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).

clean_body: Whistleblower says Colorado’s DEI system collides with a federal ban | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Hi friends, 💛 It's Colorado Gives Day! While Rocky Mountain Voice isn’t officially part of Colorado Gives Day, today is still a powerful reminder of how much local, independent journalism matters. If you believe in what we’re building, please consider supporting our 501(c)(3) nonprofit. Your donation keeps us ad-free, reader-driven, and unafraid to tell the truth. Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast , or watch on or . Here is a summary of today's top stories: 🏔️ Here in Colorado... Colorado families were hit with new data showing , with SB24-230 now challenged as an that would raise $175 million without voter approval. A whistleblower inside the Department of Agriculture says on DEI programs, triggering a retaliation probe after he warned the policy could jeopardize federal grants. Denver is preparing for , Liberty Common School won a , and federal prosecutors revealed a longtime USGS IT employee through fake invoices—another alarming government oversight failure. 🇺🇸On the National Stage... A GAO report revealed Obamacare subsidies are still being , with fictitious applicants receiving thousands per month despite years of fraud warnings. And the Supreme Court agreed to hear the challenge to President Trump’s order —setting up a major test that could redefine immigration policy nationwide. 🗣️Commentary Spotlight... Commentaries highlight amid new evidence tying her case to a broader foreign-interference investigation, call for a pause on , and urge voters to reclaim the as recent political outcomes show how easily those principles are misunderstood or abandoned. This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, December 9, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY JEN SCHUMANN, When managers in the Colorado Department of Agriculture (CDA) logged into their Nov. 6 virtual meeting, the agenda read like a standard operational update. But on the list sat two items that created angst: the statewide EDI/Colorado for All report due in December and the launch of a 2026 Inclusive Leadership cohort. Those initiatives, part of Colorado’s expanding equity and inclusion system, set the stage for a clash with a different set of requirements now coming from D.C. Rich Guggenheim, the program manager who oversees plant certification inspections for Colorado’s nursery and seed industries, signs off on several USDA pest survey grants. When Inclusive Leadership came up, he typed a short assessment into the chat. “DEI on steroids.” | BY SHAINA COLE, Taxes and fees are soaring far faster than incomes: Since 2016, the typical Denver-area household’s tax and fee burden is up 48%, while income rose only 27%, leaving families with less real money each month. Policymakers are bypassing TABOR with new “fees”: From payroll premiums to transportation add-ons and delivery charges, lawmakers have expanded revenue streams that hike daily costs without voter approval—effectively taxing residents through the back door. Housing and local taxes are squeezing families out: Property taxes surged 20–50% across many counties after Gallagher was repealed, with higher sales taxes and municipal fees piling on—pushing Colorado closer to high-cost coastal states that people are now fleeing. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | BY A.L. GOODWIN, Tina Peters seeks a presidential pardon as new evidence backs her claims: Her attorneys argue she is not a criminal but a key witness in a widening national-security investigation, with sworn testimony from Venezuela’s former intelligence chief confirming foreign interference and vulnerabilities in U.S. election systems. Dominion’s own communications helped trigger the criminal case: Internal emails show Dominion coordinated with Colorado officials and the DOJ before charges were brought, yet this context was kept from jurors after the judge blocked key evidence—fueling concerns that Peters was targeted for exposing system weaknesses. Whistleblowers and experts say Peters preserved crucial forensic election data: Technical declarations describe hidden remote-access capabilities, post-certification software changes, and deleted logs—making Peters’ archived records one of the only complete datasets available to federal investigators now probing election-system integrity. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ BY RUSS MINARY | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 8 “You keep using that word. I do not think it means what you think it means.” In the very funny 1987 film, ‘The Princess Bride,’ the character Inigo Montoya clearly identifies a problem that plagues both culture and politics today: people use words without thinking, understanding or agreeing upon their meaning, which leads to needless mistakes, arguments and division. BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 7 Let’s explore the Reason, Grace, Truth, and Revelation behind the Calling of God’s Children. Every follower of Jesus has two callings—a Primary Calling and a Secondary Calling. Your Primary Calling is not about what you do, but who you become. It’s the call to be a child of God. Jesus said, “Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God” (Matthew 5:9). That’s not a task—it’s an identity. BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 5 Colorado’s climate fee law, SB24-230, is now at the center of a constitutional fight, but the lawmakers and advocacy groups that once championed its goals have offered no explanation as the legal questions mount. SB24-230 took effect in July and is expected to pull in more than $175 million next year from oil and gas producers. Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share? name: Christina Bohannan
subject: I teach college students
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120939153/587843306/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTIzMjE0Yi0yOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i3Sq2xKIKYfsVJ-vjMf0fRrR0Gy7er6GEMHm8VqNQaI=)

Peter,

After more than 25 years as a teacher, there’s a rhythm to the academic year that’s become familiar to me. I’m still struck by the same thing every spring.

**There’s a moment when a college student realizes they’re about to step from a structured world into one with far fewer safety nets.** Usually, that uncertainty is paired with excitement. But lately, _I’ve noticed that excitement is fading faster than it should._

**Students go from envisioning their futures to feeling discouraged almost immediately.** Not because they lack talent or drive — they have those in abundance — but because they’re staring down a job market tilted against them, an economy where homeownership feels out of reach, and healthcare costs that make them wonder how they’ll manage a sudden illness or even routine care.

It’s painful to watch young people do everything we’ve told them to do, only to feel like the deck is stacked against them. The policies Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her allies in Congress have supported over and over again are part of the reason why. They’ve made choices that make it harder for young people and young families to get their footing, let alone get ahead.

I’m running because I refuse to accept that this is the future we’re offering the next generation.

**[In Congress, I’ll work for wages that reflect the reality of today’s economy, for housing that young people actually have a shot at affording, and for healthcare that doesn’t feel like a gamble. If you want to stand with me and demand a better future, I’m asking for your support. Make a donation to my campaign of $5, $10, or whatever you can afford>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120939154/587843307/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251208_teach_fndd_clq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251208_teach_fndd_clq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=c123214b-29d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTIzMjE0Yi0yOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i3Sq2xKIKYfsVJ-vjMf0fRrR0Gy7er6GEMHm8VqNQaI=)**

Thank you for being part of this,

Christina

Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue.

subject: Thomas Sowell Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrmaiap4mu6d1rleupkl96qtvkc7q0afukv2d688_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cph68oj2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoqnun621qg9ueg3g2hjjncbqg3ba845ie4qeb50_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cph68oj2c3h2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpu20lhtuleau9qol33goh2l4fnl63vn3cnpnifo_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cph68oj2c3h2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6c4i3jblhai8815404l78vb86brte9umkvc2h40_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cph68oj2c3h2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpqbaslnp2e9ce072ns653dcb7aqr6qiui1g44i8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cph68oj2c3h2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Changes to Medicare coverage and expiring tax credits
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
The Republican health care crisis is hitting home.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120939336/587844044/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVmODM5Ny0yOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OZ1JbNpwd6cL3-ON6u4hcg6hEvPKC36UBOvlCYsNQ-w=&emci=43c2156f-57d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=2d5f8397-29d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **The Republican health care crisis is hitting home.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120939337/587844045/1596212816?refcode=2025-12-09-healthcareresend&recurring=&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2d5f8397-29d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVmODM5Ny0yOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OZ1JbNpwd6cL3-ON6u4hcg6hEvPKC36UBOvlCYsNQ-w=)****At a time when families are already struggling with high prices and a weak job market, Republicans in Congress are doubling down on a health care crisis of their own making.** Deep Medicaid cuts, major changes to Medicare coverage, and the pending expiration of essential health care tax credits are creating immense uncertainty in the health care market. Employers are bracing for the largest annual increase in health care costs in 15 years and mass layoffs are hitting local hospitals hard. Allowing these health care tax credits to expire is a devastating continuation of the health care crisis the Trump administration started back in July, when the Big Ugly Law made the largest cuts to Medicaid in its history. Because of the Big Ugly Law, more than 328,000 Washingtonians will lose their health care insurance in the next few years. clean_body: The Republican health care crisis is hitting home. | | | | The Republican health care crisis is hitting home. a time when families are already struggling with high prices and a weak job market, Republicans in Congress are doubling down on a health care crisis of their own making. Deep Medicaid cuts, major changes to Medicare coverage, and the pending expiration of essential health care tax credits are creating immense uncertainty in the health care market. Employers are bracing for the largest annual increase in health care costs in 15 years and mass layoffs are hitting local hospitals hard. Allowing these health care tax credits to expire is a devastating continuation of the health care crisis the Trump administration started back in July, when the Big Ugly Law made the largest cuts to Medicaid in its history. Because of the Big Ugly Law, more than 328,000 Washingtonians will lose their health care insurance in the next few years. = = I will continue to fight to lower health care costs for Northwest Washington. name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23705%2E4449941%2EB7gXgg) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23705%2E4449941%2EB7gXgg) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70848?t=3&akid=23705%2E4449941%2EB7gXgg) Team,

If you can believe it, things didn't stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn't stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress.

**[All for saying things the president didn't like to hear.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70848?t=4&akid=23705%2E4449941%2EB7gXgg)**

If you're feeling like this isn't the country you grew up in, I don't blame you. But I hope you aren't giving up on it, team.

I certainly haven't. This country has given me too much, and I'll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.

**[There's no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70848?t=5&akid=23705%2E4449941%2EB7gXgg)**

If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he's got another thing coming.

And if you'd be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:

**_[Split a donation between Fight For Reform and me. It would mean a lot.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70848?t=6&akid=23705%2E4449941%2EB7gXgg)_** | | [DONATE $5 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70849?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=7&akid=23705%2E4449941%2EB7gXgg)

Mark

name: Team In This Together PAC
subject: We're seeing the exact opposite of Trump's campaign promises
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

When Trump ran for office, he promised to make Americans' lives better by lowering costs, creating a stronger economy, and more opportunity.

**But almost a year into his second term, we're seeing the exact opposite.**

Instead of solving real problems, this administration is focused on political fights, personal vendettas, and rewarding their political allies at the expense of everyday Americans.

We have a government that has already slashed Medicaid funding by hundreds of billions of dollars, which will force clinics and hospitals across the country to close services, lay off staff, and leave millions of Americans without care. Banks are raising overdraft fees, and tariffs are driving up the cost of food and fuel.

Americans deserve leaders who keep their promises and focus on what actually matters: Affordable healthcare, fair wages, strong schools, and rebuilding trust in our institutions. **Leaders who put people first, not politics.**

In Kentucky alone, we've proven that focusing on real issues, cutting through the noise, uniting communities, and delivering results can win elections, even in the toughest environments. The American people are ready for change, and they're ready for something better. **Good governance means doing the right thing to help the people you represent, no matter what political party you align with. Together, we can and will restore the focus back on the people and the issues that matter most.**

**[Will you chip in anything you can to help In This Together PAC support real, honest leaders at every level?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120939488/587844741/1089852515?refcode=em25_251209_oppo_fndd_gq_act___tittp_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251209_oppo_fndd_gq_act___tittp_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=e2364dbc-29d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode2=e2364dbc-29d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTIzNjRkYmMtMjlkNS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iDDHCI0gdoJBppaFLsdn1fqFuVzjUlpxrZHUxctT5So=)** clean_body: Peter, When Trump ran for office, he promised to make Americans' lives better by lowering costs, creating a stronger economy, and more opportunity. But almost a year into his second term, we're seeing the exact opposite. Instead of solving real problems, this administration is focused on political fights, personal vendettas, and rewarding their political allies at the expense of everyday Americans. We have a government that has already slashed Medicaid funding by hundreds of billions of dollars, which will force clinics and hospitals across the country to close services, lay off staff, and leave millions of Americans without care. Banks are raising overdraft fees, and tariffs are driving up the cost of food and fuel. Americans deserve leaders who keep their promises and focus on what actually matters: Affordable healthcare, fair wages, strong schools, and rebuilding trust in our institutions. Leaders who put people first, not politics. In Kentucky alone, we've proven that focusing on real issues, cutting through the noise, uniting communities, and delivering results can win elections, even in the toughest environments. The American people are ready for change, and they're ready for something better. Good governance means doing the right thing to help the people you represent, no matter what political party you align with. Together, we can and will restore the focus back on the people and the issues that matter most. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team In This Together PAC | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. | | Hot off the press from Minnesota. **The fossil fuel industry just launched a super PAC —**** _funded entirely by Chevron_****— to attack progressive champion Peggy Flanagan in Minnesota's Senate race.** They're spending hundreds of thousands of dollars trying to buy this primary because they know Peggy stands for a rapid transition to cheaper, cleaner, renewable energy. **That threatens the fossil fuel industry's profits, and they're coming after her hard.** **I've been in Peggy's shoes.** Years ago, the same fossil fuel interests came after me here in Oregon. They tried to buy that race, too. We beat them because grassroots supporters like you stood up and said: Our democracy is not for sale. [**That's why I'm proud to support Peggy, and why I'm asking you to split a donation between our campaigns today. Peggy isn't just another candidate. She's a fighter who has been underestimated her entire life and has proved people wrong every single time. From winning a crowded school board race to becoming one of the very first Native American women in the Minnesota Legislature, **Peggy has always put people over power**.
Peggy grew up relying on SNAP, Medicaid, and Section 8 housing vouchers, experiences that fuel her fight to ensure government works for the people—not the powerful.
**We need that energy in the Senate** — leaders who build movements from the ground up, listen to their communities, and fight for working families. She's facing an avalanche of GOP billionaire cash, and the only way she'll overcome it is with people like us standing beside her.
[**Will you split a grassroots donation between my campaign and Peggy's today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120939730/587845507/-363641130?refcode=2025-12-09-merkleyflanagan&recurring=&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=09618fdc-29d5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTYxOGZkYy0yOWQ1LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XwwZAGbarmk4ScIT01ABYPeDPDK1L5iUJHQ1L07rYbA=)
Onward!

clean_body: I’m proud to support Peggy Flanagan for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota. | | | | Hot off the press from Minnesota. The fossil fuel industry just launched a super PAC — funded entirely by Chevron— to attack progressive champion Peggy Flanagan in Minnesota's Senate race. They're spending hundreds of thousands of dollars trying to buy this primary because they know Peggy stands for a rapid transition to cheaper, cleaner, renewable energy. That threatens the fossil fuel industry's profits, and they're coming after her hard. I've been in Peggy's shoes. Years ago, the same fossil fuel interests came after me here in Oregon. They tried to buy that race, too. We beat them because grassroots supporters like you stood up and said: Our democracy is not for sale. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process and split your contribution between Peggy Flanagan and Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Peggy isn't just another candidate. She's a fighter who has been underestimated her entire life and has proved people wrong every single time. From winning a crowded school board race to becoming one of the very first Native American women in the Minnesota Legislature, Peggy has always put people over power. Peggy grew up relying on SNAP, Medicaid, and Section 8 housing vouchers, experiences that fuel her fight to ensure government works for the people—not the powerful. We need that energy in the Senate — leaders who build movements from the ground up, listen to their communities, and fight for working families. She's facing an avalanche of GOP billionaire cash, and the only way she'll overcome it is with people like us standing beside her. = Onward! Jeff | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

Friend,They tried to break us. At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: _" F*** Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley."_ And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1b7401588ca441d58e40a15f1273fab8&_e=HaLNk-e1YMgbjNRj5uN6XLlFAu4ex_OIJKyBD2p9zyhKWjy0HiRbTPxYJzBsYBXMKFMqsdisl4Bfmy4OjOi0T_8h5w9Wa5IuOpw1RsEoLfJYWgsIknbijYPjlgjG-eT4FOczxDYpYcLBmp3Bn0h0AeVZbvEzBm_M0-Did72Mh3eNhuUOff65gAjmKLm0BJtBSvPCjviFyh9ew8u0mYT0In_tzsJ0PXujSWpGg2lB67n4lqa9mxs4EDkeWng_yit6xMnN-WdFQkvpYUdO9VupoUo072GEDolvhSEmAA8CUgLRLxWl3FE4bFS5b6voHtJmeHgXWthtpE68VGF0pRD9dtILgDrUklw-jBGdCr92Rp1bu9E4RvOebcC5QuqQvXue1bH3ybSQGtN31EYLBa5YV0x95CpVlvLUd4JyzjmktBPH8l-64sMIPX-J_H23hE7bsp6SUljv0HY-YNX1NMaOarrzKoWGvrwq6DLxZ5nKePngxLocm5vaWpk4C4Tbl-Uzo8LjmqtwCumQCDoV0jxjeDEqKsLTZ2c69Cx0uVou9gjG-ku1k9DQEDjSATubyOoq15o44p5L4S2BbyD_UobdLViEcO_75VNrNpY7XDWy4XYtc4ir5kYgMfeFvb1PE7Ea3IWIsU0khFTCs85Spu8KRx0KRSxPxZm5ih9fh_-403IaI4jEWLZkpAfdYv5VQgXF)

ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance. Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located their exit and continued to meet them with violence. The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear a message of faith, family, and freedom. A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall of protesters screaming profanity in her children's faces. Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety after being struck in the chaos outside the event. These out-of-control Leftists weren't satisfied with merely being heard in protest --_They wanted to pick a fight._ Police made multiple arrests. **UC Berkeley, a so-called "bastion" of free speech, turned into a war zone.**
---

But still... The event went on. A packed house. Our students didn't retreat. They stood strong. Even when ANTIFA plotted to register for tickets to leave HUNDREDS of empty seats, our patriotic students filled the room anyways. And they gave Charlie's legacy the tribute it deserved. Rob Schneider took the stage with humility and fire. Dr. Frank Turek brought clarity and conviction. What took place behind those doors was a powerful reminder: **Truth is louder than hate. **
---

They didn't get here on their own. They got here because patriots like YOU believed in them. Because when the mobs swarmed... When the threats came in... When everyone from the fake news media to the so-called political "experts" said Gen Z was lost to the Left... And when they tried to silence this movement that Charlie built... People like you stood up. Stayed in. Kept the mission alive. And showed our young people that they're not alone. That America is still worth fighting for. That free speech still has defenders.That faith, family, and FREEDOM still have a future. So if you've ever wondered if it's working... At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: " F* Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley." And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester. ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance. Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located their exit and continued to meet them with violence. The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear a message of faith, family, and freedom. A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall of protesters screaming profanity in her children's faces. Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety after being struck in the chaos outside the event. These out-of-control Leftists weren't satisfied with merely being heard in protest --They wanted to pick a fight. Police made multiple arrests. UC Berkeley, a so-called "bastion" of free speech, turned into a war zone. | | But still... The event went on. A packed house. Our students didn't retreat. They stood strong. Even when ANTIFA plotted to register for tickets to leave HUNDREDS of empty seats, our patriotic students filled the room anyways. And they gave Charlie's legacy the tribute it deserved. Rob Schneider took the stage with humility and fire. Dr. Frank Turek brought clarity and conviction. What took place behind those doors was a powerful reminder: Truth is louder than hate. | | Friend, I need you to hear this next part -- because it's about patriots like you. This tour? This fight? These students who keep showing up -- even when it's dangerous? They didn't get here on their own. They got here because patriots like YOU believed in them. Because when the mobs swarmed... When the threats came in... When everyone from the fake news media to the so-called political "experts" said Gen Z was lost to the Left... And when they tried to silence this movement that Charlie built... People like you stood up. Stayed in. Kept the mission alive. And showed our young people that they're not alone. That America is still worth fighting for. That free speech still has defenders.That faith, family, and FREEDOM still have a future. So if you've ever wondered if it's working... If it's worth it... Let me be clear: Patriots like you are why we 're winning the American Culture War. And now this is your chance to be part of something rare -- a moment in history where patriotic young Americans are reclaiming the culture, one campus at a time. Our students on campus are truly the vanguard for saving this nation, but they need to know we have their backs. Will you make a gift right now to send backup to the frontlines and stand with these young patriots who refuse to quit? The Left tried to intimidate us. They tried to outnumber us. They tried to drown us out. But we didn't blink. Our students didn't blink. The mob at Berkeley couldn't stop us. Because we didn 't come to Berkeley to be liked... We came to speak truth. We came to finish what Charlie started. That's exactly what happened. And that 's exactly why we're winning. Friend, thank you. Patriots like you helped turn chaos into courage... Hate into hope... And grief into grit. Let's keep going... | | For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.** Friend, when the Left screamed in our students' faces... When they mocked Charlie's murder... Our students held the line. If you believe in what they're doing... If you know this fight is just beginning... Your support means more than you know. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

_Central banks are buying gold at the fastest pace in 55 years — here's why it matters to you._
For decades, the Federal Reserve promised Americans the same thing: "Trust us — your money is safe."

But confidence in the dollar is collapsing... and even insiders at the Fed are quietly discussing a plan that could change everything you've worked for: a **gold revaluation**.

* * *
**The Signals Are Everywhere**
**Gold has already broken through**

**Gold has already broken through $3,400/oz** , and central banks are on a buying spree — accumulating over **80 tons of gold per month** , the fastest pace in 55 years.

The Fed recently released a staff note openly discussing gold revaluation — something dismissed as "conspiracy theory" just a few years ago.

Former Swiss banker **Clive Thompson** estimates gold could be revalued at **$15,000/oz** , unlocking nearly **$4 trillion** in liquidity.

**Crescat Capital's Tavi Costa** suggests even higher theoretical levels — between **$25,000** and **$55,000/oz** — if the Fed sought to restore balance sheets to historical norms.

If central banks — the very institutions that print money — are abandoning the dollar and hoarding gold, shouldn't you be asking why?

clean_body: Is the Fed Preparing a $15,000/oz Gold Reset? Central banks are buying gold at the fastest pace in 55 years — here's why it matters to you.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | Is the Fed Preparing a $15,000/oz Gold Reset? Central banks are buying gold at the fastest pace in 55 years — here's why it matters to you. For decades, the Federal Reserve promised Americans the same thing: "Trust us — your money is safe." But confidence in the dollar is collapsing... and even insiders at the Fed are quietly discussing a plan that could change everything you've worked for: a gold revaluation. The Signals Are Everywhere Gold has already broken through Gold has already broken through $3,400/oz , and central banks are on a buying spree — accumulating over 80 tons of gold per month , the fastest pace in 55 years. The Fed recently released a staff note openly discussing gold revaluation — something dismissed as "conspiracy theory" just a few years ago. Former Swiss banker Clive Thompson estimates gold could be revalued at $15,000/oz , unlocking nearly $4 trillion in liquidity. Crescat Capital's Tavi Costa suggests even higher theoretical levels — between $25,000 and $55,000/oz — if the Fed sought to restore balance sheets to historical norms. If central banks — the very institutions that print money — are abandoning the dollar and hoarding gold, shouldn't you be asking why? P.S. Don't wait for the Fed's next move — The Dollar's Foundation Is Cracking The U.S. is drowning in $35 trillion+ of national debt. Every "solution" involves creating more dollars — further devaluing the ones you already hold. BRICS nations are openly building a post-dollar financial system backed by commodities and gold. Political interference at the Fed has shattered the myth of independence — weakening global trust in America's currency. | If you have $50,000, $100,000, or more in savings, an IRA, or a 401(k), your nest egg is directly tied to the dollar's fate. What happens if the Fed flips the switch? Overnight, a revaluation of gold could mean an instant repricing of the dollar — and devastating consequences for unprotected retirement accounts. Why Gold & Silver Are the Proven Hedge In the 1970s, runaway inflation pushed gold up over 600%. In 2008, while Wall Street crumbled, gold doubled in value. Today, even central banks classify gold as a Tier-1 reserve asset — the same level of safety as cash, while silver adds the extra advantage of rising industrial demand. #
Peter —
There’s been a lot of news in this race for the U.S. Senate.
I want to share my thoughts on Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett's entry into the race, but first, I need to ask for your help.
[**If you feel like the movement we have built on this campaign puts us in the best position to win in November, deliver victories for working people, and usher in a new kind of politics, then I am asking you to make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford today.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251209-1-ak&t=1&akid=304%2E1347274%2ErZxG2z)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251209-1-ak&t=2&akid=304%2E1347274%2ErZxG2z)
Now about yesterday's news.
On behalf of all of us, I want to welcome Congresswoman Crockett into the Texas Senate race.
We launched this campaign three months ago because Texans deserve a leader who knows how to fight and knows how to win. We’ve built the infrastructure to win this race in November — shattering fundraising records, mobilizing 10,000 volunteers, and sharing a message that inspires Texans across the political spectrum.
We always knew this was going to be a tough race, and I am so proud of our progress. The polls show us with the best chance to flip this seat, and your support is a big reason why.
I am going to continue to make the case for why our campaign is best positioned to win in November and take power back for working people, but that is not something I can do alone.
It will take all of us doing everything we can to make it happen. So today, especially today, I am asking:
[**Please make a contribution to our campaign for the U.S. Senate in Texas. Our average online contribution is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. No amount is too small. It will add up fast when so many people are contributing what they can.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251209-1-ak&t=3&akid=304%2E1347274%2ErZxG2z)

Colorado shouldn’t be blue
A state built on faith, family, freedom, and the Second Amendment is being tested -- and its future will shape the country.

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=120ac072a1484d0d92442994d82d706c&_e=YLhZs4nmjaSaorItP0LjKMoHLTJP9J6U0eyiHXqZsBEznXhx8v6PCOym5JeMknye0tFmv4ArjONQ4Hh2c_OiDQoEYDdLmb8DJP_yOSkXliTs7XnPDURK6geqp7i0ZBgjzxevujppUOOVvNLdg7KkW90ZtkOb2Fb4evEB1nMXiMnQ-yUc_PAZuvO7DdlZWIblJ9s7UgmUYMCuQPehwMkT3DVIis16ty3cjkCdrf3mR1WBBoOSfkVxxpUPry7jaO4jSLpwD06ilQra5js7gAp6CEE07wIiqAL5rIJkjKsQZWXEkjUzC2sEPtoZrozlonop-NZ4jIDPE2Pi_w3Fe2Oe7CkkuFVfE8nYG1wrPr20nxESuZ2X4YXcuDAIJ2GHqEViuDm9Bx6f1WYa__FHI5WVF8uSq0LuMAHai8kwvaoAlWd58dK4npo6ezqic4ZwUJBaegI14lCEANTKNbADyKJv03_JKx7zzX_Q6GB2CD1-eQUsgGYnTnt25NFFhIs4v-euZ83Z63C9QmDIn31w5mVAx6kHr3Pk8murRAobk1tsXU7t-y_RGce3u1amj9VnRUtriMbZaT9-1yUGkk1REnFabaQa2DfjBXrggJrfs7i3ZjM%3D)

| | Friend,
---
| | If this is the first time you're hearing from me, let me introduce myself. My name is **Victor Marx** -- a husband, father, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and founder of an international humanitarian organization that has carried out more than 150 high-risk rescue missions around the world.I've spent my life stepping into the chaos most people run from, fighting for those who can't fight for themselves.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=120ac072a1484d0d92442994d82d706c&_e=YLhZs4nmjaSaorItP0LjKMoHLTJP9J6U0eyiHXqZsBEznXhx8v6PCOym5JeMknye0tFmv4ArjONQ4Hh2c_OiDQoEYDdLmb8DJP_yOSkXliTs7XnPDURK6geqp7i0ZBgjzxevujppUOOVvNLdg7KkW90ZtkOb2Fb4evEB1nMXiMnQ-yUc_PAZuvO7DdlZWIblJ9s7UgmUYMCuQPehwMkT3PaV2XCX1rzyF405oRTTJE20VswUp7Sv7XhWkPng_YmrXYvUeBTFnJcl6WlN8rGxLVarWSwUoYnsmGPPxL9-H_l6PLrzBWxfQpe2N2r8XdaKJn4jtNWuxw6mgr3Gb_Aa0mkC9qEuGrMn9LeYUZV3gve6WZ0qgkm7v2t2y63w3XTih1yK-CUSpxdLK3jVOEbj4EzM0SnuN7X59FIhIOPpywzVvW94DABuDmU9-LOI5mHnW_d1WExaPcUbat_0SRBMmvPp97Ks4Sm0KfpfYPBsyXGWfKY5_6xHbfjYDDUwnSn5-SE3UGVDq7r7JwUmGVZVeCBX5Ol39D0mParUYbRmLLhT20pqUnC7EQw6lTZM0OAgNEmduSktxO66oUfFExrCyd_Tj6pufetn8K4iQQeTBFU%3D)
---
**_I never expected to run for Governor of Colorado..._** But people I respected deeply -- _including Charlie and Erika Kirk_ -- believed in me and urged me to step forward because they saw what was happening here in our state.After Charlie was killed, Erika reminded me that he believed this was a fight I was meant to take on.**They were right, and I am now fully committed to winning this fight.**[_**Today, I am asking you to join me...**_](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=120ac072a1484d0d92442994d82d706c&_e=YLhZs4nmjaSaorItP0LjKMoHLTJP9J6U0eyiHXqZsBEznXhx8v6PCOym5JeMknye0tFmv4ArjONQ4Hh2c_OiDQoEYDdLmb8DJP_yOSkXliTs7XnPDURK6geqp7i0ZBgjzxevujppUOOVvNLdg7KkW90ZtkOb2Fb4evEB1nMXiMnQ-yUc_PAZuvO7DdlZWIblJ9s7UgmUYMCuQPehwMkT3N2zupwyBTKaZgK3JYy6lLpyRlMTihijsKG-zHQKizFzXb4lAgPFuatCuQSopa3VPiWgtlnXC9mNtGYdiSv-jpxqPNX9CyrT4IlQBp6Yu65jKiQo3KlFUDv3syCAaobOt2kXH5E5GLvD8RcqNFWiNggxuqXJk-GmeVM93RGTIEFvhNkNXtWdI6YhPWM6SjXMQgeNFWxE39LgmQaircqXIbVre71Pxedfg1DUtJ65EsPs2_ifNBvubkF_3IZRPyYUJFSojysdK2Yt7doHVQsgzsKBcxx8C7sl5e0CEayZjY2SgySuT8dws8DgF7uli2kPRdEiRK1VniNro9tKJepFlQ94JIpTquWI3HxG4S9kacC01dw4slC83d5oasLxcPfM0XkxHKs4LzS4KdYHu3J-ywc%3D)
---
[ **ARE YOU IN? JOIN VICTOR!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=120ac072a1484d0d92442994d82d706c&_e=YLhZs4nmjaSaorItP0LjKMoHLTJP9J6U0eyiHXqZsBEznXhx8v6PCOym5JeMknye0tFmv4ArjONQ4Hh2c_OiDQoEYDdLmb8DJP_yOSkXliTs7XnPDURK6geqp7i0ZBgjzxevujppUOOVvNLdg7KkW90ZtkOb2Fb4evEB1nMXiMnQ-yUc_PAZuvO7DdlZWIblJ9s7UgmUYMCuQPehwMkT3E8tZep0WYtcreN-8FGkXfwYzVR_RPszhWMJoDUY59K6eW7XoCn4vQDy7yx9TQ4VKF2gPPlqYyrfpq4l7AtKnLs1SZpcCJrkDOwtmZ9LKqvoHas6EZjHhstcj-x68Gksjc0UOWUokFBR55cCh7HpmqkH6tNDI2vxmZQmv_F2xAeOu4znrTqQnj6b6OPDd-UiR5IU1GTFBkf2Hm7XK8ZuFIaFPpbQmfGbEj__VWRU3mNrD7FElIBlCxYUPv6lGK9nJhGDmCoCobbbS_YEouJxoVnEaDM-yoD_7DpVyRm9zKC3Sjno-hh6adqbznsLqAucMWtlR2kUk16nLFpX6LZBAsOEmcP1oTj-cXlLnb84FSjkgypzEE406YRuZg0cmFrV32Zje16YmKgNkDaj6EfuYA0%3D)
---
Because here's the truth most people outside our state don't realize: **_Colorado SHOULD still be a_**** _red_**** _state._** Colorado was built on independence, limited government, faith, family, and the unshakeable belief in the Second Amendment. Those values run deep in our history and in our people.But over time, the political establishment and a flood of left-wing ideas have overpowered the very values that made Colorado strong. We've watched our state shift from red, to purple, to blue -- not because the people changed, **but because leadership failed them.**_And that failure matters far beyond our borders._ Colorado has become a testing ground for policies that spread nationwide -- soft-on-crime agendas, government overreach, attacks on faith, restrictions on constitutional freedoms. **If we stop that tide**** _here_****, we stop it from sweeping across America.**
---
[ **JOIN VICTOR!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=120ac072a1484d0d92442994d82d706c&_e=YLhZs4nmjaSaorItP0LjKMoHLTJP9J6U0eyiHXqZsBEznXhx8v6PCOym5JeMknye0tFmv4ArjONQ4Hh2c_OiDQoEYDdLmb8DJP_yOSkXliTs7XnPDURK6geqp7i0ZBgjzxevujppUOOVvNLdg7KkW90ZtkOb2Fb4evEB1nMXiMnQ-yUc_PAZuvO7DdlZWIblJ9s7UgmUYMCuQPehwMkT3GPjNb5Qd2Jpp3Mp_npR1u5WnlKaCx_W6jEF9Y1iOL3-7YFHyNod81wi4vfA-UH897oD1-H8Lj6LVY7TswtyL12Do88ufS-csHSHXj6XSqPlDiXTk9uyZIdYcPPfKNa76GTwF1l0LrCVd97phobaELgnHftzF_m3lrLzVXqsHah4KN_vWAcGiIeTLBEBm91l2h7Z-q4w1I2KHLg-5ogalKdSAnXiI113XbHcUIZBdTgZVcY80wtKRQy3WV-nSka-v8FKWr0OyZOnRQfuXHNby-456FokOdAPt10uonsWHl7qUlyPXhpEpayhdcHPs3XHnMsR_B25pqVx9rH8oeiN3PgVj_gK6_mv6K3G8MxnJkgYmyjyQVCBOzW72sobykz8ric6ZqBbFBRp-dq4oYNVG6A%3D)
---
That's why this race is so important. **If Colorado flips back, the entire country will feel it.** It will prove that conservative, constitutional values aren't fading -- _they 're rising again!_ **Our state and country has too many politicians** , so instead, I'm asking you to stand with ME - a Marine, pastor, humanitarian, and Patriot - to ensure we have leaders who will fight to uphold and protect our values and freedoms. clean_body: Colorado shouldn’t be blue A state built on faith, family, freedom, and the Second Amendment is being tested -- and its future will shape the country. | | | | | Friend, | | If this is the first time you're hearing from me, let me introduce myself. My name is Victor Marx -- a husband, father, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and founder of an international humanitarian organization that has carried out more than 150 high-risk rescue missions around the world.I've spent my life stepping into the chaos most people run from, fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. I never expected to run for Governor of Colorado... But people I respected deeply -- including Charlie and Erika Kirk -- believed in me and urged me to step forward because they saw what was happening here in our state.After Charlie was killed, Erika reminded me that he believed this was a fight I was meant to take on.They were right, and I am now fully committed to winning this fight. Because here's the truth most people outside our state don't realize: Colorado SHOULD still be a red state. Colorado was built on independence, limited government, faith, family, and the unshakeable belief in the Second Amendment. Those values run deep in our history and in our people.But over time, the political establishment and a flood of left-wing ideas have overpowered the very values that made Colorado strong. We've watched our state shift from red, to purple, to blue -- not because the people changed, but because leadership failed them.And that failure matters far beyond our borders. Colorado has become a testing ground for policies that spread nationwide -- soft-on-crime agendas, government overreach, attacks on faith, restrictions on constitutional freedoms. If we stop that tide here, we stop it from sweeping across America. That's why this race is so important. If Colorado flips back, the entire country will feel it. It will prove that conservative, constitutional values aren't fading -- they 're rising again! Our state and country has too many politicians , so instead, I'm asking you to stand with ME - a Marine, pastor, humanitarian, and Patriot - to ensure we have leaders who will fight to uphold and protect our values and freedoms. This is our chance to send that message. This is our chance to restore a state that should never have been lost.And this is the moment every patriot -- in Colorado and across America -- should care about. If you're just learning about me today, I hope it's the beginning of something bigger. Because this movement isn't powered by mega-donors or coastal elites -- Thank you for standing with me! For Colorado. For America. Victor Marx Conservative for Governor of Colorado | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY VICTOR MARX FOR GOVERNOR Registered Agent: Gregory Carlson | | P.O. Box 156 Florence, CO 81226

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: Adopt-A-Family for the Holidays!
body:
Adopt-A-Family for the Holidays!

Support Families. Restore Hope. Change Lives.

This holiday season, Autism Health is launching our Adopt-A-Family initiative to help children and adults with autism access care that can truly change the trajectory of their lives. Many families in our community are struggling... financially, emotionally, and physically. But too often, the resources they need are out of reach.

To meet this need, we have partnered with Dr. Goodenowe Enterprises and the Dr. Goodenowe Community Health Initiative to provide families with a comprehensive support system that includes plasmalogen precursor supplementation, community education, monthly mentorship, and guidance from trained navigators who walk alongside families every step of the way.

These programs are already helping individuals experience improvements in focus, communication, sleep, mood, anxiety levels, and overall daily functioning. When you adopt a family for the holidays, you are directly funding access to this full restorative support system.

A Note Regarding the Recent Press Release

In recent weeks, there has been some negative press circulating about Dr. Goodenowe. We want to be clear: these claims are false. Dr. Goodenowe’s work is grounded in decades of biochemical research, integrity, and a deep commitment to helping families facing neurological challenges. He has been transparent, honest, and unwavering in his dedication to scientific progress and community support.

We encourage everyone to listen to his own message and learn the truth directly from him. Here is the video from Dr. Goodenowe.
LISTEN HERE (https://wistia-1577512538.wistia.com/medias/96lw2y19pn?utm_source=Klaviyo&utm_medium=email&_kx=Wx7ZxU3wvTXRsl3LWA-y9rC1qa80Dx_sINXKLL3s-G0.T22dDZ&mc_cid=98c9403fbd&mc_eid=UNIQID)

How You Can Help

By adopting a family, you provide three months or more of life-changing support, including:

• Plasmalogen precursor supplements

• Access to the Engage community platform

• Monthly mentorship through the Community Health Navigator program

• Education, guidance, and community connection

Whether you support one individual or multiple families, your contribution will bring hope and stability to those who need it most this holiday season.
DONATE HERE (https://givebutter.com/goodenowe?gbtid=1e7275f5-0350-4997-b93f-5f3ae202c5ac&mc_cid=98c9403fbd&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** Autism Health Summit 2026 – Last Month for Discounted Tickets
------------------------------------------------------------

The countdown is on! This is the final month to purchase your tickets to the Autism Health Summit 2026 at the discounted rate. Beginning January 1st, ticket prices will increase by $50, so now is the perfect time to secure your spot.

For this month only, you can take an additional $25 off your ticket with promo code Holiday25 at checkout.

Join us April 24–26, 2026 at the beautiful Legacy Center Resort & Spa in San Diego, California, for a powerful three-day event bringing together leading voices in advocacy, research, and integrative health.

Our headline speakers include:

• Aaron Siri, Esq. – Medical freedom attorney

• Del Bigtree – Investigative journalist and host of The HighWire

• Dr. Toby Rogers – Researcher and public health analyst

Seats are limited, and the Summit is expected to sell out. Reserve your spot today and be part of a transformative weekend of education, empowerment, and community.
REGISTER HERE (https://ahsconference.com/?mc_cid=98c9403fbd&mc_eid=UNIQID)

About Autism Health Inc.
Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events, research, and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
DONATE HERE (https://autismhealth.com/donations/?mc_cid=98c9403fbd&mc_eid=UNIQID)

clean_body: Adopt-A-Family for the Holidays! Support Families. Restore Hope. Change Lives. This holiday season, Autism Health is launching our Adopt-A-Family initiative to help children and adults with autism access care that can truly change the trajectory of their lives. Many families in our community are struggling... financially, emotionally, and physically. But too often, the resources they need are out of reach. To meet this need, we have partnered with Dr. Goodenowe Enterprises and the Dr. Goodenowe Community Health Initiative to provide families with a comprehensive support system that includes plasmalogen precursor supplementation, community education, monthly mentorship, and guidance from trained navigators who walk alongside families every step of the way. These programs are already helping individuals experience improvements in focus, communication, sleep, mood, anxiety levels, and overall daily functioning. When you adopt a family for the holidays, you are directly funding access to this full restorative support system. A Note Regarding the Recent Press Release In recent weeks, there has been some negative press circulating about Dr. Goodenowe. We want to be clear: these claims are false. Dr. Goodenowe’s work is grounded in decades of biochemical research, integrity, and a deep commitment to helping families facing neurological challenges. He has been transparent, honest, and unwavering in his dedication to scientific progress and community support. We encourage everyone to listen to his own message and learn the truth directly from him. Here is the video from Dr. Goodenowe. LISTEN HERE () How You Can Help By adopting a family, you provide three months or more of life-changing support, including: • Plasmalogen precursor supplements • Access to the Engage community platform • Monthly mentorship through the Community Health Navigator program • Education, guidance, and community connection Whether you support one individual or multiple families, your contribution will bring hope and stability to those who need it most this holiday season. DONATE HERE () Autism Health Summit 2026 – Last Month for Discounted Tickets The countdown is on! This is the final month to purchase your tickets to the Autism Health Summit 2026 at the discounted rate. Beginning January 1st, ticket prices will increase by $50, so now is the perfect time to secure your spot. For this month only, you can take an additional $25 off your ticket with promo code Holiday25 at checkout. Join us April 24–26, 2026 at the beautiful Legacy Center Resort & Spa in San Diego, California, for a powerful three-day event bringing together leading voices in advocacy, research, and integrative health. Our headline speakers include: • Aaron Siri, Esq. – Medical freedom attorney • Del Bigtree – Investigative journalist and host of The HighWire • Dr. Toby Rogers – Researcher and public health analyst Seats are limited, and the Summit is expected to sell out. Reserve your spot today and be part of a transformative weekend of education, empowerment, and community. REGISTER HERE () About Autism Health Inc. Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events, research, and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders. DONATE HERE () Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance! For more information about Autism Health, visit www.AutismHealth.com ( 252525252Fb43o%2525252525252525252FqzvAAQ%2525252525252525252FAQ%2525252525252525252F9cdab8a9-9431-46cb-bc6b-9b55d5b197a9%2525252525252525252F12%2525252525252525252FLxT2mF6Na2%25252525252525252Fb43o%25252525252525252FR2-AAQ%25252525252525252FAQ%25252525252525252F80757fed-d17a-46c6-8605-a231839e63a6%25252525252525252F9%25252525252525252FdIy1xhXJbE%252525252525252Fb43o%252525252525252FCYvAAQ%252525252525252FAQ%252525252525252F8856f6b3-bc40-410c-9337-2cebc04a0fcd%252525252525252F7%252525252525252F2RcF8rumnp%2525252525252Fb43o%2525252525252FkbLAAQ%2525252525252FAQ%2525252525252Ff7d6fa0a-20e2-477e-a570-623d10204b1a%2525252525252F6%2525252525252FAxGuQRLoxM%25252525252Fb43o%25252525252FJwHBAQ%25252525252FAQ%25252525252Fffabaf5a-0dd3-40f0-8f9e-125d607f5a17%25252525252F6%25252525252FvwjRz3mz0v%252525252Fb43o%252525252F3yjBAQ%252525252FAQ%252525252F64fb26b1-c1cf-47e9-8578-e7dae6d58208%252525252F7%252525252F-hIbIVc8mX%2525252Fb43o%2525252F9E-BAQ%2525252FAQ%2525252F7f0072a0-d60b-40ba-b5d6-bdd309c2553c% 2525252F9%2525252FEqwPy0k95q%25252Fb43o%25252FUHfBAQ%25252FAQ%25252F6f0c2239-f98b-4847-b8ba-270f35e17c24%25252F6%25252FpIhvuiJAb4%252Fb43o%252F2J7BAQ%252FAQ%252Fb841fdc9-b437-4dfa-abcb-6b79907d097f%252F7%252F0XZcutREy-%2Fb43o%2FpqnBAQ%2FAQ%2F66d1d4e1-7937-4b2a-9bdd-d1357c1bf5a6%2F5%2F6N-7mP4vYt/b43o/wcXBAQ/AQ/71aa608d-5f41-4eb7-8877-052adb2a290a/4/6ItnRaDBz6) . body:
| | | Hi there, it's Marc Elias, and I just finished arguing before the Supreme Court to defend our democracy.

[**Before I brief you further, I have to ask -- will you chip in $5 to the DSCC to stand against GOP leaders' flagrant disregard for the law and fight for our democracy by flipping the Senate blue? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251209-MarcElias-MarcEliasDeliveredArgumentsBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251209-MarcElias-MarcEliasDeliveredArgumentsBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=22008%2E9716520%2EHKIoxV)

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251209-MarcElias-MarcEliasDeliveredArgumentsBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251209-MarcElias-MarcEliasDeliveredArgumentsBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=22008%2E9716520%2EHKIoxV)
---

In 2018, Donald Trump called me the Democratic Party's "best election stealing lawyer." But the truth is, I fight hard to ensure every eligible citizen can vote, every lawful ballot is counted, and every accurate election result is certified -- that's what Trump and his cronies are so afraid of and why I'm so _eagerly_ fighting them in court on behalf of Democrats.

In this case, the GOP is trying to override decades of precedent and undermine this country's campaign finance laws for their own benefit. They're trying to eliminate a key barrier to corruption so they can spend even more money from billionaires to prop up Republican candidates.

**But I'm fighting back, and together, we'll _win_.**

On behalf of the DSCC and Democrats like you across the nation, **I just walked out of the Supreme Court where I personally delivered our arguments, urging the justices to _reject_ the GOP's _corrupt_ schemes.**

Now, we have to be prepared for any outcome. We MUST utilize every resource at our disposal to keep fighting back against Trump and his cronies, _no matter what_ \-- and that's where your support is critical.

The DSCC is the _only_ committee dedicated to electing a Democratic Senate to replace the GOP majority that rubber-stamps Trump's dangerous agenda. And the support of Democrats like you plays a key part in their work to preserve our democracy.

**So I'm asking for your help as we work to stop Trump's allies, flip the Senate blue, and defend democracy:**[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more today to support the DSCC's efforts to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251209-MarcElias-MarcEliasDeliveredArgumentsBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251209-MarcElias-MarcEliasDeliveredArgumentsBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=22008%2E9716520%2EHKIoxV)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251209-MarcElias-MarcEliasDeliveredArgumentsBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251209-MarcElias-MarcEliasDeliveredArgumentsBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=22008%2E9716520%2EHKIoxV)
